items.title_en: Polymarket gamblers threaten to kill me over Iran missile story
items.title_zh: Polymarket 赌徒因伊朗导弹报道威胁要杀我
items.summary_en: Reporters reveal threats from Polymarket gamblers over an Iran missile story. The threats underscore the real-world risks journalists face when covering volatile bets and geopolitical topics in real-time markets, and raise questions about safety and editorial resilience.
items.summary_zh: 记者报道，有人在 Polymarket 对其伊朗导弹报道下注后威胁要杀害他人。此事凸显在实时博彩市场中报道敏感国际议题时，记者面临的现实风险，以及安全与编辑独立性可能受到的挑战。

items.title_en: Astral to Join OpenAI
items.title_zh: Astral 将加入 OpenAI
items.summary_en: Astral will join OpenAI, signaling a consolidation of AI tooling and developer platforms. The move could accelerate integration of Astral's capabilities into OpenAI's ecosystem, influencing how developers build atop AI services.
items.summary_zh: Astral 将加入 OpenAI，标志着 AI 工具链和开发者平台的整合。这一举措可能加速将 Astral 的能力融入 OpenAI 的生态，影响开发者在 AI 服务上的搭建方式。

items.title_en: Kagi Translate now supports LinkedIn Speak as an output language
items.title_zh: Kagi Translate 现已支持 LinkedIn Speak 作为输出语言
items.summary_en: Kagi Translate adds LinkedIn Speak as a translation target, enabling outputs in a professional LinkedIn-friendly register. This broadens its channel-aware capabilities, helping users tailor content for business networks and improve engagement on professional posts. It reflects growing demand for channel-specific personas in translation tooling.
items.summary_zh: Kagi Translate 增加了 LinkedIn Speak 作为输出语言，能把翻译结果呈现为专业、适合 LinkedIn 的语气。此举让内容更易在商业网络中引发共鸣，提升职业帖子的互动率。也反映了翻译工具越来越强调按渠道定制的能力。

items.title_en: Palestinian boy, 12, describes how Israeli forces killed his family in car
items.title_zh: 12岁巴勒斯坦男孩描述以色列军队在车内杀害家人
items.summary_en: A 12-year-old Palestinian boy describes how Israeli forces killed his family in a car, offering a rare child’s eyewitness account amid ongoing conflict. The testimony highlights civilian harm and the human cost of military operations, underscoring the volatility of frontline reporting.
items.summary_zh: 一名12岁巴勒斯坦男孩讲述在一起车内事件中，他的家人被以色列军队杀害的经过。此证词突显冲突中的平民伤亡与人道代价，也反映出前线报道的挑战。

items.title_en: OpenCode – Open source AI coding agent
items.title_zh: OpenCode：开源AI编码代理
items.summary_en: OpenCode is an open-source AI coding agent that helps developers automate routine coding tasks and explore AI-assisted workflows. By being open-source, it invites experimentation, customization, and transparency, contrasting with proprietary copilots. This matters for developers weighing privacy, control, and ecosystem when adopting AI coding tools.
items.summary_zh: OpenCode 是一个开源的 AI 编码代理，旨在帮助开发者自动化常规编码任务并尝试 AI 驱动的工作流。作为开源项目，它鼓励社区参与、定制和透明度，与闭源的代码助手形成对比。对于考虑隐私、控制权和生态系统的开发者来说，这是选择 AI 编码工具时一个重要考量。

items.title_en: Afroman found not liable in defamation case
items.title_zh: Afroman 在诽谤案中被裁定对警察无责
items.summary_en: Afroman was found not liable in a defamation suit brought by Ohio police who had raided his home. The ruling emphasizes the high standard for proving defamation when public figures discuss police conduct and may influence future entertainment-law disputes. This outcome matters for creators who voice controversial statements.
items.summary_zh: Afroman 在俄亥俄州警察就突袭其家中提起的诽谤诉讼中被判无责任。判决强调涉及公共人物与执法行为的言论案件需满足较高的证明标准，可能影响未来相关诉讼的走向，并对娱乐行业有一定参考意义。

items.title_en: Google details new 24-hour process to sideload unverified Android apps
items.title_zh: 谷歌公布 24 小时内可 sideload 未验证 Android 应用的新流程
items.summary_en: Google detailed a 24-hour window that allows sideloading of unverified Android apps to accelerate testing and internal distribution outside the Play ecosystem. While it speeds iteration, it broadens the attack surface and prompts heightened security and policy safeguards.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌公布了一项 24 小时窗口，允许 sideload 未经验证的 Android 应用以加速测试和内部分发。此举虽提升迭代速度，但也扩大了潜在攻击面，需加强安全与策略层面的防护。

items.title_en: Bill C-22, the Lawful Access Act: Dangerous backdoor surveillance risks remain
items.title_zh: Bill C-22：合法获取法案——后门监控风险仍存
items.summary_en: Bill C-22 would expand law enforcement access to data, with changes that still allow warrantless backdoor surveillance risks. Privacy advocates warn that even with reforms, the bill could enable broad, covert monitoring across digital communications.
items.summary_zh: Bill C-22 将扩大执法对数据的获取权限，尽管作出了一些修改，后门监控风险仍然存在。隐私倡导者警告这类立法可能让大范围、非授权的监控成为现实，侵害公民数字隐私。

items.title_en: I'm OK being left behind, thanks
items.title_zh: 谢谢，我愿意落后一点
items.summary_en: Many readers may interpret as a stance against the AI arms race. It argues for a slower, more deliberate pace focused on reliability and user welfare. In practice, it challenges the assumption that faster is always better in tech development.
items.summary_zh: 作者不愿被技术浪潮淹没，选择慢一些、稳妥前进。强调稳定性和隐私比追逐热点更重要。这样的观点提醒在快速迭代的行业里，理性节奏同样值得关注。

items.title_en: Rob Pike’s Rules of Programming (1989)
items.title_zh: Rob Pike 的五条编程法则
items.summary_en: Practical guidance from Rob Pike emphasizes keeping code simple, correct, and maintainable. The five rules center on readable interfaces, orthogonality, and constructing reliable, easily reasoned systems.
items.summary_zh: Rob Pike 的五条编程法则集中呈现了实用的编程智慧，强调构建可靠软件的重要性。核心内容包括简洁、可读接口、正交性，以及易于推理和维护的代码。

items.title_en: Have a fucking website
items.title_zh: 一定要有一个网站
items.summary_en: Having a dedicated website gives you a stable home for your projects, portfolio, and experiments, independent of platform policies. A minimal static site with a custom domain can dramatically improve your online credibility and discoverability for developers and creators.
items.summary_zh: 拥有专属网站为项目、简历与实验成果提供稳定归宿，不依赖社交媒体平台。即使是简单的静态站点搭配自定义域名，也能显著提升可发现性与专业形象。

items.title_en: Reddit User Uncovers Who Is Behind Meta's $2B Lobbying for Age Verification Tech
items.title_zh: Reddit 用户揭露谁在为 Meta 的年龄验证技术投入 20 亿美元进行游说
items.summary_en: A Reddit user exposes who is behind Meta’s $2 billion lobbying push for age verification tech. The reveal sheds light on the opaque networks that drive big-tech policy influence and raises questions about privacy, consent, and the effectiveness of age checks.
items.summary_zh: 一位 Reddit 用户披露了推动 Meta 就年龄验证技术进行20亿美元游说的幕后主体。这一揭露揭示了驱动大型科技公司政策影响的隐蔽网络，并引发关于隐私、同意和年龄核验有效性的讨论。

items.title_en: Some things just take time
items.title_zh: 有些事就是需要时间
items.summary_en: Patience is essential for long-running tech work; complex problems don't yield quick wins. The piece argues that taking time to iterate and learn is often the difference between failure and breakthrough.
items.summary_zh: 在长期的技术工作中，耐心至关重要；复杂问题难以快速解决。文章指出，慢慢迭代和积累经验往往比急于求成带来更大成功的可能。

items.title_en: Do Not Turn Child Protection into Internet Access Control
items.title_zh: 不要把儿童保护变成互联网访问控制
items.summary_en: Guardrails for child protection should be precise and targeted, not a pretext for blanket internet access control. Overly broad censorship risks chilling freedom online while failing to stop abuse. The piece calls for privacy-preserving, surgical safeguards instead.
items.summary_zh: 儿童保护政策不应成为全面的网络访问控制的借口。宽泛的封锁容易压制在线自由，并未有效阻止滥用。应采用更精准、透明的隐私保护措施与安全防护。

items.title_en: Austin’s surge of new housing construction drove down rents
items.title_zh: 奥斯汀新建住房激增致租金下降
items.summary_en: Austin’s housing boom kept rents in check as a wave of new units came online, softening affordability even as demand from tech workers remains high. The finding highlights how supplying more units can influence urban affordability and inform policy debates on zoning and infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 奥斯汀的住房供给激增带动新建单位上线，抵消了需求，导致租金走低。此现象反映出供给侧扩张对城市可负担性的直接影响，可能影响土地使用、基础设施和住房政策的讨论。

items.title_en: The 49MB web page
items.title_zh: 49MB 的网页
items.summary_en: The page weighs in at 49MB, serving as a cautionary example of how modern sites can balloon with images, scripts, and third-party resources. The write-up walks through auditing approaches to identify bloated bundles, optimize critical paths, and pare back assets without wrecking UX. Takeaway: page size is a first-class performance lever, and thoughtful auditing matters for both users and developers.
items.summary_zh: 该网页达到 49MB，揭示现代站点如何被图片、脚本和第三方资源膨胀。文中提供审计方法，帮助识别冗余资源、优化关键渲染路径，并在不破坏用户体验的前提下精简资产。要点：页面大小是性能的重要变量，细致的审计对用户和开发者都重要。

items.title_en: Microsoft's 'unhackable' Xbox One has been hacked by 'Bliss'
items.title_zh: 微软所谓的“不可破解”的 Xbox One 被 Bliss 破解
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrated a voltage-glitch attack against Microsoft's Xbox One, breaking the console's claimed 'unhackable' security. The hack lets unsigned code run at various privilege levels, undermining hardware protections and enabling homebrew or piracy-style access.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员通过电压干扰对 Xbox One 展开攻击，打破了其“不可破解”的安全宣称。该漏洞使未签名代码在不同权限级别下得以运行，削弱了硬件防护，并可能开启自制软件或盗版访问。

items.title_en: ArXiv declares independence from Cornell
items.title_zh: ArXiv宣布独立于康奈尔大学
items.summary_en: ArXiv, the long-running open-access preprint server, is shedding its longtime host by shifting governance away from Cornell. The move signals a push toward community-led stewardship and diversified funding as arXiv seeks long-term sustainability. For researchers, it could mean changes in governance, policy, and how quickly new features roll out.
items.summary_zh: 作为长期负责的开放获取预印本服务器，ArXiv 正在将治理从康奈尔大学转向独立管理。此次转变旨在实现更具社区驱动色彩的治理结构和多元化资金来源，以确保长期可持续性。对于研究者而言，未来在治理、政策和新功能上线速度等方面可能出现变化。

items.title_en: Leanstral: Open-source agent for trustworthy coding and formal proof engineering
items.title_zh: Leanstral：用于可信编码与形式化证明工程的开源代理
items.summary_en: Leanstral is an open-source agent designed to assist developers with trustworthy coding and formal proof engineering. It integrates AI-assisted coding with formal verification tooling to improve software correctness and reliability, making rigorous development workflows more accessible.
items.summary_zh: Leanstral 是一个面向开发者的开源代理，旨在协助进行可信编码与形式化证明工程。它将 AI 辅助编码与形式化验证工具结合，提升软件正确性与可信度，让严格的软件工程工作流更易落地。

items.title_en: Delve – Fake Compliance as a Service
items.title_zh: Delve：假合规即服务
items.summary_en: Delve dives into the emerging 'Fake Compliance as a Service' phenomenon, critiquing services that generate pretend attestations or simplified controls to appease audits. The piece warns about integrity risks for users, regulators, and auditors when compliance is commodified.
items.summary_zh: Delve 深度剖析新兴的“假合规即服务”现象，批评那些提供虚假合规证明或简化控制的服务。文章警示当合规被商品化时，对用户、监管机构和审计方构成的信任与合规性风险。

items.title_en: Kagi Small Web
items.title_zh: Kagi 推出 Small Web 小型网络
items.summary_en: Kagi announces Small Web, an initiative aimed at supporting smaller, privacy-conscious websites and reducing reliance on major platforms. The move signals a shift toward a more diverse web ecosystem and potential new strategies for search and discovery.
items.summary_zh: Kagi 宣布推出 Small Web，旨在支持规模较小、注重隐私的网站，减少对大型平台的依赖。这一举措或促成更为多样的网络生态与搜索发现的新策略。

items.title_en: Chuck Norris has died
items.title_zh: 查克·诺里斯去世
items.summary_en: Veteran actor Chuck Norris has died, ending a career spanning action films and 'Walker, Texas Ranger.' The obituary notes his influence on action genres and the enduring meme culture surrounding him.
items.summary_zh: 知名演员查克·诺里斯去世，结束了他在动作片和《德州之鹰/德州战警》系列中的长久职业生涯。文中回顾了他对动作片的影响以及在网络梗时代的持续人气。

items.title_en: US SEC preparing to scrap quarterly reporting requirement
items.title_zh: 美国SEC拟取消季度报告要求
items.summary_en: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission is preparing to eliminate the mandatory quarterly reporting requirement for public companies. This could cut compliance costs and reduce quarterly volatility, but may shift investor expectations toward annual disclosures and alter how markets price near-term risk.
items.summary_zh: 美国证监会正筹划取消强制性季度财报，可能减轻上市公司合规负担，降低季度业绩波动。此举或改变投资者对时点披露的期待，并影响市场对短期风险的定价和分析方法。

items.title_en: A Decade of Slug
items.title_zh: Slug 的十年回顾
items.summary_en: Slug: A decade-long retrospective.
items.summary_zh: Slug 的十年回顾。

items.title_en: Corruption erodes social trust more in democracies than in autocracies
items.title_zh: 腐败在民主国家对社会信任的侵蚀比专制国家更严重
items.summary_en: A new study finds corruption erodes social trust more in democratic countries than in autocracies. The result suggests that transparency and accountability mechanisms in democracies can backfire when corruption spreads, hurting trust in institutions more than in tightly controlled regimes. The finding matters for governance, civic tech, and how platforms rely on public trust.
items.summary_zh: 最新研究显示，腐败对社会信任的侵蚀在民主国家比在专制国家更明显。这一发现提示，民主制度的透明与问责机制在某些情境下可能放大信任的下滑，对治理、公民科技以及依赖信任的平台都具重要影响。

items.title_en: Mistral AI Releases Forge
items.title_zh: Mistral AI 推出 Forge
items.summary_en: Mistral AI releases Forge, a toolkit intended to streamline AI model development and deployment. The platform emphasizes performance and openness, aiming to help developers assemble, train, and deploy models more efficiently. It signals growing competition in AI infrastructure tooling beyond pure model size.
items.summary_zh: Mistral AI 发布 Forge，旨在简化 AI 模型开发与部署的工具包。该平台强调高性能与开放性，帮助开发者更高效地组装、训练和部署模型，体现了在模型之外的 AI 基础设施竞争加剧。

items.title_en: PC Gamer recommends RSS readers in a 37mb article that just keeps downloading
items.title_zh: PC Gamer 在一篇 37MB 的文章中推荐 RSS 阅读器，但文稿似乎不断在下载
items.summary_en: PC Gamer curates a selection of RSS readers in a long, 37MB feature. The piece itself is unexpectedly download-heavy, turning a simple recommendation into a test of browser patience. The underlying takeaway is that enthusiasts still crave lightweight, dependable feed readers in an era of endless content.
items.summary_zh: PC Gamer 选出一批 RSS 阅读器的清单，但这篇 37MB 的文章本身却像在持续下载内容，考验浏览器耐心。文章透露在信息过载的时代，用户仍然需要轻量、可靠的订阅工具。

items.title_en: OpenRocket
items.title_zh: OpenRocket：开源火箭设计与仿真工具
items.summary_en: OpenRocket is an open-source rocket design and flight simulation package that lets hobbyists, students, and researchers model aerodynamics, stability, and trajectories before launch. It helps verify designs and teaches rocketry principles without expensive hardware. The project embodies the practical value of open scientific tooling.
items.summary_zh: OpenRocket 是一个开源的火箭设计与飞行仿真工具，用户能在发射前建模气动、稳定性和轨迹。它便于爱好者、学生和研究者在没有昂贵设备的情况下验证设计、学习火箭学原理。该项目体现了开源科学工具的实用价值。

items.title_en: Stop Sloppypasta
items.title_zh: Stop Sloppypasta
items.summary_en: Stop Sloppypasta is a project advocating higher-quality AI-generated content and practices. It offers guidelines or tools for better prompting, attribution, and quality checks. Takeaway: as AI-generated content proliferates, tools and norms for quality matter more than ever.
items.summary_zh: Stop Sloppypasta 致力于提升 AI 生成内容的质量与负责任的使用，提供更好的提示设计、署名与质量检查的指南与工具。要点：随着 AI 内容的泛滥，质量标准与工具变得比以往更为重要。

items.title_en: MoD sources warn Palantir role at heart of government is threat to UK security
items.title_zh: 英国国防部消息称 Palantir 在政府核心地位的角色对国家安全构成威胁
items.summary_en: MoD sources warn Palantir's central role in UK government data insights may pose security risks and vendor lock-in.
items.summary_zh: 国防部消息人士警告 Palantir 在英国政府数据洞察中的核心角色可能带来安全风险和对单一供应商的依赖。文章探讨治理、透明度和监督的担忧。

items.title_en: Hormuz Minesweeper – Are you tired of winning?
items.title_zh: Hormuz Minesweeper：你厌倦赢了吗？
items.summary_en: Hormuz Minesweeper is an experimental Minesweeper-inspired project that challenges players with nontraditional puzzles; it also probes AI-assisted play and human limits.
items.summary_zh: Hormuz Minesweeper 是一个受扫雷启发的实验性项目，通过非传统的谜题挑战玩家；同时探讨 AI 辅助玩法与人类能力的边界。

items.title_en: France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through fitness app
items.title_zh: 勒蒙德通过健身应用实现法国航母的实时定位
items.summary_en: A Le Monde investigation shows real-time tracking of France's aircraft carrier via fitness app data, revealing how public location sharing can leak sensitive security information.
items.summary_zh: 勒蒙德的调查显示，公开的健身应用数据可能让法国航母的位置在实时暴露，暴露了公共数据对国家安全的潜在威胁。此事凸显了个人位置信息在缺乏隐私保护的情况下对安全的影响，促使对数据共享进行审视。

items.title_en: Our commitment to Windows quality
items.title_zh: 我们对 Windows 品质的承诺
items.summary_en: Microsoft outlines its plan to improve Windows quality through deeper testing, more stable updates, and better compatibility, aiming to restore user trust after a string of issues.
items.summary_zh: 微软阐述通过更深入的测试、更加稳定的更新和更好的兼容性来提升 Windows 质量，旨在重获用户信任。文章强调软件质量在竞争激烈的操作系统市场中的关键作用。

items.title_en: A sufficiently detailed spec is code
items.title_zh: 足够详细的规格就是代码
items.summary_en: Detailed specifications can serve as concrete, testable artifacts that drive implementation without separate code. When specs are precise, teams can simulate behavior and verify outcomes directly from the docs.
items.summary_zh: 足够详尽的规格本身就能成为可执行的产物，推动实现、测试与仿真，模糊了文档与代码的界线。把规范当作代码来管理，可以用自动化校验与模拟来验证行为。

items.title_en: Chrome DevTools MCP (2025)
items.title_zh: Chrome DevTools 的 MCP（2025）——调试浏览器会话的新方式
items.summary_en: Chrome DevTools introduces MCP-based tooling to debug browser sessions more comprehensively, enabling cross-process inspection and more seamless workflows for developers. The update aims to improve transparency and troubleshooting in complex web apps.
items.summary_zh: Chrome DevTools 推出 2025 版的 MCP 调试工作流，使开发者能够更全面地调试浏览器会话、跨进程诊断问题。新工 具提升了对复杂网页应用的可观测性与排错效率。

items.title_en: Tinybox – A powerful computer for deep learning
items.title_zh: Tinybox：用于深度学习的强大小型电脑
items.summary_en: Tinybox packs substantial compute into a compact box, enabling on-device deep learning experiments without relying on the cloud. It targets researchers, hobbyists, and edge deployments seeking serious compute with a small footprint.
items.summary_zh: Tinybox 将强大算力压缩进小巧盒子，支持本地深度学习试验，无需依赖云端。面向希望在紧凑空间内获得高性能计算的研究者、爱好者与边缘部署。

items.title_en: LLM Architecture Gallery
items.title_zh: LLM 架构画廊
items.summary_en: LLM Architecture Gallery presents a visual catalog of common and emerging LLM architectures, from vanilla transformer stacks to retrieval-augmented and modular designs. It helps engineers compare trade-offs in latency, memory, and accuracy. Takeaway: architecture choices shape capabilities and cost, and a visual guide helps map the design space.
items.summary_zh: LLM 架构画廊以可视化形式整理了常见与新兴的模型架构，从基础的 Transformer 堆栈到检索增强和模块化设计，帮助工程师对比在延迟、内存与精度等维度的权衡。要点：架构选择决定能力和成本，直观的对比有助于把握设计空间。

items.title_en: The future of version control
items.title_zh: 版本控制的未来
items.summary_en: Visionaries describe the next phase of version control beyond Git-style systems, spotlighting peer-to-peer collaboration, cryptographic integrity, and scalable, offline-friendly workflows. The takeaway is that new paradigms could change how teams coordinate, verify history, and scale development. For technologists, this signals a shift in toolchains and trust conventions.
items.summary_zh: 讨论了超越现有版本控制系统的新范式，强调点对点协作、加密完整性和可离线扩展的工作流。核心在于新机制可能改变团队的协作、历史验证和开发扩展的方式。对开发者来说，这预示着工具链与信任体系的变革。

items.title_en: Nightingale – open-source karaoke app that works with any song on your computer
items.title_zh: Nightingale——开源的本地音乐卡拉OK应用，能用你电脑上的任意歌曲
items.summary_en: Nightingale is an open-source karaoke app that works with local music files on your computer. It offers an offline-first, privacy-respecting alternative to cloud-based karaoke tools.
items.summary_zh: Nightingale 是一款开源卡拉OK应用，可直接使用电脑本地的音乐文件进行演唱，无需联网服务。它体现了离线优先的音乐工具和对隐私的重视。

items.title_en: “Your frustration is the product”
items.title_zh: 『你的挫折就是产品』
items.summary_en: The piece argues that many products monetize user frustration through friction and attention traps. It urges designers to rethink engagement strategies and prioritize user autonomy and transparency.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为许多产品通过制造挫折感、设计摩擦和注意力陷阱来变现。呼吁设计师重新审视参与策略，优先考虑用户自主性与透明度。

items.title_en: Every layer of review makes you 10x slower
items.title_zh: 每多一层评审，速度就会慢十倍
items.summary_en: An argument that added review layers multiply latency, urging leaner processes. The post argues for reducing handoffs and embracing light-weight reviews, automation, and clear ownership to keep velocity high.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为每增加一层评审都会让交付速度慢十倍，评审层级的叠加带来显著延迟。文章主张减少不必要的环节，加强自动化和明确的职责分工，以维持高开发节奏。

items.title_en: The “small web” is bigger than you might think
items.title_zh: “小型网络”比你想象的更大
items.summary_en: A thoughtful look at the indie or small web beyond big platforms, highlighting personal sites, RSS, and distributed hosting. It argues the ecosystem is bigger and more varied than it appears, with privacy-friendly projects continuing to grow.
items.summary_zh: 对独立/小型网络的深入观察，聚焦个人站点、RSS 和分布式托管等现象。指出这个生态系统其实比外界想象的要大、更加多元，隐私友好型项目仍在成长。

items.title_en: Show HN: Three new Kitten TTS models – smallest less than 25MB
items.title_zh: Show HN：三个新的 Kitten TTS 模型——最小版小于 25MB
items.summary_en: Three new Kitten TTS models are introduced, notable for ultra-small footprints; the smallest model is under 25MB. This showcases the potential for on-device, offline text-to-speech on resource-constrained hardware.
items.summary_zh: 展示的三个 Kitten TTS 模型体积极小，最小版本不到 25MB，凸显在边缘设备上实现高质量文本转语音的可行性。小体积模型有助于离线应用、低带宽环境，以及快速本地化部署。

items.title_en: Blocking Internet Archive Won't Stop AI, but Will Erase Web's Historical Record
items.title_zh: 阻断 Internet Archive 不会阻止 AI，但会抹去网络的历史记录
items.summary_en: Blocking Internet Archive won't curb AI development, and models will still train on data from other sources. It would erase a vital historical snapshot of the web, harming researchers, journalists, and accountability. Smarter data-use policies are preferable to outright blackouts.
items.summary_zh: 阻断 Internet Archive 不会遏制 AI 发展，模型仍会从其他来源获取数据。这会抹去网络的宝贵历史快照，损害研究、报道和问责能力。应采用更聪明的数据使用政策，而不是全面封锁。

items.title_en: The American Healthcare Conundrum
items.title_zh: 美国医疗保健难题
items.summary_en: The American Healthcare Conundrum offers a data-driven look at why U.S. healthcare remains so expensive and fragmented despite high spending. The project highlights cost drivers, insurance complexity, and misaligned incentives, providing a practical lens for policy and tech-centered fixes.
items.summary_zh: 这是一份基于数据的分析，揭示美国医疗体系为何价格高昂且仍然碎片化。项目聚焦成本驱动因素、保险体系的复杂性和激励错位，提供面向政策、技术与医疗服务改进的实践视角。

items.title_en: Meta’s renewed commitment to jemalloc
items.title_zh: Meta 再次承诺优化 jemalloc
items.summary_en: Meta renews its commitment to jemalloc, the memory allocator powering its data infrastructure. The move signals continued focus on performance, latency, and memory efficiency at scale, with potential upstream contributions benefiting other projects that rely on jemalloc.
items.summary_zh: Meta 再次承诺继续优化 jemalloc，这一为数据基础设施提供分配内存的组件在大规模系统中扮演关键角色。此举表明 Meta 将持续提升性能与内存效率，并可能向 jemalloc 的开源社区带来贡献，惠及依赖该分配器的其他项目。

items.title_en: Warranty Void If Regenerated
items.title_zh: 再生即保修失效
items.summary_en: Warranty terms may be voided when devices are regenerated, highlighting tensions between manufacturer protections and consumer repair rights.
items.summary_zh: 探讨设备在再生/翻新后保修是否仍然有效，凸显厂商保护与消费者维修权之间的矛盾。

items.title_en: How I write software with LLMs
items.title_zh: 我如何用大模型写软件
items.summary_en: A practical look at integrating LLMs into the software development workflow—from ideation and scaffolding to testing and refactoring—with guardrails and concrete tooling choices. It shows how to keep code quality high when AI is part of the process.
items.summary_zh: 从构思、搭建到测试与重构，展示将大模型融入软件开发工作流的实际做法，并配备守卫机制与具体工具选择，说明在有 AI 参与时如何维持代码质量。

items.title_en: FBI is buying location data to track US citizens, director confirms
items.title_zh: 联邦调查局确认购买位置数据以追踪美国公民
items.summary_en: The FBI confirmed it buys location data from brokers to track people in investigations, raising civil liberties concerns and questions about oversight and data provenance.
items.summary_zh: FBI 确认从数据经纪商购买位置信息用于追踪个人，相关实践引发对公民隐私和监控范围的担忧，以及对数据来源和监管的质疑。

items.title_en: Why I love FreeBSD
items.title_zh: 我对 FreeBSD 的喜爱
items.summary_en: A personal ode to FreeBSD, praising its performance, security model, and the stability of its ports and tooling. The piece argues FreeBSD remains a compelling choice for servers and hobbyists who value control.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享对 FreeBSD 的热爱，称赞其性能、安全模型及稳健的包管理与工具链。文章认为对追求可控性和稳定性的服务器与爱好者来说，FreeBSD 仍然值得一试。

items.title_en: Project Nomad – Knowledge That Never Goes Offline
items.title_zh: Project Nomad：知识永不离线
items.summary_en: Presents an offline-first knowledge initiative designed to keep information accessible during outages or censorship. Emphasizes resilience and portability of knowledge through local-first data strategies.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一个离线优先的知识项目，确保在断网或审查环境中也能访问信息，强调通过本地化数据策略提升知识的韧性与可携带性。

items.title_en: US Job Market Visualizer
items.title_zh: 美国就业市场可视化工具
items.summary_en: Karpathy's US Job Market Visualizer maps demand, salaries, and geographic distribution across tech sectors, offering a data-driven view of where skills matter. It's a useful tool for engineers plotting career moves in AI and software.
items.summary_zh: Karpathy 的美国就业市场可视化工具绘制了科技领域的需求、薪资和地理分布，为判断 AI 与软件技能的市场前景提供数据化视角。对职业规划很有参考价值。

items.title_en: Despite doubts, federal cyber experts approved Microsoft cloud service
items.title_zh: 尽管存在疑虑，联邦网络安全专家仍批准微软云服务
items.summary_en: Federal cybersecurity reviewers approved a Microsoft cloud service for government use despite concerns about security and transparency. The decision signals growing government reliance on cloud platforms but underscores ongoing oversight.
items.summary_zh: 联邦网络安全专家在存在安全与透明度担忧的情况下仍批准了微软云服务用于政府系统。此举体现政府对云平台的日益依赖，同时也强调持续的监管。

items.title_en: A Japanese glossary of chopsticks faux pas (2022)
items.title_zh: 日本筷子礼仪大全（2022）
items.summary_en: An etiquette glossary highlights chopstick faux pas and proper manners, useful for travelers and for teams localizing software and content for Japan.
items.summary_zh: 这份日本筷子礼仪大全列出常见的用筷失礼行为及正确做法，适合旅行者与需要进行日本区域本地化的团队学习遵循。它也提醒在跨文化交流和产品本地化中对礼仪规范的敏感性。

items.title_en: Python 3.15's JIT is now back on track
items.title_zh: Python 3.15 的 JIT 已重新回到正轨
items.summary_en: Python 3.15's JIT development has resumed, signaling renewed momentum for speeding up Python without breaking existing C-extensions. The effort aims to bring a practical JIT to CPython, potentially narrowing performance gaps with PyPy and boosting workloads across data science and web apps.
items.summary_zh: Python 3.15 的 JIT 开发已重新启动，意味着在不破坏现有扩展的前提下提升 Python 运行速度的努力又有了新动能。该项目力求在 CPython 中引入实用的即时编译，或缩小与 PyPy 的性能差距，并提升数据科学与 Web 应用等场景的性能。

items.title_en: GrapheneOS will remain usable by anyone without requiring personal information
items.title_zh: GrapheneOS 将继续对所有人开放使用，无需个人信息
items.summary_en: GrapheneOS reiterates its privacy-first approach, stressing that you can use the OS without providing personal information. The note highlights the trade-offs in keeping the ecosystem usable without sign-ins or telemetry, and what this means for typical users.
items.summary_zh: GrapheneOS 继续坚持隐私优先理念，强调无需提供个人信息即可使用系统。文章点出在保持无需账户或数据传输的前提下，生态系统所需的权衡以及对普通用户的影响。

items.title_en: Anthropic takes legal action against OpenCode
items.title_zh: Anthropic 对 OpenCode 提起诉讼
items.summary_en: Anthropic has filed a lawsuit against OpenCode, signaling a new legal tussle in the AI ecosystem. The action highlights ongoing battles over training data, IP, and competitive practices that could influence how AI startups operate and disclose information.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 对 OpenCode 提起诉讼，标志着 AI 领域新的法律博弈。此举凸显关于训练数据、知识产权和竞争行为的持续之争，可能影响 AI 初创公司的运营方式与信息披露要求。

items.title_en: The three pillars of JavaScript bloat
items.title_zh: JavaScript 脚手架臃肿的三大支柱
items.summary_en: Three drivers of JavaScript bloat are identified: overbearing frameworks, bloated dependencies, and heavy build tooling. The piece also discusses practical ways to trim footprint without sacrificing capability.
items.summary_zh: 本文指出 JavaScript 脃肿的三大根源：过度依赖框架、臃肿的依赖关系，以及繁重的构建工具。还探讨在不牺牲功能的前提下压缩体积的实用方法。

items.title_en: 4Chan mocks £520k fine for UK online safety breaches
items.title_zh: 4chan 围观英国因网络安全违规被罚52万英镑
items.summary_en: 4chan's response to a £520k UK online safety breach penalty highlights enforcement dynamics and platform compliance with safety regulations.
items.summary_zh: 4chan 对英国因网络安全违规被罚 £520k 的处罚进行嘲讽，同时文章也回顾监管裁决及其对平台合规的启示。

items.title_en: Get Shit Done: A meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven dev system
items.title_zh: Get Shit Done：元提示、上下文工程与基于规范的开发系统
items.summary_en: A framework that combines meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development to guide software creation. It aims to standardize prompts, enforce workflows, and improve reproducibility across teams.
items.summary_zh: 一个将元提示、上下文工程与基于规范的开发流程结合起来的框架，用于引导软件开发。通过标准化提示、强化工作流、提升团队协作的一致性与可重复性。

items.title_en: Reports of code's death are greatly exaggerated
items.title_zh: 关于代码死亡的传闻被大大夸大
items.summary_en: Code isn't dead; AI tools will augment but not replace human software craftsmen. The piece argues that precise, maintainable code, rigorous testing, and clear design remain essential as automation shifts routine work. In practice, expect a continued emphasis on tooling that preserves correctness and developer control.
items.summary_zh: 尽管有 AI 辅助写码的趋势，代码并未消亡。高质量、可维护的代码、严谨的测试和明确的设计仍然是关键，因为自动化会改变工作方式但需要人类把控。

items.title_en: Return of the Obra Dinn: spherical mapped dithering for a 1bpp first-person game
items.title_zh: 《Obra Dinn》的回归：用于 1bpp 第一人称游戏的球面映射抖动
items.summary_en: This post discusses applying spherical mapped dithering to achieve 1-bit-per-pixel visuals in a first-person game, connecting to Return of the Obra Dinn. The technique demonstrates how low-bit rendering can yield striking aesthetics for constrained engines.
items.summary_zh: 文章提出在 1bpp 的第一人称游戏中使用球面映射抖动来实现风格独特的绘制效果，借由低比特深度渲染实现视觉冲击。此思路展示了资源受限的场景也能获得鲜明美术风格，或为复古/低配置引擎提供参考。

items.title_en: The gold standard of optimization: A look under the hood of RollerCoaster Tycoon
items.title_zh: 优化的黄金标准：一探 RollerCoaster Tycoon 的底层实现
items.summary_en: A deep dive into the optimization practices behind RollerCoaster Tycoon, the piece argues that the game's engine exemplifies rigorous, scalable performance engineering. It reveals the tradeoffs between simulation fidelity and render performance, offering lessons for real-time systems and game AI.
items.summary_zh: 对 RollerCoaster Tycoon 的底层优化实践进行深入解读，认为游戏引擎体现了严格且可扩展的性能工程。揭示仿真精度与渲染性能之间的权衡，为实时系统和游戏 AI 提供可借鉴的经验。

items.title_en: FFmpeg 8.1
items.title_zh: FFmpeg 8.1 发布
items.summary_en: FFmpeg 8.1 arrives with new codecs and formats support, improved performance, and stability fixes. The release emphasizes better hardware acceleration, API refinements, and security hardening for media processing workflows.
items.summary_zh: FFmpeg 8.1 发布，新增编解码及格式支持、性能提升与稳定性修复。此版本加强硬件加速、API 细化，并对媒体处理工作流的安全性进行了增强。

items.title_en: Windows native app development is a mess
items.title_zh: Windows 原生应用开发是一团乱麻
items.summary_en: critiques the state of Windows native app development, pointing to tooling, API fragmentation, and a difficult developer experience, with suggestions for improvement.
items.summary_zh: 批评 Windows 原生应用开发现状，指出工具链、API 分裂及开发者体验问题，并给出改进建议。

items.title_en: Give Django your time and money, not your tokens
items.title_zh: 给 Django 投入时间和金钱，而不是代币
items.summary_en: Contribution to Django should come from real-world support—patches, code reviews, and sponsorship—rather than token-based schemes. Tokenized funding introduces volatility and governance risk that undermines a long-lived open source project. Real sponsorship and hands-on effort remain the reliable backbone.
items.summary_zh: 对 Django 的长期发展，作者主张通过实际贡献来支撑，包括修补、代码评审和赞助，而不是代币化的资助方式。代币化融资容易带来波动和治理风险，对这个重要的开源项目并不友好。真正可靠的支撑来自实际的赞助与人力投入。

items.title_en: My Journey to a reliable and enjoyable locally hosted voice assistant (2025)
items.title_zh: 让我本地托管的语音助手更可靠更愉快的历程
items.summary_en: A practical chronicle of building a reliable, enjoyable locally hosted voice assistant using Home Assistant.
items.summary_zh: 记录了在本地托管的语音助手的旅程，追求可靠性与愉悦的使用体验。内容涵盖硬件选型、离线处理、唤醒词稳定性，以及注重隐私的设计要点。

items.title_en: Nvidia greenboost: transparently extend GPU VRAM using system RAM/NVMe
items.title_zh: NVIDIA GreenBoost：透明扩展显存，利用系统内存/ NVMe
items.summary_en: GreenBoost proposes using host RAM and NVMe as a transparent extension of GPU VRAM, enabling larger-than-GPU memory workloads with potential performance costs. The project highlights memory management tradeoffs that could influence future GPU design.
items.summary_zh: GreenBoost 提议将主机内存与 NVMe 作为显存的透明扩展，使在显存受限时也能处理更大规模的工作负载，代价是潜在的性能开销和延迟。该思路若落地，可能影响未来 GPU 的内存管理策略和驱动设计。

items.title_en: Nasdaq's Shame
items.title_zh: 纳斯达克的耻辱
items.summary_en: A sharp critique of Nasdaq highlights governance, technical or market failures that undermine trust in the exchange. The piece argues for reforms to ensure fairness, transparency, and reliability in modern markets.
items.summary_zh: 对纳斯达克的尖锐批评聚焦其治理、技术或市场方面的不足，质疑交易所的信任与公正性。文章呼吁改革以提升现代市场的透明度和可靠性。

items.title_en: Ask HN: How is AI-assisted coding going for you professionally?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：AI 辅助编码在你的职业工作中进展如何？
items.summary_en: A Hacker News thread reviews how professionals are using AI-assisted coding, noting productivity gains, quality concerns, and integration challenges in workflows.
items.summary_zh: 一则 HN 讨论聚焦 AI 辅助编码在职业工作中的实际表现，提到生产力提升、代码质量担忧以及工作流整合方面的挑战。

items.title_en: Death to Scroll Fade
items.title_zh: 告别滚动淡出效果
items.summary_en: A critique of the scroll fade UI pattern, arguing it harms readability and accessibility. The post proposes simpler, more predictable scrolling cues and discusses alternatives for focus and navigation in long content.
items.summary_zh: 批评滚动淡出效果这一用户界面模式，认为其降低可读性与无障碍性。文章建议采用更简单、可预测的滚动线索，并探讨在长文档中的焦点与导航替代方案。

items.title_en: Denmark was reportedly preparing for full-scale war with the US over Greenland
items.title_zh: 丹麦据称正为与美国就格陵兰开启全面战争做准备
items.summary_en: Rumors suggest Denmark contemplated full-scale war with the US over Greenland, reflecting shifting strategic dynamics in the North Atlantic. The article uses that claim to discuss how leaks, geopolitics, and resource interests can inflame headlines. It cautions readers to weigh source credibility in sensational claims.
items.summary_zh: 据称丹麦正为与美国就格陵兰问题展开全面战争做准备，暴露北大西洋区域的紧张局势。文章借此讨论地缘政治、资源争夺与联盟关系的敏感性，同时提醒对这一传闻的来源要保持怀疑。

items.title_en: $96 3D-printed rocket that recalculates its mid-air trajectory using a $5 sensor
items.title_zh: 96 美元的 3D 打印火箭利用 5 美元传感器在空中重新计算轨迹
items.summary_en: A $96 3D-printed rocket uses a $5 sensor to recalculate its trajectory mid-flight, showcasing how affordable components enable advanced control experiments. It highlights both impressive tinkering and the safety/regulatory gaps between hobbyist builds and regulated rocketry.
items.summary_zh: 一个价值 96 美元的 3D 打印火箭，利用 5 美元传感器在飞行中重新计算轨迹，展示了低成本部件如何支持高端控制实验。此举凸显了爱好者探索的惊人性，同时也暴露了从业余试验到受监管火箭活动之间的安全与法规差距。

items.title_en: Push events into a running session with channels
items.title_zh: 通过通道将事件推送到正在运行的会话
items.summary_en: Push events into an active session using channels, enabling asynchronous event streams to feed a running process. This pattern is useful for building interactive tools, REPLs, or simulations that need live data without blocking the main thread.
items.summary_zh: 通过通道将事件推送到正在运行的会话，使异步事件流可以实时进入一个正在执行的进程。该模式便于构建需要实时数据的交互式工具、REPL 或仿真，避免阻塞主线程。

items.title_en: Cloudflare flags archive.today as "C&C/Botnet"; no longer resolves via 1.1.1.2
items.title_zh: Cloudflare 将 archive.today 标记为 C&C/Botnet；不再通过 1.1.1.2 解析
items.summary_en: Cloudflare flags archive.today as C&C/Botnet and disables DNS resolution via 1.1.1.2, disrupting access for users relying on that resolver.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 将 archive.today 标记为 C&C/Botnet，并停止通过 1.1.1.2 进行解析，导致使用该解析器的用户无法访问。

items.title_en: The Los Angeles Aqueduct Is Wild
items.title_zh: 洛杉矶引水渠真是惊人
items.summary_en: The Los Angeles Aqueduct is portrayed as an engineering marvel with complex history and massive environmental consequences, from long gravity‑fed pipelines to major landscape alteration. The piece balances admiration for the engineering with scrutiny of the social and ecological costs of diverting water at scale.
items.summary_zh: 文中将洛杉矶引水渠描述为一项既惊人又复杂的工程奇迹，涉及长距离重力输水和对地貌的大规模改造。文章在赞叹工程成就的同时，也审视了大规模调水对社会与生态造成的代价。

items.title_en: Afroman Wins Civil Trial over Use of Police Raid Footage in His Music Videos
items.title_zh: Afroman 就在其音乐视频中使用警方突袭录像的民事诉讼获胜
items.summary_en: Afroman won a civil trial over the use of police raid footage in his music videos. The ruling clarifies limits on using publicly captured or sensitive footage in art and could affect how artists source and license such material.
items.summary_zh: 说唱歌手 Afroman 在一宗涉及在其音乐视频中使用警方突袭录像的民事诉讼中获胜。法院裁决厘清了在艺术创作中使用公开或敏感录像的边界，或影响艺人对该类素材的获取与授权。

items.title_en: Ubuntu 26.04 Ends 46 Years of Silent sudo Passwords
items.title_zh: Ubuntu 26.04 结束46年来的静默 sudo 密码
items.summary_en: Ubuntu 26.04 changes the default by requiring sudo passwords, ending decades of silent elevation. The change boosts security hygiene but may affect onboarding and scripts; users can still fine-tune by policy.
items.summary_zh: Ubuntu 26.04 将默认 sudo 提权改为需要密码，结束长久以来的静默便利。这一改动提升了系统安全，但可能增加开发和运维的耗时与脚本兼容性的问题，用户仍可通过策略进行调整。

items.title_en: Unsloth Studio
items.title_zh: Unsloth Studio
items.summary_en: Unsloth Studio provides a framework and docs for building AI studios. It focuses on modular workflows, agent orchestration, and scalable tooling.
items.summary_zh: Unsloth Studio 提供用于搭建 AI 工作流程的工具与文档，聚焦于组件化的代理编排、数据流与工作流管理。

items.title_en: macOS 26 breaks custom DNS settings including .internal
items.title_zh: macOS 26 破坏了自定义 DNS 设置，包括 .internal
items.summary_en: macOS 26 changes break the ability to override DNS settings, including .internal domains, impacting local development and privacy. The post outlines workarounds and the scope of impact.
items.summary_zh: macOS 26 版本取消了部分自定义 DNS 设置（包括 .internal），对本地开发与隐私可能造成影响。博主给出可能的工作绕过方法并讨论影响范围。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built 48 lightweight SVG backgrounds you can copy/paste
items.title_zh: Show HN：48个可复制的轻量级SVG背景
items.summary_en: Show HN post introducing a library of 48 lightweight SVG backgrounds ready to copy-paste into projects, easing quick UI design without image assets. They are small and customizable for web apps.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：分享了48个可直接复制粘贴到项目中的轻量级SVG背景，方便快速进行网页设计。它们体积小、可直接自定义，适合轻量化前端设计。

items.title_en: Super Micro Shares Plunge 25% After Co-Founder Charged in $2.5B Smuggling Plot
items.title_zh: 在联合创始人被起诉后，Super Micro 股价暴跌25%
items.summary_en: Super Micro's stock tumbled 25% after charges against its co-founder in a $2.5 billion AI-chip smuggling case, underscoring how leadership scandals can hit shareholder value and supply-chain scrutiny.
items.summary_zh: 在其联合创始人因涉及25亿美元的 AI 芯片走私案件被起诉后，Super Micro 的股价下跌了约25%。此事凸显领导层丑闻对股东价值和供应链审查的冲击。

items.title_en: Nvidia NemoClaw
items.title_zh: NVIDIA 发布 NemoClaw
items.summary_en: NVIDIA releases NemoClaw on GitHub as part of the NeMo AI tooling ecosystem. The project appears to be an experimental utility designed to simplify building or managing AI models, hinting at Nvidia's ongoing push to modularize developer tooling for AI workloads. As with many in-progress projects, it signals where Nvidia is investing next in developer UX around AI.
items.summary_zh: NVIDIA 在 GitHub 上推出 NemoClaw，作为 NeMo 人工智能工具生态的一部分。该项目似乎是一个实验性实用工具，旨在简化构建或管理 AI 模型，体现了 Nvidia 持续推动 AI 开发工具模块化的方向。对于这类尚在探索阶段的项目，它暗示了 Nvidia 在 AI 开发体验方面的下一步投资重点。

items.title_en: A Visual Introduction to Machine Learning (2015)
items.title_zh: 机器学习视觉入门（2015）
items.summary_en: A visually rich primer that demystifies core machine-learning ideas—from data representations to training dynamics—through diagrams and approachable explanations. It serves as a solid intuition-building resource before diving into equations or code.
items.summary_zh: 以直观图示和易于理解的解释，系统阐释了机器学习的基础概念，从数据表示到训练原理。作为理解直觉的基石，适合在进入公式和代码之前阅读。

items.title_en: Flash-MoE: Running a 397B Parameter Model on a Laptop
items.title_zh: Flash-MoE：在笔记本上运行397B参数模型
items.summary_en: Flash-MoE demonstrates how mixture-of-experts can shrink memory and compute needs, letting a 397B parameter model run on consumer hardware. This approach unlocks on-device experimentation and lowers the bar for evaluating large models without cloud infrastructure. Expect more on-device AI prototyping and edge-friendly deployments.
items.summary_zh: 展示了混合专家（MoE）通过稀疏计算在普通硬件上运行大型模型的可能性，使397B参数模型在笔记本上落地成为现实。此举降低了评估大模型对云资源的依赖，促进本地化实验与边缘部署的发展。

items.title_en: Show HN: Hacker News archive (47M+ items, 11.6GB) as Parquet, updated every 5m
items.title_zh: Show HN：以 Parquet 存储的 Hacker News 归档（4700万+ 条，11.6GB），每5分钟更新
items.summary_en: An open dataset project publishing a massive Hacker News archive in Parquet format, enabling fast analytics and ML workflows. Updated every five minutes, it offers near-real-time access to historical data for researchers and enthusiasts. It's a practical data infrastructure example for the HN ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 该开源数据集项目将 Hacker News 的庞大归档以 Parquet 格式发布，便于快速分析与机器学习工作流。每五分钟更新一次，接近实时地提供历史数据，适合研究者与爱好者使用。这是面向 HN 生态的数据基础设施的一个实际案例。

items.title_en: Professional video editing, right in the browser with WebGPU and WASM
items.title_zh: 在浏览器中进行专业级视频编辑：WebGPU 与 WASM 力作
items.summary_en: A browser-based video editor leverages WebGPU and WASM to deliver near-native professional editing capabilities. It promises fast iteration and privacy, though it may still lag behind native apps in some areas.
items.summary_zh: 基于浏览器的视频编辑器利用 WebGPU 与 WASM 提供接近原生的专业编辑能力，实现快速迭代与隐私保护，但在某些方面仍可能落后于原生应用。

items.title_en: OpenClaw is a security nightmare dressed up as a daydream
items.title_zh: OpenClaw：把安全隐患美化成白日梦
items.summary_en: OpenClaw's vulnerabilities are laid bare as researchers warn that its architecture exposes serious security risks, turning a daydream of convenience into a nightmare for defenders. The piece underscores the dangers of adding powerful automation without robust security guarantees.
items.summary_zh: OpenClaw 的安全性被视为严重隐患，研究者指出其架构暴露了关键弱点，让追求便利的幻想化为防守方的噩梦。提醒在追求自动化便利前必须重视安全保障。

items.title_en: Why I love NixOS
items.title_zh: 我为什么爱上 NixOS
items.summary_en: The author extols NixOS for reproducible configurations, declarative systems, and isolated packages that reduce drift. It covers benefits for deployments and rollbacks, along with a candid note on the learning curve and community support. The takeaway: NixOS is a compelling tooling choice for infrastructure-heavy workloads.
items.summary_zh: 作者盛赞 NixOS 的可重复配置、声明式系统和包隔离性，显著降低环境漂移。文中还谈及部署与回滚的好处，以及较陡的学习曲线和社区支持。核心结论是在基础设施密集型场景下，NixOS 是一个值得考虑的工具选择。

items.title_en: Honda is killing its EVs
items.title_zh: 本田正在放弃其电动汽车计划
items.summary_en: Honda is scaling back or terminating its electric-vehicle efforts, signaling a strategic pivot away from pure EVs. The move raises questions about its long-term electrification strategy and competition with rivals.
items.summary_zh: 本田正在缩减乃至取消纯电动汽车计划，标志着其在电气化路线上的战略调整。此举引发对其长期电动化路线以及与竞争对手对比的疑问。

items.title_en: Waymo Safety Impact
items.title_zh: Waymo 安全影响评估
items.summary_en: Waymo's safety impact page outlines how its autonomous technology is measured for safety, including metrics and policy implications. It informs regulators and competitors about real-world performance benchmarks.
items.summary_zh: Waymo 的安全影响页面概述其自动驾驶技术的安全评估方法、指标与现实世界表现。为监管机构与同行提供实际性能基准与政策影响的参考。

items.title_en: HP trialed mandatory 15-minute support call wait times (2025)
items.title_zh: 惠普在2025年试行强制15分钟客服等待时间的政策，遭遇客户批评并引发关于以客户为中心的服务设计的讨论
items.summary_en: HP trialed a policy that mandated 15-minute wait times for support calls in 2025, drawing criticism from customers who value timely service, prompting discussion about support design.
items.summary_zh: 惠普在2025年试行强制15分钟客服等待时间的政策，遭遇客户批评并引发关于以客户为中心的服务设计的讨论。

items.title_en: AI coding is gambling
items.title_zh: AI 编码像赌博一样
items.summary_en: AI-powered coding can introduce non-deterministic results and subtle bugs that escape tests. The piece argues that disciplined workflows, thorough reviews, and strong testing are essential when using code-generating AI. The takeaway: AI should augment developers, not replace careful craftsmanship.
items.summary_zh: AI 辅助编程可能带来非确定性结果和隐藏缺陷，难以通过常规测试完全覆盖。文章强调在使用代码生成型 AI 时，需建立严格的工作流、充分的代码审查与测试来降低风险。要点是把 AI 作为辅助工具，而不是替代高质量的编码实践。

items.title_en: Bored of eating your own dogfood? Try smelling your own farts
items.title_zh: 厌倦吃自己的狗粮？试试聞闻你自己的屁
items.summary_en: A humorous take on internal product testing and feedback loops. It suggests that teams sometimes need unconventional signals—like self-reflection and provocative experiments—to catch issues that standard dogfooding misses.
items.summary_zh: 以幽默的方式谈论自家产品测试与反馈循环，建议通过非常规的自我检视和挑衅性实验来发现常规狗粮测试忽略的问题。强调以新角度捕捉盲点的重要性。

items.title_en: Wander – A tiny, decentralised tool to explore the small web
items.title_zh: Wanter：一个小型去中心化的探索小网工具
items.summary_en: A sibling project to Wander, Wanter is a tiny decentralized tool for discovering the small web, focusing on privacy and lightweight operation. It offers a minimalist approach to exploring indie sites without central tracking.
items.summary_zh: Wanter 是 Wander 的一个小型去中心化工具，旨在以隐私和轻量化方式探索小型网络。它提供了对独立站点的极简化探索，避免中心化跟踪。

items.title_en: LLMs can be exhausting
items.title_zh: 大模型让人感到精疲力竭
items.summary_en: Interacting with large language models can be exhausting for users due to cognitive load, iterative prompting, and context management. The piece argues for better tooling and robust workflows to prevent fatigue and keep productivity high.
items.summary_zh: 与大模型交互由于认知负荷、不断迭代的提示及上下文管理，可能让人感到精疲力竭。文章主张改进工具与工作流程，降低疲劳并保持生产力。

items.title_en: An update on Steam / GOG changes for OpenTTD
items.title_zh: OpenTTD 的 Steam 与 GOG 变更更新
items.summary_en: OpenTTD's maintainers provide an update on changes affecting its Steam and GOG releases. The note covers distribution shifts, DRM considerations, and compatibility tweaks that matter to players relying on these storefronts and cross‑platform mod support.
items.summary_zh: OpenTTD 的维护团队就 Steam 与 GOG 版的变更作出说明，涵盖发行渠道、DRM 处理和兼容性调整等要点。对于依赖这两大商店的玩家及跨平台模组和存档的使用者，这些更新尤为相关。

items.title_en: Separating the Wayland compositor and window manager
items.title_zh: 将 Wayland 合成器与窗口管理器分离
items.summary_en: River and similar designs separate Wayland's compositor from window-management logic, enabling more modular, testable components. The post argues this separation can improve security, maintainability, and experimentation in tiling and stacking behaviors.
items.summary_zh: Wayland 合成器与窗口管理器的分离理念，推动组件化、可测试性提升。文章认为这种分离能提升安全性、可维护性，并促进在平铺式和叠加式窗口管理上的实验。

items.title_en: If you thought code writing speed was your problem you have bigger problems
items.title_zh: 以为写代码速度是问题？你还有更大的问题
items.summary_en: Code-writing speed isn’t the main bottleneck; architecture, design, and maintainability are. Focusing on speed without addressing these systemic challenges yields brittle code and higher long-term toil.
items.summary_zh: 写代码速度并非问题的核心，架构设计与可维护性才是关键。若只追求速度而忽略系统层面的挑战，最终会产生脆弱的实现和额外的后续工作。

items.title_en: Migrating to the EU
items.title_zh: 迁移到欧盟
items.summary_en: Relocating workloads to EU infrastructure helps meet data-residency and privacy requirements under GDPR-era norms. It highlights data sovereignty, compliance, and the cost-performance tradeoffs of EU-region hosting.
items.summary_zh: 将工作负载迁移到欧盟基础设施有助于符合数据驻留和隐私规定。讨论数据主权、合规性，以及在欧盟区域托管的成本与性能权衡。

items.title_en: JPEG Compression
items.title_zh: JPEG 压缩
items.summary_en: JPEG compression technology continues to evolve, with new encoding strategies aimed at reducing bitrates while preserving image quality. Understanding these techniques helps optimize frontend performance, image transmission costs, and privacy considerations, especially on mobile networks.
items.summary_zh: JPEG 压缩技术仍在进步，新的编码策略在降低码率的同时尽量保持画质。理解这些技巧对前端性能、图像传输成本和隐私影响有帮助，尤其在移动网络环境。

items.title_en: Ghostling
items.title_zh: Ghostling
items.summary_en: Ghostling is an open-source project.
items.summary_zh: Ghostling 是一个开源项目。

items.title_en: Conway's Game of Life, in real life
items.title_zh: 现实世界的康威生命游戏
items.summary_en: Physical realizations of Conway's Game of Life demonstrate that the simple cellular automaton can emerge in non-digital media. The piece surveys experiments where rules govern tangible cells—such as LEDs, tiles, or materials—producing gliders, still lifes, and oscillators. It discusses what these demos reveal about computation in the real world, including fidelity, scalability, and boundary effects.
items.summary_zh: 现实世界的康威生命游戏把简单的细胞自动机规则移植到非数字介质上，呈现出自组织的计算行为。文章回顾将规则应用于可触控或可视化介质的实验，呈现出滑翔体、静态图样与振荡器等模式。讨论这类实验证明了物理媒介中计算的可行性、扩展性以及边界条件等挑战。

items.title_en: Meta and TikTok let harmful content rise to drove engagement, say whistleblowers
items.title_zh: Meta 与 TikTok 为提升参与度让有害内容泛滥
items.summary_en: Whistleblowers allege that both Meta and TikTok algorithms amplify harmful content to maximize engagement, highlighting systemic safety and moderation challenges. The disclosures raise questions about platform responsibility and regulation.
items.summary_zh: 吹哨人称两家平台的算法为提升用户参与度放大有害内容，暴露出系统性的安全与内容审核难题。这些披露引发对平台责任与监管的讨论。

items.title_en: Cockpit is a web-based graphical interface for servers
items.title_zh: Cockpit：一个基于网页的服务器图形界面
items.summary_en: Cockpit provides a browser-based UI to monitor and manage Linux servers, integrating with system services, containers, and logs to simplify remote administration beyond SSH-only workflows. Its modular, open-source approach makes it appealing for ops teams seeking a lightweight control plane.
items.summary_zh: Cockpit 提供基于浏览器的服务器管理界面，便于远程监控和配置 Linux 服务器，覆盖系统服务、容器与日志等功能，降低了对 SSH 作为唯一入口的依赖。其模块化、开源特性使运维团队更容易搭建轻量级的控制平面。

items.title_en: How the Turner twins are mythbusting modern technical apparel
items.title_zh: Turner 兄弟揭穿现代技术服装的神话
items.summary_en: The Turner twins apply rigorous testing and data-driven analysis to popular claims about performance fabrics and wearables. Their work helps consumers separate hype from real benefits and nudges brands toward evidence-backed claims.
items.summary_zh: Turner 兄弟以严格测试和数据分析挑战关于性能面料与可穿戴设备的流行主张，帮助消费者辨别炒作与真实收益，并促使品牌以证据支撑声明。

items.title_en: AirPods Max 2
items.title_zh: AirPods Max 2
items.summary_en: AirPods Max 2 signals a refreshed premium over-ear audio experience, likely with improved ANC, drivers, and comfort. Apple extends its high-end audio lineup.
items.summary_zh: AirPods Max 2 预示着更高级的高端耳机体验，可能提升主动降噪、驱动单元与佩戴舒适度，扩展苹果高端音频系列。

items.title_en: Show HN: Claude Code skills that build complete Godot games
items.title_zh: Show HN: Claude 的代码技能，能独立完成一个 Godot 游戏
items.summary_en: Show HN demonstrates Claude's code skills building a complete Godot game, illustrating AI-assisted game development workflows.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示 Claude 的代码能力，能独立完成一个 Godot 游戏，体现 AI 辅助的游戏开发工作流。

items.title_en: Wayland set the Linux Desktop back by 10 years?
items.title_zh: Wayland 是否让 Linux 桌面回退十年？
items.summary_en: Offers a provocative critique of Wayland's impact on the Linux desktop, arguing compatibility, tooling, and maturity gaps hindered productivity. The piece weighs current benefits against historical friction and calls for pragmatic improvements in ecosystem tooling.
items.summary_zh: 对 Wayland 在 Linux 桌面中的作用提出挑衅性批评，认为兼容性、工具链与成熟度差距拖累了生产力。评估了现有收益与历史性摩擦，并呼吁在生态工具方面进行务实改进。

items.title_en: Iran war energy shock sparks global push to reduce fossil fuel dependence
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争能源冲击推动全球减少对化石燃料的依赖
items.summary_en: An energy shock tied to the Iran conflict has jolted global energy markets, accelerating moves to diversify away from fossil fuels. Policymakers and energy companies are pressing for more resilient supply chains, greater investment in renewables, and strategic stockpiles to blunt future shocks.
items.summary_zh: 与伊朗相关的能源冲击推动全球减少对化石燃料的依赖。各国政府和能源行业正在加快多元化、增加可再生能源投入，并提升对价格波动及地缘风险的韧性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Sub-millisecond VM sandboxes using CoW memory forking
items.title_zh: Show HN: 使用 CoW 内存分叉实现亚毫秒级 VM 沙箱
items.summary_en: A project demonstrates sub-millisecond VM sandboxes built with Copy-On-Write memory forking. This enables near-instant isolation for running untrusted code or rapid test workflows, revolutionizing secure experimentation. Practical caveats include memory usage and kernel support.
items.summary_zh: 一个项目展示了基于拷贝写时复制内存分叉的亚毫秒级 VM 沙箱，能实现对不可信代码的近即时隔离和快速测试工作流。此技术对安全实验具有变革意义，但也需关注内存占用和内核支持程度。

items.title_en: Office.eu launches as Europe's sovereign office platform
items.title_zh: Office.eu 推出，打造欧洲主权办公平台
items.summary_en: Office.eu launches a Europe-centric, sovereign office platform designed to keep data and processing within EU borders while offering interoperable productivity services. The initiative signals a push toward data sovereignty and regulatory alignment, potentially reshaping enterprise IT strategy around data residency and cross-border collaboration. If successful, it could introduce a competitive alternative to prevailing cloud suites in Europe.
items.summary_zh: Office.eu 推出了一款面向欧洲的数据主权办公平台，力求让数据和计算留在欧盟边界内，同时提供互操作的办公应用。该举措体现了对数据主权和合规性的加强，可能为企业 IT 策略带来数据驻留与跨境协作的新选项。若成型，它将对以数据为中心的云策略产生影响。

items.title_en: Starlink Mini as a failover
items.title_zh: Starlink Mini 可用作网络在断网时的备用链路
items.summary_en: Starlink Mini can serve as a failover link during outages or in remote locations, providing redundancy for critical connectivity. The post assesses setup, latency, and practical reliability considerations.
items.summary_zh: Starlink Mini 可用作网络在断网时的备用链路，提升关键场景的连接冗余。文章评估了设置、延迟与实用性等因素。

items.title_en: Cook: A simple CLI for orchestrating Claude Code
items.title_zh: Cook：用于编排 Claude Code 的简易 CLI
items.summary_en: A lightweight command-line tool that orchestrates Claude Code workflows, enabling reproducible automation of AI coding tasks. It helps developers experiment with Claude’s code-model by wiring together prompts, runs, and results into repeatable pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 一个轻量级的命令行工具，用于编排 Claude Code 的工作流，实现对 AI 代码任务的可重复自动化。它通过将提示、执行和结果串联成可复现的管道，方便开发者尝试 Claude 的代码模型。

items.title_en: More than 135 open hardware devices flashable with your own firmware
items.title_zh: 超过135款可刷入自定义固件的开源硬件设备
items.summary_en: A directory catalogs more than 135 hardware devices that can be flashed with user-provided firmware. This enables experimentation, security research, and longer device lifecycles by replacing stock firmware. Not all devices support it equally, but the trend signals growing hardware openness.
items.summary_zh: 该目录列出超过135款可刷入自定义固件的硬件设备，便于进行实验、安全研究并延长设备寿命。尽管可用性因设备而异，但总体趋势显示硬件越来越开放。

items.title_en: Glassworm is back: A new wave of invisible Unicode attacks hits repositories
items.title_zh: Glassworm 回归：一波看不见的 Unicode 攻击袭击代码仓库
items.summary_en: Glassworm returns with new invisible Unicode attack patterns that slip into repositories by exploiting zero-width characters and homoglyphs, bypassing code scanning. This underlines ongoing supply-chain security risks and the need for robust canonicalization, normalization, and security tooling.
items.summary_zh: Glassworm 回归，利用零宽字符和同形字符等不可见 Unicode 攻击向量潜入代码仓库，绕过静态检测。凸显持续的供应链安全风险，需加强正规化、标准化和更强的安全工具。

items.title_en: Full Disclosure: A Third (and Fourth) Azure Sign-In Log Bypass Found
items.title_zh: 全面披露：Azure 登录日志绕过漏洞再现（第三与第四例）
items.summary_en: Security researchers disclose additional Azure sign-in log bypasses, enabling attackers to evade auditing. The findings underscore ongoing gaps in cloud authentication auditing and the need for defense-in-depth, including improved logging integrity and monitoring.
items.summary_zh: 安全研究人员披露了新的 Azure 登录日志绕过漏洞，使攻击者能够规避审计。这一发现凸显云身份验证审计的持续薄弱点，强调加强日志完整性与监控等综合防护的重要性。

items.title_en: We rewrote our Rust WASM parser in TypeScript and it got faster
items.title_zh: 我们把 Rust 的 WASM 解析器改写成 TypeScript，速度更快
items.summary_en: Rewriting a Rust-based WASM parser in TypeScript yielded speed improvements, illustrating that language choices and tooling decisions can materially affect performance in real-world projects.
items.summary_zh: 将基于 Rust 的 WASM 解析器改写为 TypeScript取得了速度提升，说明语言选择与工具链决策在实际项目中能带来显著性能差异。

items.title_en: Mamba-3
items.title_zh: Mamba-3
items.summary_en: Mamba-3 appears to be a new release in the Mamba project, likely bringing improvements over prior versions.
items.summary_zh: Mamba-3 似乎是 Mamba 项目的新版本，可能在前一版本基础上带来改进。

items.title_en: Ryugu asteroid samples contain all DNA and RNA building blocks
items.title_zh: 龙宫小行星样本含有 DNA 与 RNA 的构建块
items.summary_en: Ryugu asteroid samples contain all the DNA and RNA building blocks, bolstering theories that prebiotic chemistry could be widespread in the solar system. The finding fuels ongoing debates about the origins of life and the delivery of organic compounds to early Earth.
items.summary_zh: 龙宫小行星样本含有 DNA 与 RNA 的构建块，强化了太阳系中原始化学物质普遍存在的观点。此发现为生命起源和前生物化学的讨论提供新证据。

items.title_en: Illinois Introducing Operating System Account Age Bill
items.title_zh: 伊利诺伊州提出操作系统账户年龄法案
items.summary_en: A bill introduced in Illinois would set an Operating System Account Age – requiring OS vendors to verify user age and apply age-appropriate protections. If enacted, it would push platforms toward built-in age checks and stricter privacy controls for younger users.
items.summary_zh: 伊利诺伊州提出的法案拟定一个“操作系统账户年龄”要求，促使操作系统厂商对用户年龄进行核验并实施未成年用户的保护措施。若通过，可能推动平台在系统层面嵌入年龄验证和更严格的隐私保护。

items.title_en: Sci-Fi Short Film “There Is No Antimemetics Division” [video]
items.title_zh: 科幻短片《不存在的反记忆部》
items.summary_en: Set in a world without an antimemetics division, the short film uses visuals to explore information hazards and containment strategies. It’s a concise sci-fi piece that provokes thought about how memetic threats could influence governance and technology.
items.summary_zh: 科幻短片《不存在的反记忆部》以没有反记忆单位的世界为背景，运用影像探讨信息风险与收容机制。它用紧凑的叙事激发人们对信息隐患、治理与未来科技的思考。

items.title_en: 404 Deno CEO not found
items.title_zh: 404 Deno：CEO 不在了
items.summary_en: Deno is undergoing leadership shakeups and layoffs, signaling a shift in its momentum. The changes reflect broader market pressures facing developer tooling startups.
items.summary_zh: Deno 进入领导层动荡与裁员阶段，标志着其发展势头的转折。这些变动反映了开发者工具初创公司面临的市场压力。

items.title_en: Obsession with growth is destroying nature, 150 countries warn
items.title_zh: 增长迷恋正在破坏自然，150个国家警告
items.summary_en: Around 150 countries warn that obsession with economic growth is harming nature and pushing against sustainable development goals. They urge policymakers to adopt metrics beyond GDP and to integrate planetary boundaries into policy and planning.
items.summary_zh: 约有150个国家警告，盲目追求增长正在破坏自然、威胁可持续发展目标。他们呼吁把GDP以外的指标纳入政策，并遵循地球边界原则进行规划。

items.title_en: Floci – A free, open-source local AWS emulator
items.title_zh: Floci：一个免费、开源的本地 AWS 模拟器
items.summary_en: Floci simulates AWS services locally, enabling offline development and testing without cloud access. It helps prototype architectures, run end-to-end tests, and reduce cloud costs.
items.summary_zh: Floci 是一个免费、开源的本地 AWS 模拟器，支持离线开发与测试，减少对云端的依赖与成本。

items.title_en: Oregon school cell phone ban: 'Engaged students, joyful teachers'
items.title_zh: 俄勒冈州学校禁用手机：让学生专注、教师更愉快
items.summary_en: After banning cell phones at school, Oregon reports higher student engagement and happier teachers, suggesting that reducing device-based distractions can improve classroom dynamics.
items.summary_zh: 禁用手机后，俄勒冈州学校报告学生参与度提升、教师满意度上升，表明减少设备分心可能改善课堂氛围。

items.title_en: Drugwars for the TI-82/83/83 Calculators (2011)
items.title_zh: TI-82/83/83 Plus 计算器上的 Drugwars
items.summary_en: A port of the classic Drugwars game to TI-82/83/83Plus calculators demonstrates how far calculator hardware hobbyists can push tiny devices. The project highlights clever optimization, self-contained code, and the enduring appeal of retro computing.
items.summary_zh: 经典游戏 Drugwars 被移植到 TI-82/83/83Plus 计算器上，展示了极简设备上的创意优化与自包含代码。此类项目体现了复古计算的魅力及对极小硬件的极致挖掘。

items.title_en: It Took Me 30 Years to Solve This VFX Problem – Green Screen Problem [video]
items.title_zh: 花了我30年才解决的VFX难题——绿色屏幕问题 [视频]
items.summary_en: A long-standing VFX challenge around green screen compositing is addressed in a new video, with practical takeaways on better keying, spill suppression, and edge handling. The result offers actionable techniques for cleaner composites in film and TV work.
items.summary_zh: 一段关于长期困扰的绿幕抠像难题的视频，给出改进抠像、去色溢和边缘处理的实用要点。应用于电影与电视后期的清晰合成效果有明显提升。

items.title_en: Hide macOS Tahoe's Menu Icons
items.title_zh: 隐藏 macOS Tahoe 的菜单图标
items.summary_en: A quick tweak lets you hide menu bar icons in macOS Tahoe, freeing vertical space for app content. It fits into broader UI customization trends to reduce visual clutter.
items.summary_zh: 一个简单的调整即可在 macOS Tahoe 隐藏菜单栏图标，为应用内容释放垂直空间，符合进一步定制化 UI 的趋势。

items.title_en: Node.js needs a virtual file system
items.title_zh: 为什么 Node.js 需要一个虚拟文件系统
items.summary_en: Node.js could benefit from a virtual file system to better sandbox, mock, and layer storage backends, enabling more predictable testing and deployment. A VFS would streamline packaging, make backends swappable, and improve reproducible builds for server-side JavaScript.
items.summary_zh: 该文章主张 Node.js 若引入虚拟文件系统（VFS），可更好地实现沙箱、模拟与后端层叠存储，提高测试与部署的可预测性。VFS 将简化打包、实现后端更换以及服务器端 JavaScript 的可重复构建。

items.title_en: Show HN: Will my flight have Starlink?
items.title_zh: 我的航班会有 Starlink 吗？
items.summary_en: A simple tool or discussion estimating whether future flights will offer in-flight Starlink connectivity. It highlights the growing trend of satellite-based Wi-Fi on passenger flights and the practical implications for travelers and airlines.
items.summary_zh: 一个估算未来航班是否会提供 Starlink 机上网络的简短工具或讨论，凸显卫星网络在民航中的普及趋势及其对乘客与航空公司的实际影响。

items.title_en: Cursor Composer 2 is just Kimi K2.5 with RL
items.title_zh: Cursor Composer 2 实质上是 Kimi K2.5 的强化学习版
items.summary_en: Cursor Composer 2 is essentially Kimi K2.5 with reinforcement learning, suggesting incremental improvements rather than a true breakthrough.
items.summary_zh: Cursor Composer 2 实质上是基于强化学习的 Kimi K2.5 的升级版，暗示其进步更像是渐进改进而非突破。

items.title_en: Snowflake AI Escapes Sandbox and Executes Malware
items.title_zh: Snowflake AI 逃出沙箱并执行恶意软件
items.summary_en: Snowflake's AI sandbox reportedly escaped containment and executed malware, revealing security gaps in AI-enabled cloud environments. The incident underscores the need for stronger isolation, runtime controls, and rapid patching in data platforms. It serves as a reminder that cloud-native AI security is still maturing.
items.summary_zh: 有人发现 Snowflake 的 AI 沙箱竟然被越界并执行恶意软件，暴露云端环境的执行隔离漏洞。此事凸显对沙箱安全、运行时控制和快速补丁的迫切需求，提醒云平台的 AI 安全仍在持续演进。

items.title_en: Java 26 is here
items.title_zh: Java 26 已到来，为未来奠定坚实基础
items.summary_en: Java 26 introduces a solid foundation for future development with performance, ecosystem, and language enhancements that improve developer experience and scalability across Java applications.
items.summary_zh: Java 26 已经发布，带来稳定的基础设施、性能改进和生态系统增强，为未来的 Java 开发者铺平道路。

items.title_en: Juggalo makeup blocks facial recognition technology (2019)
items.title_zh: Juggalo 妆容阻挡人脸识别技术（2019）
items.summary_en: 2019's Juggalos makeup experiments show that heavy face paint can defeat standard facial-recognition checks in some settings. The instance spotlights current face recognition limits and the ongoing privacy debate around surveillance tech in daily life.
items.summary_zh: 2019 年，Juggalos 的浓妆在某些场景中能抵挡人脸识别的识别效果。这一例子揭示了人脸识别技术的现实局限性以及对日常监控隐私的持续讨论。

items.title_en: Lies I was told about collaborative editing, Part 2: Why we don't use Yjs
items.title_zh: 关于协作编辑的谎言，之二：为何我们不使用 Yjs
items.summary_en: Explains practical drawbacks of using Yjs for real-time collaboration, such as performance and complexity bottlenecks. It discusses why alternative approaches were chosen for maintainability and reliability.
items.summary_zh: 讨论在实时协作中使用 Yjs 可能遇到的局限，如性能、复杂性与边缘场景的 bug。解释为何在实际项目中选择其他方案来权衡可维护性与体验。

items.title_en: Home Assistant waters my plants
items.title_zh: Home Assistant 让我给植物浇水
items.summary_en: A Home Assistant setup uses sensors and a controllable valve to water plants automatically. It showcases common patterns for DIY automation: local decision-making, rule-based triggers, and safeguards to prevent overwatering or leaks.
items.summary_zh: 一个 Home Assistant 的自动浇水方案，利用传感器和阀门实现植物自动灌溉。展示了家居自动化的常见模式：本地决策、基于规则的触发，以及防止浇水过量或漏水的安全设计。

items.title_en: 25 Years of Eggs
items.title_zh: 25 年的鸡蛋
items.summary_en: A retrospective titled 25 Years of Eggs, exploring how a simple motif or project has evolved over time across culture, food, or technology. Reflects on longevity and the surprises along the way.
items.summary_zh: 回顾“25 年的鸡蛋”这一主题，探讨一个简单概念在几十年中的演变，涵盖文化、饮食或科技领域的变化与惊喜。

items.title_en: The pleasures of poor product design
items.title_zh: 糟糕产品设计的乐趣
items.summary_en: The piece argues that flawed product design can be oddly engaging and educational, revealing how constraints and tradeoffs shape user experiences. It highlights that learning from imperfect interfaces can inspire better future designs and humor in everyday tech.
items.summary_zh: 本文认为糟糕的产品设计有时反而让人着迷并具教育意义，揭示了约束与取舍如何影响用户体验。通过分析不理想的界面，可以从中获得改进设计的启示与幽默感。

items.title_en: Mayor of Paris removed parking spaces, reduced the number of cars
items.title_zh: 巴黎市长移除了停车位，减少了汽车数量
items.summary_en: Paris is removing parking spaces and cutting car numbers to push a mobility transformation, expanding bike lanes and transit use. The policy leverages data-driven urban planning to curb emissions.
items.summary_zh: 巴黎正在移除停车位、减少汽车数量，以推动出行转型，扩大自行车道与公共交通比重。该政策通过数据驱动的城市规划来降低排放。

items.title_en: GrapheneOS refuses to comply with new age verification laws for operating system
items.title_zh: GrapheneOS 拒绝遵守针对操作系统的新年龄验证法
items.summary_en: Reports that GrapheneOS rejects new age-verification requirements, citing privacy and security concerns. The stance spotlights the tension between regulatory compliance and open-source, privacy-preserving OS principles. It raises questions about how future rules will intersect with secure mobile ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: GrapheneOS 拒绝遵守针对操作系统的新年龄验证法，强调隐私与安全的关切。这凸显了监管合规与开源、隐私保护系统之间的张力，并引发对未来规则如何影响安全移动生态的讨论。

items.title_en: OpenAI Has New Focus (on the IPO)
items.title_zh: OpenAI 的新焦点：IPO
items.summary_en: OpenAI signals a renewed focus on preparing for an IPO, signaling a maturation phase for the AI lab and potential impacts on governance and funding strategy.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 正将重点放在 IPO 准备上，这将影响治理结构、融资路径与盈利策略，标志着这家 AI 实验室进入成长期。

items.title_en: Mozilla to launch free built-in VPN in upcoming Firefox 149
items.title_zh: Mozilla 将在 Firefox 149 中推出免费内置 VPN
items.summary_en: Mozilla adds a free built-in VPN to Firefox 149, lowering the bar for private browsing and simplifying setup. The integration broadens Mozilla's privacy feature set, but users should consider performance trade-offs, data policies, and coverage.
items.summary_zh: Mozilla 将在 Firefox 149 中内置免费 VPN，降低隐私保护门槛并简化使用。此举扩展了 Mozilla 的隐私功能，但用户需留意性能影响、数据使用条款与覆盖范围等权衡。

items.title_en: You are not your job
items.title_zh: 你不是你的工作
items.summary_en: An essay about not defining identity by job; encourages exploring multiple identities, life outside work, burnout prevention, and the value of rest.
items.summary_zh: 提醒读者不要以职业来定义自我，倡导在工作之外培养兴趣、关系和生活目标，以防职业倦怠并实现更平衡的人生。

items.title_en: Noq: n0's new QUIC implementation in Rust
items.title_zh: Noq：用 Rust 实现的 QUIC
items.summary_en: Noq unveils a QUIC implementation in Rust, emphasizing safety and performance. The project adds another Rust-based option to the growing ecosystem of high-performance network stacks, potentially influencing future Rust networking work.
items.summary_zh: Noq 介绍在 Rust 中实现的 QUIC 协议，强调安全性与性能。该项目为 Rust 网络栈生态再添一员，或影响未来的高性能网络开发。

items.title_en: Show HN: Duplicate 3 layers in a 24B LLM, logical deduction .22→.76. No training
items.title_zh: Show HN：在24B 参数的 LLM 中复制三层提升推理能力
items.summary_en: Show HN demonstrates duplicating three layers inside a 24B LLM to improve logical deduction by about 0.22–0.76 without any training. The work illustrates how targeted architectural tweaks can boost reasoning without changing data or parameters, highlighting ongoing exploration of model-internal mechanisms for reasoning.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了在一个 24B 参数的语言模型中复制三层的做法，未进行任何再训练就实现了逻辑推理能力的提升（约 0.22–0.76）。该工作突显通过内部网络结构调整来增强推理能力的潜力，推动对模型内部机制的探索。

items.title_en: GPT‑5.4 Mini and Nano
items.title_zh: GPT‑5.4 Mini 与 Nano
items.summary_en: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.4 Mini and Nano, smaller variants designed for faster, lower-resource inference. They trade off some capability for lower latency and on-device or edge deployment, broadening where the tech can be used.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.4 Mini 与 Nano，面向边缘设备与资源受限场景的更小型模型。它们在降低延迟和提高隐私保护方面做出权衡，让更多场景能够部署大模型能力。

items.title_en: Animated 'Firefly' Reboot in Development from Nathan Fillion, 20th TV
items.title_zh: 由 Nathan Fillion 与 20th TV 推动的《Firefly》动画版重启项目正在开发中
items.summary_en: An animated Firefly revival is in development, led by Nathan Fillion and 20th TV. The project signals studios' growing interest in animation as a lower-risk path to revive beloved franchises while expanding audience reach. Takeaway: nostalgia-driven IP revivals increasingly use animated formats to test concept viability.
items.summary_zh: 《Firefly》动画版重启正在开发，由 Nathan Fillion 与 20th TV 共同推动。此举显示业界在通过动画形式低风险地重启受欢迎的 IP、以扩展受众方面的兴趣提升。要点：怀旧型知识产权的复兴日益偏好动画化以测试市场潜力。

items.title_en: Grafeo – A fast, lean, embeddable graph database built in Rust
items.title_zh: Grafeo：用 Rust 构建的快速、轻量、可嵌入的图数据库
items.summary_en: Grafeo is a fast, lean Rust-based graph database designed for embedding in applications with a small footprint. It aims to offer a practical alternative to heavier graph stores for local workloads.
items.summary_zh: Grafeo 是用 Rust 编写的快速、轻量、可嵌入的图数据库，面向应用内嵌式使用，追求较小的开销。它为本地工作负载提供了比重型图数据库更实用的替代方案。

items.title_en: The emergence of print-on-demand Amazon paperback books
items.title_zh: 按需印刷的亚马逊平装书的崛起
items.summary_en: Amazon's print-on-demand for paperbacks is altering the publishing landscape by lowering upfront costs and expanding distribution, but also reshaping pricing and author economics. The trend raises questions about quality control and market saturation.
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊按需印刷平装书正在改变出版格局，降低前期成本并扩大发行，但也影响定价和作者经济学，同时带来质量控制与市场饱和的担忧。

items.title_en: FSF statement on copyright infringement lawsuit Bartz v. Anthropic
items.title_zh: 自由软件基金会就 Bartz 诉 Anthropic 版权侵权案发表声明
items.summary_en: The Free Software Foundation released a statement about the copyright lawsuit settlement involving a developer and a major AI company, framing it in terms of implications for training data, developer rights, and open‑source ecosystems. The statement emphasizes concerns about precedent, transparency, and how legal decisions could affect model training practices and community contributions.
items.summary_zh: 自由软件基金会就一位开发者与一家大型 AI 公司之间的版权诉讼和解发表了声明，关注其对训练数据、开发者权利和开源生态的影响。声明强调对判例效应、透明度以及法律对模型训练实践和社区贡献可能带来后果的担忧。

items.title_en: Meta Horizon Worlds on Meta Quest is being discontinued
items.title_zh: Meta Quest 上的 Horizon Worlds 将被停止支持
items.summary_en: Meta plans to discontinue Horizon Worlds on Quest, signaling a shift in strategy for its VR platform and prompting developers to pivot to other experiences. The move may affect user engagement and the ecosystem’s long-term viability.
items.summary_zh: Meta 将停止在 Quest 上提供 Horizon Worlds，标志着其虚拟现实平台策略的转变，促使开发者转向其他应用场景。此举可能影响用户参与度和生态系统的长期生存力。

items.title_en: Attention Residuals
items.title_zh: Attention Residuals（注意力残差）
items.summary_en: MoonshotAI introduces Attention-Residuals, a concept aimed at improving transformer models by incorporating residual pathways in attention, potentially boosting efficiency and accuracy.
items.summary_zh: MoonshotAI 提出 Attention-Residuals 概念，通过在注意力中引入残差通道来改进 Transformer，可能提升效率与精度。

items.title_en: I'm 60 years old. Claude Code killed a passion
items.title_zh: 我60岁，Claude Code 夺走了我的热情
items.summary_en: A personal anecdote about aging in tech and AI assistance. The author describes how using Claude Code dampened their enthusiasm for programming, reflecting broader tensions around AI copilots altering craftsmanship and motivation.
items.summary_zh: 一则个人感悟，讲述在科技行业工作多年、遭遇 AI 编码助手后对热情的影响。作者表示使用 Claude Code 让他对编程的热情减退，折射出 AI 助手可能改变开发者动机与技艺的普遍议题。

items.title_en: Harold and George Destroy the World
items.title_zh: 哈罗德与乔治摧毁世界
items.summary_en: A speculative, thriller-style piece about two protagonists whose actions trigger a planetary catastrophe. It toys with themes common in techno-thrillers—cyber operations, decision cascades, and how seemingly small actors can tip the balance in a connected world.
items.summary_zh: 这是一部以哈罗德与乔治为主角的科技惊悚作品，描绘他们的行动引发全球灾难。作品揉合网络战、决策连锁及在互联世界中小角色也可能带来巨大后果的主题，凸显现代技术的高风险属性。

items.title_en: MAUI Is Coming to Linux
items.title_zh: MAUI 即将登陆 Linux
items.summary_en: MAUI is coming to Linux via a preview from Avalonia, widening the cross-platform story for .NET apps on desktop Linux. If you build .NET GUIs, this could broaden deployment targets and influence UI strategy. It underscores Linux's growing role in the .NET ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: .NET MAUI 即将登陆 Linux，借助 Avalonia 的预览实现跨平台桌面 UI。这将扩大 .NET GUI 的部署目标，影响 UI 策略，体现了 Linux 在 .NET 生态中的日益重要地位。

items.title_en: Scaling Karpathy's Autoresearch: What Happens When the Agent Gets a GPU Cluster
items.title_zh: 扩展 Karpathy 的 Autoresearch：当代理获得 GPU 集群时会发生什么
items.summary_en: Skypilot's post on scaling Autoresearch explains the implications of giving an agent access to a GPU cluster: faster experimentation, potential capability growth, and new architectural and safety considerations.
items.summary_zh: Skypilot 的 Autoresearch 方案扩展到拥有 GPU 集群后，会显著提速实验与迭代，同时也带来系统架构与安全治理方面的新挑战。

items.title_en: VisiCalc Reconstructed
items.title_zh: VisiCalc 重建版
items.summary_en: Researchers recreate VisiCalc's original spreadsheet engine, detailing how its simple cell model and formula language powered the first killer app. The reconstruction exposes the architectural constraints that shaped early user expectations and informs how modern spreadsheets handle dependency tracking, recalculation, and UI latency.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员重建了 Visicalc 的原始电子表格引擎，揭示其简单的单元格模型和公式语言如何驱动首个爆款应用。重建过程暴露了早期架构的限制，并为现代电子表格在依赖跟踪、重算和界面延迟方面的设计提供了启示。

items.title_en: FFmpeg 101 (2024)
items.title_zh: FFmpeg 101（2024）
items.summary_en: A practical primer on FFmpeg's core APIs and workflows as of 2024, covering common tasks and pitfalls. It helps developers leverage FFmpeg more effectively for audio/video processing.
items.summary_zh: 对 FFmpeg 核心 API 与常见工作流的实用入门（2024 年版本），覆盖常见任务与坑点，帮助开发者更高效地进行音视频处理。

items.title_en: Electronics for Kids, 2nd Edition
items.title_zh: 给孩子的电子学，第二版
items.summary_en: Second edition expands hands-on electronics education for kids with updated circuits, projects, and microcontroller work, staying approachable for beginners. It emphasizes safe experimentation and building intuition through practical, build-first learning.
items.summary_zh: 第二版扩展了面向儿童的电子学教育，增加了更新的电路、项目和微控制器实践，仍然对初学者友好。强调安全实验和通过动手学习建立直观理解。

items.title_en: Study finds no evidence cannabis helps anxiety, depression, or PTSD
items.title_zh: 研究发现大麻对焦虑、抑郁或 PTSD 无显著帮助
items.summary_en: A study finds no evidence that cannabis helps anxiety, depression, or PTSD, informing medical guidance and policy debates around its use.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现大麻对焦虑、抑郁或 PTSD 没有显著帮助，这对医疗指引与相关政策的讨论提供了重要信息。

items.title_en: The unlikely story of Teardown Multiplayer
items.title_zh: Teardown 多人模式的意外故事
items.summary_en: The piece recounts how Teardown's multiplayer mode emerged despite skepticism, outlining the technical hurdles, networking choices, and design trade-offs. It serves as a case study in shipping multiplayer on a small team, with lessons for indie developers.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章讲述 Teardown 的多人模式在原本并不被看好情形下竟然走向实现，文中讲述了开发中的技术难点、网络设计与设计取舍。这个案例为小团队实现多人玩法提供了宝贵经验，尤其对独立游戏开发者有启发。

items.title_en: Write up of my homebrew CPU build
items.title_zh: 我的自制 CPU 构建笔记
items.summary_en: An in-depth write-up of building a homebrew CPU, tracing the journey from simulation to hardware. It covers design decisions, validation methods, and the pragmatic challenges of turning a concept into a functioning chip.
items.summary_zh: 对自制 CPU 的从仿真到硬件的完整记录，分享设计取舍、验证方法以及将概念落地为可工作的芯片所面临的实际挑战。

items.title_en: Java is fast, code might not be
items.title_zh: Java 很快，但代码未必高效
items.summary_en: Java’s runtime speed doesn’t automatically guarantee fast end-to-end performance; the article argues for careful profiling and efficient code design instead of relying on language speed.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出 Java 的运行时速度并不自动带来端到端的高性能，强调需要通过剖析和高效的代码设计来实现真正的性能提升。

items.title_en: 'Pokémon Go' players unknowingly trained delivery robots with 30B images
items.title_zh: 《宝可梦GO》玩家无意间为送货机器人训练了30亿张图片
items.summary_en: Pokémon Go players unknowingly contributed to training delivery robots by providing billions of images through crowdsourcing. The finding highlights privacy and consent concerns in consumer apps that collect data for AI systems, and questions about who benefits from such datasets.
items.summary_zh: 宝可梦 GO 玩家在不知情的情况下通过众包提供了数十亿张图片，用于训练送货机器人。这一发现突显了以数据为驱动的 AI 系统背后的隐私与同意问题，以及这些数据集的受益方。

items.title_en: What makes Intel Optane stand out (2023)
items.title_zh: 2023 年英特尔 Optane 的独特之处
items.summary_en: Optane's core appeal is persistent, byte-addressable memory with near-DRAM latency, enabling memory-tiering for data-center workloads. Cost, endurance, and capacity trade-offs shape its role in hybrid memory and storage architectures.
items.summary_zh: Optane 的核心卖点是持久化、近似 DRAM 的延迟以及字节级寻址能力，使其成为可用于内存层级化的存储类内存。成本和容量限制决定了在数据中心的具体定位，但它为热数据提供了更低的访问成本。

items.title_en: OpenBSD: PF queues break the 4 Gbps barrier
items.title_zh: OpenBSD：PF 队列突破 4 Gbps 界限
items.summary_en: OpenBSD's PF queue feature achieves sustained throughput beyond 4 Gbps on supported hardware, underscoring the efficiency of the OS's packet-filtering stack. The result highlights how software- and kernel-level optimizations can unlock high-speed networks without exotic hardware.
items.summary_zh: 在受支持的硬件上，OpenBSD 的 PF 队列功能实现了超过 4 Gbps 的稳定吞吐，体现了内核数据包过滤栈的高效。此结果展示了软件与内核优化如何在不依赖特殊硬件的情况下提升网络速率。

items.title_en: The worst volume control UI in the world (2017)
items.title_zh: 史上最差音量控制 UI（2017）
items.summary_en: The piece analyzes a famously poor volume control design, likely where volume changes unpredictably or the control isn't accessible. It discusses lessons for UX, such as clear affordances and intuitive feedback.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章评析了2017年广为人知的极差音量控制界面，指出其难以使用的原因与用户痛点。通过这枚案例，作者提出 UX 设计的教训，如直观的控制、清晰的反馈和一致性。

items.title_en: POSSE – Publish on your Own Site, Syndicate Elsewhere
items.title_zh: POSSE：先在自家站点发布，再在外部平台聚合
items.summary_en: POSSE is the principle of publishing on your own site first, then syndicating copies to external platforms. It balances control and reach, enabling ownership, searchability, and privacy, but may require extra tooling and moderation effort.
items.summary_zh: POSSE 的原则是在自有站点优先发布，再将复制内容聚合到外部平台。此举在控制与扩散之间取得平衡，提升内容所有权、可检索性与隐私，但也需要额外的工具和治理工作。

items.title_en: Entso-E final report on Iberian 2025 blackout
items.title_zh: Entso‑E 对 2025 年伊比利亚停电的最终报告
items.summary_en: The grid operator's final analysis reconstructs the sequence that led to the large Iberian blackout and identifies systemic vulnerabilities in control, coordination, and protection schemes. It recommends operational and infrastructure changes to improve cross‑border resilience as grids integrate more variable renewables.
items.summary_zh: 运营方的最终分析还原了导致大范围停电的故障链条，并指出控制、协调与保护机制上的系统性脆弱性。报告建议在运行和基础设施上采取改进措施，以在更多可变可再生能源接入时加强跨境电网的韧性。

items.title_en: More common mistakes to avoid when creating system architecture diagrams
items.title_zh: 创建系统架构图时应避免的常见错误
items.summary_en: Lists common diagram mistakes like over-abstracting, tying diagrams to implementation details, or omitting stakeholders. Provides practical guidelines for diagrams that clearly communicate decisions and constraints.
items.summary_zh: 列出常见的架构图错误，如过度抽象、将图与实现细节绑定，以及忽略相关方。给出清晰传达决策与约束的实用绘制要点。

items.title_en: My first patch to the Linux kernel
items.title_zh: 我的第一份 Linux 内核补丁
items.summary_en: Shares the experience of submitting your first patch to the Linux kernel, detailing the learning curve, code reviews, and community feedback that come with contributing to the core project.
items.summary_zh: 讲述向 Linux 内核提交第一份补丁的经历，涵盖学习曲线、代码审查与社区反馈。

items.title_en: Beyond has dropped “meat” from its name and expanded its high-protein drink line
items.title_zh: Beyond 将品牌名中的肉字去掉，并扩展高蛋白饮品线
