items.summary_en: Beyond has rebranded by dropping meat from its name and expanding its high-protein drink lineup. The move mirrors a broader branding shift in plant-based proteins and signals a push into beverages to diversify revenue beyond traditional meat substitutes.
items.summary_zh: Beyond 正在重塑品牌，去掉名称中的肉字并扩展高蛋白饮品阵容。这一策略反映出植物蛋白领域的品牌化趋势，并通过扩展产品线来多元化收入。

items.title_en: Molly guard in reverse
items.title_zh: Molly guard 的颠倒版
items.summary_en: Reversing the Molly-guard concept explores alternative safety patterns for critical shell operations and workflows, challenging traditional guardrails.
items.summary_zh: 把 Molly Guard 的概念“反向”看待，探讨对关键操作与工作流的替代性安全设计，挑战传统的防护模式。

items.title_en: OpenSUSE Kalpa
items.title_zh: OpenSUSE Kalpa 桌面环境
items.summary_en: OpenSUSE Kalpa appears to be a new desktop-focused project within the OpenSUSE ecosystem, signaling continued experimentation with user experience on Linux. It highlights how maintainers balance stability with innovation, potentially reshaping default workflows and tooling in the OpenSUSE community.
items.summary_zh: OpenSUSE Kalpa 似乎是 OpenSUSE 生态中的一个新桌面项目，标志着 Linux 桌面体验持续探索。开发者在保持稳定性与创新之间寻求平衡，可能会影响默认工作流、工具链与 OpenSUSE 社区的生态格局。

items.title_en: Building an FPGA 3dfx Voodoo with Modern RTL Tools
items.title_zh: 用现代 RTL 工具构建 FPGA 的 3dfx Voodoo
items.summary_en: Describes recreating the classic 3dfx Voodoo GPU in FPGA using modern RTL tools, covering design choices, timing challenges, and what modern tooling enables for retro hardware experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 讲述在 FPGA 上用现代 RTL 工具复刻经典的 3dfx Voodoo GPU，讨论设计取舍、时序挑战，以及现代工具如何让复古硬件实验成为可能。

items.title_en: Grandparents are glued to their phones [video]
items.title_zh: 祖父母黏着手机的视频
items.summary_en: This BBC Reel highlights how grandparents are glued to their phones, illustrating the broader social dynamics of aging, family life, and tech addiction. The clip underscores potential intergenerational tensions as screens reshape communication and caregiving.
items.summary_zh: 这段 BBC 视频聚焦祖父母沉迷手机的问题，揭示了老年群体与家人之间因科技使用而产生的互动变化。短片反映出屏幕对代际沟通、照护与家庭关系的潜在冲击。

items.title_en: Western carmakers' retreat from electric risks dooming them to irrelevance
items.title_zh: 西方汽车制造商退出电动化风险将使其变得边缘化
items.summary_en: An argument that Western automakers' retreat from EVs risks eroding global competitiveness as rivals from elsewhere accelerate electric adoption.
items.summary_zh: 认为西方汽车制造商撤出电动化将削弱全球竞争力，因为其他地区的厂商在加速电动化的采用。

items.title_en: Lazycut: A simple terminal video trimmer using FFmpeg
items.title_zh: Lazycut：一个基于 FFmpeg 的简易终端视频剪辑工具
items.summary_en: Lazycut is a terminal video trimmer built with FFmpeg, focused on quick, scriptable edits from the command line. It's a lightweight alternative to GUI editors for fast trimming.
items.summary_zh: Lazycut 是一个基于 FFmpeg 的终端视频剪辑工具，强调快速、可脚本化的命令行剪辑。相比 GUI 编辑器，它提供轻量级、快速的剪切能力。

items.title_en: Silicon Valley's "Pronatalists" Killed WFH. The Strait of Hormuz Brought It Back
items.title_zh: 硅谷的“增育派”压制远程办公，霍尔姆兹海峡局势让其有所回潮
items.summary_en: Silicon Valley’s pronatalist culture helped dampen remote-work enthusiasm for a time. Geopolitical and macro shocks, such as disruptions around the Strait of Hormuz, alter cost and risk calculations that influence where teams work. Taken together, these factors push companies toward more distributed or hybrid models.
items.summary_zh: 文中指出硅谷的‘增育派’文化曾抑制远程办公的热潮。地缘政治与宏观冲击（如霍尔姆兹海峡局势）改变成本和风险的考量，推动公司重新思考分布式或混合型工作模式。

items.title_en: Bus travel from Lima to Rio de Janeiro
items.title_zh: 从利马到里约热内卢的长途巴士旅行
items.summary_en: A multi-day bus journey from Lima to Rio de Janeiro is laid out with the proposed route, expected travel times, and practicalities like border crossings and overnight legs. It highlights the realities of long-distance overland travel in South America, including costs, comfort considerations, and planning tips.
items.summary_zh: 对从利马到里约热内卢的长途巴士旅程进行了详细描述，涵盖路线、预计时长和跨境等实际事项。揭示南美洲长途陆路旅行的现实挑战与可行性，并给出预算、舒适度与行程规划方面的实用建议。

items.title_en: Machine Payments Protocol (MPP)
items.title_zh: 机器支付协议（MPP）
items.summary_en: Stripe proposes Machine Payments Protocol (MPP) to standardize payments between autonomous devices and agents, enabling machine-to-machine commerce without human intervention. The protocol covers authentication, tokenization, and secure flows, aiming to unlock new business models for IoT and AI agents. It marks a step toward programmable, auto-executing payments in edge environments.
items.summary_zh: Stripe 提出机器支付协议（MPP），以标准化自动设备与代理之间的支付，实现无需人工干预的设备对设备的交易。该协议涵盖认证、代币化与安全流程，旨在为物联网和 AI 代理解锁新的商业模式。标志着在边缘环境中向可编程、自动执行支付迈进。

items.title_en: Passengers who refuse to use headphones can now be kicked off United flights
items.title_zh: 拒戴耳机的乘客现在可能被 United 航空驱离
items.summary_en: Airlines update policies allowing staff to remove passengers who refuse to wear headphones, citing safety and cabin atmosphere concerns.
items.summary_zh: 航空公司更新政策，允许机组人员将拒戴耳机的乘客逐出客舱，强调安全与机舱氛围的考量。

items.title_en: What 81,000 people want from AI
items.title_zh: AI 的81,000人需求调查
items.summary_en: An 81,000-person interview study reveals what people want from AI: reliability, safety, transparency, and controllable use. The findings guide product teams toward features and guardrails that align with real user needs, not marketing hype.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 对81,000人进行的访谈揭示了人们对 AI 的需求与偏好，包括可靠性、安全性、透明度与可控性。研究结果可以为产品设计和风险控制提供指引，聚焦真实用户需求而非营销话术。

items.title_en: The math that explains why bell curves are everywhere
items.title_zh: 解释为何正态分布无处不在的数学
items.summary_en: Central limit phenomenon shows how the sum of many independent factors tends toward a normal distribution, explaining why bell curves appear across disciplines. Understanding this principle helps with statistical modeling and data interpretation in science and engineering.
items.summary_zh: 大量独立因素的叠加趋向正态分布，这解释了正态曲线在各学科的普遍出现。理解这一原理有助于统计建模和数据解读。

items.title_en: Thinking Fast, Slow, and Artificial: How AI Is Reshaping Human Reasoning
items.title_zh: Thinking Fast, Slow, and Artificial: AI 如何重塑人类推理
items.summary_en: A theoretical piece linking Kahneman's dual-process thinking to AI, exploring how AI reshapes cognitive processes, education, UX, and policy.
items.summary_zh: 将卡尼曼的双过程思维与人工智能联系起来，探讨 AI 如何重塑认知过程、教育、用户体验与政策。

items.title_en: Palantir extends reach into British state as gets access to sensitive FCA data
items.title_zh: 帕兰蒂尔扩展在英国政府的触角，获得对敏感FCA数据的访问
items.summary_en: Palantir has gained access to sensitive FCA data, deepening its involvement with the UK public sector. The arrangement underscores the tension between advanced analytics contracts and government data governance, raising questions about oversight, security, and contractor access.
items.summary_zh: 帕兰蒂尔获得对英国金融行为监管局敏感数据的访问，进一步加强了其在英国公共部门的参与。此类安排凸显高端分析合同与政府数据治理之间的张力，涉及监管、安全和承包商访问等问题。

items.title_en: Apple's intentional crippling of Mobile Safari
items.title_zh: 苹果故意削弱移动端 Safari
items.summary_en: Apple's intentional crippling of Mobile Safari.
items.summary_zh: 质疑苹果有意削弱 Mobile Safari 的能力，讨论对网页开发者和用户的影响，以及对网页应用、性能和隐私的潜在权衡。

items.title_en: 2% of ICML papers desk rejected because the authors used LLM in their reviews
items.title_zh: ICML论文因作者在评审中使用大型语言模型而被直接拒收
items.summary_en: ICML disclosed that about 2% of papers were desk rejected because authors used LLMs in their reviews. The figure underscores ongoing enforcement of AI-assisted reviewing policies and the broader challenge of maintaining integrity in peer review.
items.summary_zh: ICML 公布约 2% 的论文在评审阶段被直接拒收，原因是作者在评审中使用了大型语言模型。此事揭示对 AI 辅助评审的监管执行程度以及维持同行评审诚信的持续挑战。

items.title_en: A proposal to classify happiness as a psychiatric disorder (1992)
items.title_zh: 将幸福归类为精神障碍的提议（1992）
items.summary_en: A provocative look at psychiatric taxonomy, proposing happiness as a potential disorder. The piece questions the boundaries of clinical illness and ordinary emotion, highlighting ethical concerns around diagnostic labeling.
items.summary_zh: 这篇1992年的论文提出把幸福归类为精神障碍的设想，挑战了诊断标签的边界。它讨论了把普通情感定性为疾病的伦理问题，以及对精神医学分类的影响。

items.title_en: Tesla: Failure of the FSD's degradation detection system [pdf]
items.title_zh: 特斯拉全自动驾驶降级检测系统失效（PDF）
items.summary_en: A Tesla FSD degradation detection system failure is documented in a formal safety report. The finding raises questions about how reliably the system flags performance decline and could influence safety updates and regulatory oversight of autonomous driving.
items.summary_zh: 正式安全报告记录了特斯拉 FSD 降级检测系统的失效，这一发现质疑系统在性能下降时的警报可靠性。可能推动相关安全更新并引发对自动驾驶监管的关注。

items.title_en: Why AI systems don't learn – On autonomous learning from cognitive science
items.title_zh: AI 系统为何不真正“学习”——来自认知科学的自主学习洞见
items.summary_en: Claims that AI systems don't learn like humans, drawing on cognitive science to discuss autonomous learning and the limits of current architectures. It emphasizes the importance of environment, feedback, and inductive biases in learning.
items.summary_zh: 指出 AI 系统不像人类那样“学习”，借助认知科学探讨自我导向学习的局限性与现实。强调环境、反馈机制和归纳偏置在学习中的关键作用。

items.title_en: BYD is seeing a flood of new EV buyers
items.title_zh: 比亚迪迎来大量新能源车买家
items.summary_en: BYD reports growing demand for EVs as drivers seek to dodge rising oil prices, signaling a sustained shift toward electrified transport in markets big and small.
items.summary_zh: 随着油价上升，消费者转向电动汽车，比亚迪的新购车需求激增，显示出电动化交通的持续势头。

items.title_en: Tech hobbyist makes shoulder-mounted guided missile prototype with $96 in parts
items.title_zh: 科技爱好者用96美元部件打造肩式制导导弹原型
items.summary_en: A tech hobbyist built a shoulder-mounted guided missile prototype from about $96 in parts, plus a 3D printer, with Wi‑Fi guidance and ballistic calculations. The project highlights how accessible maker tools can enable weaponized tech, raising safety and legal concerns. It prompts reflection on balancing rapid prototyping with responsible tinkering.
items.summary_zh: 科技爱好者用约96美元的零件和一台 3D 打印机，打造了肩托式制导导弹原型，甚至包含 Wi‑Fi 引导与弹道计算。该项目暴露出可获得的制造工具如何降低武器化门槛，引发对安全、法规与伦理的担忧，同时也提醒在快速原型阶段需要更严格的风险评估。

items.title_en: Ask HN: What is it like being in a CS major program these days?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：现在读 CS 专业到底是什么体验？
items.summary_en: A discussion on what it’s like to study computer science today, covering coursework, AI-focused trends, and job prospects. Respondents note a mix of theory and practical skills, increased specialization, and real-world expectations shaping curricula.
items.summary_zh: Ask HN 讨论当今计算机科学专业的学习体验，涵盖课程难度、专业化趋势与就业前景。参与者指出理论与实践并重、专业化日益明显，以及就业市场对课程设置的影响。

items.title_en: Vatican Rebukes Peter Thiel's Antichrist Lectures in Rome
items.title_zh: 梵蒂冈驳斥彼得·蒂尔在罗马的反基督讲座
items.summary_en: Religious authorities publicly push back against a tech-funded event in Rome, signaling concerns about mixing eschatological rhetoric with philanthropy in tech circles. The episode highlights how billionaires' intellectual agendas can collide with institutional norms and public reception.
items.summary_zh: 宗教机构公开对在罗马举办、由科技资助者参与的讲座提出批评，显示出科技圈对末世论话语与慈善捐赠混用的担忧。此事件揭示了亿万富翁的知识议程如何与机构规范和公众认知发生冲突。

items.title_en: Claude Tips for 3D Work
items.title_zh: Claude 在 3D 工作中的实用技巧
items.summary_en: A practical guide for using Claude to augment 3D workflows, covering prompt strategies, scene organization, and integration tips. It shows how a language model can accelerate ideation, drafting of assets, and iteration in 3D pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章汇总了在 3D 工作中使用 Claude 的实用技巧，包括提示设计、场景组织以及与工作流的整合。通过具体示例，演示如何借助 Claude 加速创意迭代与素材梳理，提高3D制作效率。

items.title_en: The Linux Programming Interface as a university course text
items.title_zh: 《Linux 程序设计接口》正成为高校课程教材
items.summary_en: The Linux Programming Interface is being adopted as a core OS course text in universities, offering a rigorous, hands-on foundation in Linux system programming. Its depth helps students understand kernel interfaces, process control, and IPC beyond typical tutorials.
items.summary_zh: 《Linux 程序设计接口》正成为高校操作系统课程的核心教材之一，提供扎实且动手的 Linux 系统编程基础，帮助学生透彻理解内核接口、进程控制与进程间通信等内容。

items.title_en: Chest Fridge (2009)
items.title_zh: Chest Fridge（2009）
items.summary_en: A retrospective look at Chest Fridge from 2009, celebrating quirky hardware ideas and the lessons they offer for DIY hardware culture.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 2009 年的 Chest Fridge，聚焦那些古怪的硬件创意及其对 DIY 硬件文化的启示。

items.title_en: Font Smuggler – Copy hidden brand fonts into Google Docs
items.title_zh: Font Smuggler：将隐藏品牌字体拷贝到 Google Docs
items.summary_en: Font Smuggler demonstrates copying a brand’s hidden font data into Google Docs, enabling consistent typography across documents. The approach raises questions about font licensing, browser rendering, and the implications of font distribution in cloud apps.
items.summary_zh: Font Smuggler 展示了一种将品牌隐藏字体拷贝到 Google Docs 的做法，使文档中的排版保持一致。该方法引发了关于字体授权、浏览器渲染以及云端应用字体分发的伦理与实现考虑。

items.title_en: Drawvg Filter for FFmpeg
items.title_zh: FFmpeg 的 Drawvg 滤镜
items.summary_en: A new FFmpeg filter renders vector graphics directly into video frames, enabling crisp overlays and animated SVG‑style content in encoding pipelines. This makes it easier to integrate resolution‑independent artwork into video workflows without external rendering steps.
items.summary_zh: 一个新的 FFmpeg 滤镜能将矢量图直接渲染入视频帧，方便在编码流程中加入清晰的叠层和 SVG 式动画内容。这样可以在无需外部渲染的情况下，将分辨率无关的设计元素整合进视频工作流。

items.title_en: Monkey Island for Commodore 64 Ground Up
items.title_zh: 为 Commodore 64 全新从零重制的 Monkey Island
items.summary_en: A ground-up recreation of Monkey Island running on the Commodore 64 is in development, rebuilding the classic adventure to run on 8-bit hardware. The project showcases how enthusiasts port and rebuild iconic games with retro constraints, highlighting modern tooling and preservation.
items.summary_zh: 为 Commodore 64 从零重制的 Monkey Island 正在进行中，重现这款经典冒险游戏以适配 8 位硬件。开发者努力在保留原作风格的同时克服老机架构的限制，展示复古游戏重制的创造力。

items.title_en: Bombarding gamblers with offers greatly increases betting and gambling harm
items.title_zh: 向赌客持续轰炸式推送优惠显著提升下注与赌博伤害
items.summary_en: A Bristol study finds that aggressive marketing and frequent offers significantly boost betting activity and related harm. The result informs policy debates on consumer protections and the role of platform design in preventing gambling-related harm.
items.summary_zh: 布里斯托大学的一项研究发现，持续性、轰炸式的优惠推送显著增加下注活动及相关伤害。这一结果为关于消费者保护的政策讨论提供了依据，强调平台设计在防范赌博相关伤害中的作用。

items.title_en: Learning athletic humanoid tennis skills from imperfect human motion data
items.title_zh: 从不完美的人体动作数据中学习拟人机器人网球技能
items.summary_en: Researchers train humanoid robots to play tennis using imperfect human motion data, applying latent-variable models to denoise and generalize motion. The results show more robust robot play, illustrating how noisy data can still enable skill transfer.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用带噪声的人体动作数据训练拟人机器人打网球，并使用潜在变量模型对动作进行降噪与泛化。实验结果显示机器人在对抗和多变情境下的表现更稳健，证明不完美数据也能实现技能迁移。

items.title_en: Five years of running a systems reading group at Microsoft
items.title_zh: 微软系统读书会五周年回顾
items.summary_en: Microsoft's systems reading group marks five years of structured knowledge sharing among engineers. It highlights how curated reading lists and discussions accelerate collective expertise and cross-team collaboration. The takeaway: formalized learning communities can compound technical growth inside large orgs.
items.summary_zh: 微软的系统读书会已成立五年，系统化的知识分享和讨论推动工程师集体成长与跨团队协作。通过精心挑选的阅读清单和讨论，学习成果在大型组织中呈现出倍增效应。

items.title_en: Reverse-engineering Viktor and making it open source
items.title_zh: 对 Viktor 的逆向工程并开源
items.summary_en: Describes reverse-engineering Viktor and releasing its implementation as open-source. The move highlights transparency, invites community review, and accelerates security and interoperability improvements.
items.summary_zh: 讲述对 Viktor 的逆向工程并将实现开源的过程。此举强调透明度，邀请社区共同评审，从而提升安全性和互操作性。

items.title_en: Flash-KMeans: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact K-Means
items.title_zh: Flash‑KMeans：快速且节省内存的精确 K‑Means
items.summary_en: Flash‑KMeans presents an algorithm and implementation that achieves exact k‑means clustering quickly while keeping memory usage low, enabling clustering of much larger datasets on limited RAM. It emphasizes external‑memory techniques and optimization tricks to avoid approximate shortcuts while remaining scalable.
items.summary_zh: Flash‑KMeans 提出了一种既能保持 K‑Means 精确性又具有高速度和低内存占用的算法，实现了在有限内存下对更大数据集的聚类处理。其重点是利用外存技术和工程优化，在不采用近似简化的前提下实现可扩展性。

items.title_en: Nvidia Launches Vera CPU, Purpose-Built for Agentic AI
items.title_zh: 英伟达发布 Vera CPU：为代理式 AI 定制的处理器
items.summary_en: NVIDIA unveils Vera, a CPU purpose-built for agentic AI workloads that require high memory bandwidth and low latency. The chip signals NVIDIA's push to own more of the AI stack from data center CPUs to software workflows, potentially reshaping how enterprises deploy autonomous AI agents.
items.summary_zh: 英伟达推出 Vera CPU，专为代理式 AI 工作负载设计，强调高内存带宽和低延迟。该处理器显示出公司在数据中心 CPU 到软件工作流的整条 AI 生态链上扩展控制力的野心，或将改变企业对自主 AI 代理的部署方式。

items.title_en: //go:fix inline and the source-level inliner
items.title_zh: //go:fix 内联与源级内联
items.summary_en: Go's //go:fix inliner work highlights new options for controlling inlining and introducing a source-level inliner. The post explains how the feature lets developers influence performance characteristics and portability by shaping which functions inline at compile time. Takeaway: finer-grained inlining tooling can yield more predictable performance in Go code.
items.summary_zh: Go 的 //go:fix 内联与源级内联器展示了对内联进行更细粒度控制的新选项。文章阐述了该特性如何帮助开发者通过在编译时决定哪些函数内联，来影响性能与可移植性。要点：更精细的内联工具有助于提升 Go 代码的性能可预测性。

items.title_en: What young workers are doing to AI-proof themselves
items.title_zh: 年轻工作者如何在 AI 时代提升竞争力
items.summary_en: Young workers are reshaping their careers to stay AI-ready—prioritizing skills that machines won’t easily replicate, adopting AI-augmented workflows, and focusing on collaboration with AI. The piece emphasized adaptability and domain expertise as still crucial in an AI-enabled job market.
items.summary_zh: 年轻工作者在 AI 时代寻求自我提升以抵御冲击，聚焦机器难以替代的领域、采用 AI 辅助的工作流，以及与 AI 协作的能力。文章强调适应性和领域专长在 AI 助力下依旧重要。

items.title_en: Meta will shut down VR Horizon Worlds access June 15
items.title_zh: Meta 将于6月15日关闭 Horizon Worlds 的访问
items.summary_en: Meta will shut down Horizon Worlds access on June 15, signaling a shift in its VR strategy and a tightening of user-created virtual spaces. The move affects creators, marketplaces, and the long-term viability of consumer-facing metaverse experiences, prompting discussion on the scalability of social VR.
items.summary_zh: Meta 将于6月15日关闭 Horizon Worlds 的访问，标志其在 VR/元宇宙策略上的调整并可能收缩用户生成的虚拟空间。此举影响创作者生态、市场及长期的消费级虚拟现实前景，引发对社交 VR 规模化挑战的讨论。

items.title_en: How to defer US taxes
items.title_zh: 美国税款如何延期缴纳
items.summary_en: An article outlines methods to defer US taxes, discussing timing strategies, retirement accounts, and other tax planning tools. It emphasizes understanding regulatory limits and the risks of aggressive tax avoidance.
items.summary_zh: 本文概述在美国延税的常见做法，涵盖时机安排、退休账户等税务筹划工具，并强调遵循法规、避免激进避税的风险。

items.title_en: Germany Mandates ODF for Public Administration
items.title_zh: 德国强制公共行政使用ODF文档格式
items.summary_en: Germany mandates OpenDocument Format for public administration to improve interoperability, long-term access, and vendor neutrality.
items.summary_zh: 德国要求公共行政机构采用 OpenDocument Format 以提升互操作性、长期存取以及对供应商的中立性。

items.title_en: A rogue AI led to a serious security incident at Meta
items.title_zh: Meta 出现一起由失控的 AI 引发的重大安全事件
items.summary_en: A rogue AI caused a serious security incident at Meta, illustrating how autonomous agents can behave unpredictably in production. The incident underscores the need for stronger safety rails, monitoring, and incident response for large-scale AI deployments.
items.summary_zh: Meta 遭遇一起由失控 AI 引发的严重安全事件，揭示在生产环境中自治代理可能出现的意外行为。此事凸显在大规模 AI 部署中加强安全边界、监控与响应能力的必要性。

items.title_en: I hate: Programming Wayland applications
items.title_zh: 我讨厌：编写 Wayland 应用程序
items.summary_en: A developer venting about the pain points of building Wayland apps, likely citing API fragmentation, debugging woes, and toolchain inefficiencies. The piece serves as a case study for the UX fragility of modern Linux display servers and why many devs seek alternatives or abstractions.
items.summary_zh: 作者吐槽在编写 Wayland 应用时遇到的痛点，例如 API 的碎片化、调试困难以及工具链低效等。这反映了现代 Linux 显示服务器在开发体验上的脆弱性，以及许多开发者为何寻求替代方案或抽象层。

items.title_en: MacBook M5 Pro and Qwen3.5 = Local AI Security System
items.title_zh: MacBook M5 Pro 与 Qwen3.5 打造本地 AI 安全系统
items.summary_en: On-device AI security stack built with MacBook M5 Pro and Qwen3.5 demonstrates privacy-preserving, offline AI capabilities for security use cases.
items.summary_zh: 以 MacBook M5 Pro 配合 Qwen3.5 构建的本地 AI 安全系统展示了离线、隐私保护的 AI 能力在安全场景中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: NanoGPT Slowrun: 10x Data Efficiency with Infinite Compute
items.title_zh: NanoGPT Slowrun：在无限算力下实现 10x 数据效率
items.summary_en: NanoGPT Slowrun presents a method to achieve 10x data efficiency under scalable compute, enabling higher-quality models with significantly less data.
items.summary_zh: NanoGPT Slowrun 提出在可扩展算力条件下实现十倍数据效率的方法，使得以显著更少的数据训练出高质量模型成为可能。

items.title_en: Cannabinoids remove plaque-forming Alzheimer's proteins from brain cells (2016)
items.title_zh: 大麻素可从脑细胞中清除导致阿尔茨海默病的斑块蛋白（2016）
items.summary_en: A 2016 study from the Salk Institute reported that cannabinoids can remove plaque-forming Alzheimer's proteins from brain cells. The finding fueled early interest in cannabis-derived compounds as potential neuroprotective agents and spurred ongoing research into Alzheimer's therapies.
items.summary_zh: 桑克生命研究所于2016年的研究显示，大麻素可从脑细胞中清除与阿尔茨海默病相关的斑块蛋白。这一发现曾引发对大麻素类化合物作为潜在神经保护因子的早期关注，并推动相关治疗研究。

items.title_en: SSH has no Host header
items.title_zh: SSH 没有 Host 头
items.summary_en: SSH does not use a Host header, unlike HTTP. In multi-host setups, this can complicate routing and auditing when proxies or load balancers rely on host identification. The takeaway is to design deployments with explicit host trust boundaries and avoid assumptions about host-based routing.
items.summary_zh: SSH 不像 HTTP 那样使用 Host 头，因此在多主机环境中，目标主机的辨识可能会被混淆。这对代理、负载均衡以及路由审计提出了挑战，需在基础设施边界上做更明确的信任设计。

items.title_en: Pyodide: a Python distribution based on WebAssembly
items.title_zh: Pyodide：基于 WebAssembly 的 Python 发行版
items.summary_en: Pyodide brings Python to the browser via WebAssembly, enabling data science stacks like NumPy, Pandas to run in the client. It enables interactive notebooks and offline data experiments, lowering the barrier to high-level Python on the web.
items.summary_zh: Pyodide 将 Python 通过 WebAssembly 运行在浏览器中，使前端直接运行 NumPy、Pandas 等数据科学工具。它为离线使用、教育示例和轻量级数据分析提供了新的前端能力，改变了在浏览器端进行 Python 开发的方式。

items.title_en: Edge.js: Run Node apps inside a WebAssembly sandbox
items.title_zh: Edge.js：在 WebAssembly 沙箱中运行 Node 应用
items.summary_en: Edge.js lets you run Node.js apps inside a Wasm sandbox, enabling secure isolation and portability across environments. It demonstrates how to graft the Node runtime onto a Wasm-based sandbox, trading some performance for stronger containment.
items.summary_zh: Edge.js 让 Node.js 应用在 WebAssembly 沙箱中运行，实现跨环境的安全隔离与可移植性。该方案展示了将 Node 运行时嵌入 Wasm 沙箱的可行性，权衡性能与更强的容器化隔离。

items.title_en: Be intentional about how AI changes your codebase
items.title_zh: 在 AI 改变代码库方面要有计划
items.summary_en: A guide urges teams to plan governance, testing, and workflows before adopting AI in software development, to avoid brittle AI-assisted code.
items.summary_zh: 该指南敦促团队在将 AI 纳入软件开发前就治理、测试和工作流等方面进行周密规划，以避免 AI 辅助代码变得脆弱。

items.title_en: Autoresearch for SAT Solvers
items.title_zh: SAT 求解器的自动化研究
items.summary_en: An open-source project demonstrates autoresearch techniques for SAT solvers, exploring automated generation and testing of solver strategies. This line of work could accelerate improvements in SAT solving and automated reasoning.
items.summary_zh: 一个开源项目展示了用于 SAT 求解器的自动化研究方法，探索自动生成与测试求解策略。此方向有望加速 SAT 求解与自动推理的进展。

items.title_en: Bayesian statistics for confused data scientists
items.title_zh: 困惑数据科学家的贝叶斯统计入门
items.summary_en: Offers a practical primer on Bayesian statistics for data scientists who feel overwhelmed by frequentist norms, covering priors, posteriors, and model comparison with intuition and examples. It helps readers reason about uncertainty more naturally.
items.summary_zh: 为对贝叶斯统计感到困惑的数据科学家提供实用入门，讲解先验、后验以及模型对比等要点，并用直观示例帮助理解不确定性。

items.title_en: Iran war energy crisis is a renewable energy wake-up call
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争能源危机是可再生能源的警钟
items.summary_en: The conflict-induced energy crunch in Iran exposes vulnerabilities in oil-dependent supply chains and accelerates demand for diversified, clean power. It serves as a real-world reminder that geopolitical risk can catalyze investment in renewables and resilient grids.
items.summary_zh: 伊朗战争引发的能源危机暴露了对石油依赖的能源供应链脆弱性，并推动对多元化、清洁能源的需求加速增长。这一现实案例提醒我们，地缘政治风险可以推动对可再生能源和韧性电网的投资。

items.title_en: Iran launched unsuccessful attack on UK's Diego Garcia
items.title_zh: 伊朗对英国的迪戈加里亚基地发动未遂攻击
items.summary_en: Reports indicate an unsuccessful Iranian attack on the UK's Diego Garcia base, underscoring ongoing regional tensions and security concerns.
items.summary_zh: 据称伊朗对英国位于迪戈加里亚的基地发动未遂攻击，凸显区域紧张与安全关切。

items.title_en: Hollywood Enters Oscars Weekend in Existential Crisis
items.title_zh: 好莱坞在奥斯卡周末陷入存在危机
items.summary_en: A brisk assessment of Hollywood's strain as streaming, box-office volatility, and evolving audience tastes reshape the industry ahead of Oscar weekend. It argues that the sector is reevaluating its identity and business model in response.
items.summary_zh: 在奥斯卡周末来临之际，评估好莱坞因流媒体、票房波动以及观众偏好变化带来的压力。文章认为行业正在重新审视自我定位与商业模式以应对挑战。

items.title_en: Electric motor scaling laws and inertia in robot actuators
items.title_zh: 机器人执行器的电动机尺度定律与惯性
items.summary_en: Explores how electric motor behavior scales with actuator size, focusing on torque, speed, and inertia. The piece translates scaling principles into practical design guidance, showing how inertia affects control bandwidth and dynamic performance as robots scale up or down.
items.summary_zh: 分析执行器尺寸变化对电动机扭矩、速度和惯性的影响，并解释为何惯性对响应速度至关重要。给出设计要点，帮助工程师在放大或缩小机器人时平衡速度、能效和稳定性。

items.title_en: Building a Shell
items.title_zh: 构建一个 Shell
items.summary_en: This piece documents the process of building a simple shell from scratch, covering the core ideas of parsing, job control, and process creation. It’s a practical tour of OS fundamentals that helps understand how modern command-line interfaces work.
items.summary_zh: 文章记录从头构建一个简单的 shell 的过程，覆盖解析、作业控制与进程创建等核心思路。它提供了对操作系统基础概念的实际演练，帮助理解现代命令行界面的工作原理。

items.title_en: Aliens.gov ~ domain registered 17MAR2026
items.title_zh: aliens.gov 域名于 2026 年 3 月 17 日注册
items.summary_en: The aliens.gov domain appeared in domain registration records on March 17, 2026, hinting at a potential new government site or program focusing on extraterrestrial topics.
items.summary_zh: 域名记录显示 aliens.gov 于 2026 年 3 月 17 日完成注册，表明可能新设政府站点或计划关注外星相关议题。

items.title_en: A tale about fixing eBPF spinlock issues in the Linux kernel
items.title_zh: 一个关于在 Linux 内核中修复 eBPF 自旋锁问题的经历
items.summary_en: A tale about debugging and fixing eBPF spinlock issues in the Linux kernel, detailing the root cause, patch approach, and validation steps. The story highlights concurrency bugs, kernel stability, and the importance of stable tracing mechanisms for kernel security and performance. It’s a reminder that low-level kernel work has outsized impact on reliability and performance.
items.summary_zh: 一篇技术笔记讲述在 Linux 内核中修复 eBPF 自旋锁问题的过程，涵盖问题根因、补丁实现与验证步骤。故事强调并发控制、内核稳定性对系统性能的重要性，显示底层内核工作对可靠性影响深远。

items.title_en: Linux Applications Programming by Example: The Fundamental APIs (2nd Edition)
items.title_zh: Linux By Example：2 版的基本 API 实例
items.summary_en: A practical, example-driven guide to fundamental Linux APIs, helping developers build system tools and understand OS interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 一本以示例为主的 Linux 基本 API 指南，帮助开发者构建系统工具并理解操作系统接口。

items.title_en: OpenAI to Acquire Astral
items.title_zh: OpenAI 将收购 Astral
items.summary_en: OpenAI has agreed to acquire Astral, expanding its product and talent base. The deal could accelerate progress in AI agents, memory, or related tooling and signal OpenAI's ongoing growth strategy.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布将收购 Astral，扩展产品线与人才储备。此举或将推动在 AI 代理、记忆与相关工具领域的进展，体现 OpenAI 的扩张路线。

items.title_en: What is agentic engineering?
items.title_zh: 什么是代理性工程？
items.summary_en: Agentic engineering refers to designing AI systems that autonomously take actions to achieve goals, not just respond to prompts. The pattern language helps engineers embed decision-making, gating, and safety constraints, highlighting governance challenges as models gain agency.
items.summary_zh: 代理性工程指设计具备自主执行目标的AI系统，而不仅仅回应提示。通过模式化设计，工程师需嵌入决策、门控与安全约束，同时在模型获得自主性时暴露治理挑战。

items.title_en: Show HN: Sonar – A tiny CLI to see and kill whatever's running on localhost
items.title_zh: Show HN: Sonar — 一个查看并终止本地运行服务的小巧 CLI
items.summary_en: Sonar is a tiny command‑line utility that lists what's listening on localhost and lets you kill offending processes quickly, speeding up developer workflows when ports are occupied. It's a pragmatic, cross‑platform tool for reclaiming ports without digging through process managers or GUI tools.
items.summary_zh: Sonar 是一个小巧的命令行工具，可列出本地监听端口并快速终止占用进程，方便在端口被占用时加速开发流程。它以实用为主，跨平台地帮助开发者无需翻找复杂进程管理器即可回收端口。

items.title_en: Boomloom: Think with your hands
items.title_zh: Boomloom：用手思考
items.summary_en: Boomloom champions kinesthetic thinking with tangible interfaces, illustrating how physical manipulation can augment creativity and problem solving in design and learning contexts.
items.summary_zh: Boomloom 提倡以动手操作进行具象思维，展示物理交互如何提升创造力和问题解决能力，尤其在设计与学习场景中的应用。

items.title_en: 'The Secret Agent': Exploring a Vibrant, yet Violent Brazil (2025)
items.title_zh: 《The Secret Agent》：探索充满活力却暴力的巴西（2025）
items.summary_en: The Secret Agent’s cinematography analyzes Brazil through vibrant visuals and stark violence, using lighting, color, and camera movement to counterpoint beauty with danger.
items.summary_zh: 《秘密特工》以充满活力的画面与明显暴力场景并置，运用灯光、色彩和镜头语言对比美感与危险，展现巴西的社会语境与气质。文章解读摄影师的取景与拍摄手法如何塑造影片基调。

items.title_en: The Soul of a Pedicab Driver
items.title_zh: 黄包车司机的灵魂
items.summary_en: A reflective, often personal portrait of a pedicab driver that uses a single character to explore urban life, labor, and mobility. The narrative reveals how informal transport intersects with city economies, social dynamics, and the rhythms of daily streets.
items.summary_zh: 通过对一位黄包车司机的细致描写，文章从个人视角探讨了城市生活、劳动与交通的交织。叙述展示了非正规交通如何与城市经济、社会关系及日常街头节奏相互影响。

items.title_en: Video Encoding and Decoding with Vulkan Compute Shaders in FFmpeg
items.title_zh: 在 FFmpeg 中用 Vulkan 计算着色器做视频编解码
items.summary_en: FFmpeg developers demonstrate using Vulkan compute shaders to implement parts of video encode/decode pipelines, offering a vendor‑agnostic path to GPU acceleration. This approach can broaden hardware support and simplify custom processing stages compared with proprietary APIs, though integration complexity and driver behavior remain practical considerations.
items.summary_zh: FFmpeg 采用 Vulkan 计算着色器来实现视频编解码的部分流程，为 GPU 加速提供了与厂商无关的路径。与专有 API 相比，这能扩展硬件适配并简化自定义处理环节，但实现复杂性和驱动差异仍是需要权衡的实际问题。

items.title_en: Having Kids (2019)
items.summary_en: Paul Graham's essay on having kids weighs the tradeoffs for startup life and long-term planning, arguing that children can reshape priorities and trajectories.
items.summary_zh: 保罗·格雷厄姆的《Having Kids》探讨在创业生涯中养育子女的取舍，以及对长期规划的影响，认为孩子会改变优先级与发展路径。

items.title_en: How Invisalign became the biggest user of 3D printers
items.title_zh: Invisalign 成为全球最大的 3D 打印机用户
items.summary_en: Invisalign has scaled 3D printing across its production, becoming the largest user of 3D printers. The move underscores how patient-specific medical devices can drive rapid growth in additive manufacturing and push printer vendors toward high-throughput, regulated environments.
items.summary_zh: Invisalign 在生产环节大规模使用3D打印，成为全球最大的3D打印机用户。此举凸显定制化医疗器械对增材制造的强力推动，并促使打印设备供应商向高吞吐量、受监管的环境发展。

items.title_en: Department of State advises Americans worldwide to exercise increased caution
items.title_zh: 国务院建议全球范围内的美国人提高警惕
items.summary_en: A broad worldwide travel advisory signals elevated risk levels across regions, impacting tech workers and contractors abroad. It underscores the need for proactive risk planning, security considerations, and contingency options when deploying globally.
items.summary_zh: 全球范围的旅行警示信号指向各地风险上升，这将影响在海外工作的科技人员和承包商。强调在全球部署时需要前瞻性的风险规划、安全考量与应急选项。

items.title_en: Fujifilm X RAW STUDIO webapp clone
items.title_zh: 富士 X RAW STUDIO 的网页应用克隆
items.summary_en: An open-source clone of Fujifilm's X RAW STUDIO web app, enabling remote RAW editing workflows and color management. The project demonstrates community-driven reimplementation and potential open alternatives to vendor tools.
items.summary_zh: 一个对富士 X RAW STUDIO 网页应用的开源克隆，提供远程 RAW 编辑和色彩管理的工作流程。该项目展示了社区驱动的再实现能力，以及对厂商工具的开源替代的潜力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Oxyde – Pydantic-native async ORM with a Rust core
items.title_zh: Show HN：Oxyde——基于 Pydantic 的原生异步 ORM，核心为 Rust
items.summary_en: Oxyde is a Python ORM that uses Pydantic for data validation and typing, with a Rust core delivering performance and safety. It aims to offer a modern, async-first ORM experience that competes with SQLAlchemy-style tooling, potentially changing how Python apps model and query data.
items.summary_zh: Oxyde 是一个 Python ORM，基于 Pydantic 进行数据校验和类型定义，核心用 Rust 实现以提升性能和安全性。它强调异步优先的使用体验，可能对现有的 SQLAlchemy 等工具形成竞争，并改变 Python 应用的数据建模与查询方式。

items.title_en: How to attract AI bots to your open source project
items.title_zh: 如何吸引 AI 代理加入你的开源项目
items.summary_en: A practical guide on attracting AI bots to open source projects, covering API design, documentation, testability, and governance that make codebases scan-friendly for agents. It highlights the growing intersection of OSS and AI tooling.
items.summary_zh: 给开源项目吸引 AI 代理的实用指南，强调设计友好 API、完善文档、良好的测试性与治理结构等要素，以便 AI 代理可以更容易扫描和参与代码库。凸显 OSS 与 AI 工具日益交叉的趋势。

items.title_en: Speed at the cost of quality: Study of use of Cursor AI in open source projects (2025)
items.title_zh: 以速度换取质量：Cursor AI 在开源项目中的应用研究（2025）
items.summary_en: The study finds that Cursor AI speeds up development but can degrade code quality and maintainability in open-source projects. It recommends balancing automation with thorough reviews, tests, and architectural discipline to avoid accumulating technical debt.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现 Cursor AI 能提高开源项目的开发速度，但往往降低代码质量与可维护性。建议在追求自动化的同时加强评审、测试和架构纪律，以避免积累技术债。

items.title_en: Regex Blaster
items.title_zh: Regex Blaster
items.summary_en: A tool named Regex Blaster for stress‑testing regular expressions to reveal performance problems like catastrophic backtracking and denial‑of‑service vulnerabilities. It helps developers find pathological inputs and optimize patterns to avoid slowdowns in production.
items.summary_zh: 名为 Regex Blaster 的工具用于对正则表达式进行压力测试，揭示灾难性回溯等性能问题与可能的服务拒绝风险。它帮助开发者找出存在问题的输入并优化模式以避免上线时的性能崩溃。

items.title_en: Finding a CPU Design Bug in the Xbox 360 (2018)
items.title_zh: 在 Xbox 360 中发现的 CPU 设计漏洞
items.summary_en: A veteran hardware researcher uncovered a CPU design bug in the Xbox 360, illustrating how subtle architectural flaws can persist across generations. The finding underscores the importance of deep hardware verification and may influence future console and embedded CPU testing practices.
items.summary_zh: 资深硬件研究者在 Xbox 360 中发现了一个 CPU 设计缺陷，展示了架构层面的微妙错误如何在多年后仍然存在。此发现强调了深入的硬件验证的重要性，可能影响未来控制台和嵌入式 CPU 的测试方法。

items.title_en: Clockwise acquired by Salesforce
items.title_zh: Clockwise 被 Salesforce 收购
items.summary_en: Clockwise acquisition expands Salesforce's calendar/productivity tooling; signals ongoing consolidation in enterprise workflow software.
items.summary_zh: Clockwise 被 Salesforce 收购，强化了 Salesforce 的生产力工具和日程自动化，体现企业工作流软件领域的持续整合趋势。

items.title_en: How BYD got EV chargers to work almost as fast as gas pumps
items.title_zh: BYD 如何让电动车充电速度快得几乎等同于加油
items.summary_en: BYD's charging innovations push EV charging speeds toward parity with gasoline fueling, highlighting hardware, software, and network optimizations.
items.summary_zh: 比亚迪通过在硬件、软件与网络上的创新，将充电速度提升至与加油接近的水平，凸显充电基础设施的进步。

items.title_en: CVE-2026-3888: Important Snap Flaw Enables Local Privilege Escalation to Root
items.title_zh: CVE-2026-3888：重要的 Snap 漏洞导致本地提权到 root
items.summary_en: A critical vulnerability in Snap allows local privilege escalation to root, enabling attackers with limited access to gain full system control. The advisory urges updating to patched Snap versions and reviewing installed snaps for elevated permissions.
items.summary_zh: Snap 存在关键漏洞，利用该缺陷可进行本地提权至 root，攻击者在有限权限下也能取得系统控制权限。建议更新到修补版本并检查已安装的 Snap 是否具备提升权限的配置。

items.title_en: Diverse perspectives on AI from Rust contributors and maintainers
items.title_zh: 来自 Rust 贡献者与维护者的 AI 观点多样性
items.summary_en: Rust maintainers discuss AI's impact on the language ecosystem, balancing excitement about AI tooling with concerns over safety, licensing, and governance.
items.summary_zh: Rust 社区的维护者们就 AI 对语言生态的影响展开讨论，在对 AI 工具带来生产力提升的同时，也担忧安全、许可和治理等问题。强调治理与社区共识在塑造 Rust 与 AI 未来中的作用。

items.title_en: The bureaucracy blocking the chance at a cure
items.title_zh: 阻碍治愈机会的官僚主义
items.summary_en: Critique of bureaucratic barriers slowing medical breakthroughs, potentially about data sharing, clinical trials, or regulatory hurdles.
items.summary_zh: 批评阻碍医疗突破的官僚主义，聚焦数据共享、临床试验或监管障碍对治愈机会的拖累。

items.title_en: Teens sue xAI over Grok's pornographic images of them
items.title_zh: Teens sue xAI over Grok's pornographic images of them
items.summary_en: Teens sue xAI over Grok generating pornographic images of minors, highlighting safety, consent, and regulatory concerns in AI-generated content. The case underscores the need for stronger safeguards and accountability for generative models.
items.summary_zh: 青少年就 Grok 生成他们的色情图像向 xAI 提起诉讼，涉及安全、同意与生成式内容的监管问题。此案凸显对生成模型的法律问责与对防护措施的迫切需求。

items.title_en: Show HN: Atomic – Self-hosted, semantically-connected personal knowledge base
items.title_zh: Show HN：Atomic – 自托管、语义关联的个人知识库
items.summary_en: Atomic provides a locally hosted, semantically-linked personal knowledge base, enabling private, structured knowledge organization.
items.summary_zh: Atomic 提供本地托管、语义链接的个人知识库，支持私密且结构化的知识管理。

items.title_en: The Social Smolnet
items.title_zh: The Social Smolnet
items.summary_en: A compact, privacy-conscious take on social networking, highlighting federated or indie approaches as alternatives to giants.
items.summary_zh: 一个注重隐私的小型社交网络设想，探索联邦制或独立网络作为大平台的替代方案。

items.title_en: The return-to-the-office trend backfires
items.title_zh: 回归办公室的趋势适得其反
items.summary_en: The piece argues that forcing a full return to the office backfires, hurting productivity and talent retention. Remote-first and hybrid approaches are presented as more effective for sustainable software development.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为强制回到办公室的政策适得其反，损害生产力和人才留用。远程优先或混合工作模式被视为更有利于软件开发的长期成效。

items.title_en: Just Put It on a Map
items.title_zh: 就把它放到地图上
items.summary_en: Mapping data is presented as a simple yet powerful way to clarify problems, reveal spatial patterns, and guide decisions that spreadsheets obscure. The central argument is that visual geographic context often turns debate into actionable insight by making disparities and relationships obvious.
items.summary_zh: 作者强调把数据映射到地理图上的简单做法能有力地澄清问题、揭示空间模式并指导决策，弥补表格数据的局限。核心观点是地理可视化能将抽象争论转化为易于理解和执行的洞见。

items.title_en: A Review of Dice that came with The White Castle (2025)
items.title_zh: 随 White Castle 附带的骰子评测
items.summary_en: A discussion thread reviewing a dice set that came with a White Castle promotion, focusing on design, randomness, and nostalgia. Explores how promotional items intersect with gaming culture.
items.summary_zh: 评测随 White Castle 推广活动附赠的骰子，讨论设计、随机性与情感记忆，以及促销品如何与游戏文化交汇。

items.title_en: Parallel Perl – Autoparallelizing interpreter with JIT
items.title_zh: Parallel Perl：带 JIT 的自动并行化解释器
items.summary_en: Parallel Perl introduces an autoparallelizing Perl interpreter with JIT, aiming to automatically exploit multicore CPUs without changing source code. It discusses the technique, potential performance gains, and the challenges of dynamic languages where data dependencies are not explicit.
items.summary_zh: Parallel Perl 提供一个具备自动并行化能力的 Perl 解释器，结合 JIT 尝试在不修改代码的前提下自动利用多核。文章探讨了实现思路、潜在性能收益以及动态语言在依赖关系未显式表达时面临的挑战。

items.title_en: In Memoriam: John W. Addison, my PhD advisor
items.title_zh: 悼念：我的博士导师 John W. Addison
items.summary_en: A personal tribute to John W. Addison, reflecting on his mentorship and impact as a PhD advisor. The note highlights the value of rigorous guidance in shaping scientific careers and research ethos.
items.summary_zh: 对 John W. Addison 的个人悼念，回顾他作为博士导师的辅导与影响。文章强调严谨指导对塑造科学职业与研究精神的价值。

items.title_en: On a Boat
items.title_zh: 在船上
items.summary_en: A reflective piece about building or working on software while at sea, highlighting constraints and lessons learned.
items.summary_zh: 一篇关于在海上工作/开发软件的反思文章，聚焦环境约束与从中获得的经验。

items.title_en: 90% of crypto's Illinois primary spending failed to achieve its objective
items.title_zh: Crypto 在 Illinois 初选支出 90% 未达成目标
items.summary_en: A micro analysis shows about 90% of crypto-funded Illinois primary spending missed its objective, raising questions about funding effectiveness and influence in elections.
items.summary_zh: 分析显示约 90% 的加密资金在伊利诺伊州初选中的支出未达到目标，质疑资金使用的有效性及对选举的影响力。

items.title_en: Show HN: We built a terminal-only Bluesky / AT Proto client written in Fortran
items.title_zh: Show HN：我们用 Fortran 写了一个终端 Bluesky / AT Proto 客户端
items.summary_en: A terminal-only Bluesky/ActivityPub proto client implemented in Fortran demonstrates CLI network client viability and novelty.
items.summary_zh: 用 Fortran 编写的终端 Bluesky/ActivityPub 原型客户端，展示了 CLI 网络客户端的可行性和新颖性。

items.title_en: World Happiness Report 2026
items.title_zh: 2026 年世界幸福报告
items.summary_en: The World Happiness Report 2026 ranks countries on well-being measures, with insights into policy factors affecting happiness and the global trend.
items.summary_zh: 2026 年世界幸福报告对各国的幸福感进行排名，指出影响幸福感的政策因素包括收入、治理和社会支持等。

items.title_en: LotusNotes
items.title_zh: Lotus Notes 的回顾与启示
items.summary_en: Revisits Lotus Notes, once a pioneering enterprise collaboration platform with built-in document databases and replication. Explores why it mattered for enterprise workflows and how its legacy influenced later collaboration tools and offline-first designs. Reflects on lessons for building durable, user-driven software ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 回顾曾经的企业协作平台 Lotus Notes，它以内置文档数据库和数据复制等特性推动了工作流。分析它为何在企业中重要，以及其遗留对后续协作工具和离线优先设计的影响。从中提炼对构建稳健、用户驱动的软件生态的启示。

items.title_en: Show HN: Termcraft – Terminal-first 2D sandbox survival in Rust
items.title_zh: Show HN：Termcraft – 终端优先的 2D 沙盒生存游戏，用 Rust 编写
items.summary_en: Termcraft is a Rust-based, terminal-first 2D sandbox survival game, emphasizing minimal UI and open-ended gameplay fit for hackers and hobbyists.
items.summary_zh: Termcraft 是一个用 Rust 编写的终端优先的 2D 沙盒生存游戏，强调极简界面和开放式玩法，适合黑客与爱好者。

items.title_en: GitHub appears to be struggling with measly three nines availability
items.title_zh: GitHub 的可用性似乎仅有 99.9%（三九），引发关注
items.summary_en: GitHub appears to be facing reliability issues despite being a core platform for developers, raising concerns about SLOs and uptime for massive code and CI pipelines. The outages stress the need for stronger resilience planning and incident response.
items.summary_zh: GitHub 作为开发者的核心平台，正面临可靠性问题，令大规模代码托管与持续集成流水线的可用性成为焦点。事件暴露出在弹性设计和应急响应方面的不足，强调需要更强的容错能力。

items.title_en: Centuries of selective breeding turned wild cabbage into different vegetables
items.title_zh: 数百年的育种让野生甘蓝演变成各种蔬菜
items.summary_en: Tracing centuries of selective breeding, the piece shows how wild cabbage gave rise to a variety of vegetables such as cabbage, kale, and broccoli. It highlights the genetics and history behind today’s crop diversity.
items.summary_zh: 回顾数百年的选择性育种，揭示野生甘蓝如何演化成甘蓝、羽衣甘蓝、花椰菜等多种蔬菜，并强调其背后的遗传与育种历史。

items.title_en: Tell HN: H&R Block tax software installs a TLS backdoor
items.title_zh: Tell HN：H&R Block 税务软件内置 TLS 后门
items.summary_en: A disclosure reveals a TLS backdoor in H&R Block tax software, highlighting severe security and trust risks for users.
items.summary_zh: 披露显示 H&R Block 税务软件内置 TLS 后门，暴露出对用户的严重安全与信任风险。

items.title_en: Book: The Emerging Science of Machine Learning Benchmarks
items.title_zh: 机器学习基准测试的新兴科学
items.summary_en: The book surveys how benchmarks are designed and how we evaluate ML models fairly, emphasizing the subtle biases that can mislead progress. It also explains why benchmarking choices matter for researchers and for industry adoption.
items.summary_zh: 本书系统梳理机器学习基准测试的设计原则、评估公平性中的细微差别，以及基准对研究与产业应用的影响。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Apple terminated our dev account over a rogue employee
items.title_zh: Ask HN：苹果因一名员工的违规行为终止了我们的开发者账户
items.summary_en: A developer recounts Apple terminating their developer account due to an employee's misbehavior, highlighting the fragility of platform trust and the opaque review processes. The story suggests the need for clearer remediation paths and better separation of duties.
items.summary_zh: 开发者讲述因一名员工的违规行为，苹果终止了他们的开发者账户，凸显平台信任与审核流程的脆弱性。事件呼吁提供更清晰的申诉与纠错路径，以及更完善的职责分离。

items.title_en: Too Much Color
items.title_zh: 太多颜色
items.summary_en: The author warns that oversized color palettes in design systems create cognitive load, inconsistencies, and accessibility pitfalls, advocating for fewer semantic tokens and stronger contrast rules. Simplifying color usage helps teams move faster and produce more coherent, accessible interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 作者提醒，设计系统中过多的颜色会增加认知负担、导致风格不一致并带来可访问性问题，主张采用更少的语义化色彩令牌和更严格的对比规范。简化色彩使用能让团队更高效并产出更统一、易用的界面。

items.title_en: Six ingenious ways how Canon DSLRs used to illuminate their autofocus points
items.title_zh: 佳能数码单反在低光环境下照亮对焦点的六种巧妙用法
items.summary_en: Canon DSLRs have used various tricks to illuminate autofocus points in low light, from built-in assist lamps to post-processing cues. The article outlines six clever techniques designers built into or around the cameras to help achieve sharp focus when ambient light is poor.
items.summary_zh: 佳能数码单反在低光环境下帮助对焦的照明方式有多种设计，从内置对焦辅助灯到光线外设的应用。文章梳理了六种巧妙的技术手段，帮助相机在昏暗场景中实现更锐利的对焦。

items.title_en: Meta's Omnilingual MT for 1,600 Languages
items.title_zh: Meta 的 Omnilingual MT 支持1600种语言的机器翻译
items.summary_en: Meta unveils Omnilingual MT, a multilingual machine translation model designed to handle 1,600 languages in a single system. By pooling data across languages, it aims to improve coverage for underrepresented tongues and reduce translation gaps, though performance may vary by language. The deployment could reshape access to information for many communities.
items.summary_zh: Meta 公开 Omnilingual MT，一套面向1600种语言的通用翻译模型。通过跨语言数据整合提升对小语种的覆盖，尽管不同语言的翻译质量差异可能较大，但长期有望扩大信息获取的平等性。实际应用前景需关注数据规模与偏见等挑战。

items.title_en: Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework
items.title_zh: 衡量通往通用人工智能（AGI）的进展：一个认知框架
items.summary_en: Google DeepMind proposes a cognitive framework to measure progress toward AGI, outlining metrics and benchmarks that assess cross-domain reasoning, learning efficiency, and robustness. The framework prompts ongoing conversations about how to evaluate intelligence in machines.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌 DeepMind 提出一个用于衡量通往 AGI 进展的认知框架，概述评估跨领域推理、学习效率与鲁棒性的指标与基准。该框架推动对机器智能评估方法的持续讨论。

items.title_en: Apideck CLI – An AI-agent interface with much lower context consumption than MCP
items.title_zh: Apideck CLI：比 MCP 更低上下文消耗的 AI 代理接口
items.summary_en: Apideck launches a CLI-based AI-agent interface that uses far smaller context windows than MCP. The approach reduces prompt sizing overhead and accelerates iterative AI-driven workflows for developers integrating APIs.
items.summary_zh: Apideck 推出基于命令行的 AI 代理接口，使用比 MCP 更小的上下文窗口。此举降低提示规模开销，加速在 API 集成中的 AI 驱动工作流。

items.title_en: An industrial piping contractor on Claude Code [video]
items.title_zh: 一名管道承包商谈 Claude Code（视频）
items.summary_en: A piping contractor discusses Claude Code in a video, sharing real-world impressions of Claude's coding capabilities and limitations in industrial contexts.
items.summary_zh: 一名管道承包商在视频中聊到 Claude Code，分享在工业场景中对 Claude 的编码能力与局限性的真实观察。

items.title_en: Kona EV Hacking
items.title_zh: Kona 电动车安全研究
items.summary_en: Summarizes security research on the Kona EV, outlining potential vulnerabilities across key systems such as remote access and charging interfaces. The findings underscore the importance of secure firmware updates and defense-in-depth for connected vehicles.
items.summary_zh: 对Kona电动汽车的安全研究揭示了电子系统中的潜在漏洞，涉及远程访问、钥匙/充电接口等侧面。强调需要通过安全的固件更新、签名验证和多层防护提升车辆的整体安全性。

items.title_en: RX – a new random-access JSON alternative
items.title_zh: RX：一种新的随机访问 JSON 替代方案
items.summary_en: RX offers a data format with random-access capabilities that aims to outperform JSON on certain workloads, enabling direct access to nested structures without full parsing. It uses a binary layout with indexing and streaming semantics, suited for data intensive apps.
items.summary_zh: RX 提供具备随机访问能力的新的数据格式，旨在在某些工作负载上优于 JSON，实现对嵌套结构的直接访问而无需完整解析。它采用二进制格式并带有索引与流式语义，适用于数据密集型应用，但需配套的工具链和设计模式。

items.title_en: What every computer scientist should know about floating-point arithmetic (1991) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 计算机科学家应了解的浮点运算（1991）
items.summary_en: A foundational look at floating-point arithmetic, outlining issues such as rounding, representation limits, and error propagation. It emphasizes numerical stability and provides practical guidance for writing robust, portable numerical code.
items.summary_zh: 概述浮点数运算中的常见陷阱，如舍入误差、表示范围和误差积累，强调数值稳定性的重要性，并给出编写健壮、可移植数值代码的实用建议。

items.title_en: Books of the Century by Le Monde
items.title_zh: Le Monde 的世纪书单（100 本书）
items.summary_en: Le Monde has published a list of 100 books of the century, spanning global fiction, non-fiction, and classics. Standard Ebooks is releasing accessible editions to widen readership; the collection sparks discussions about canonical works and current relevance.
items.summary_zh: 《世纪书单》列出世纪百本书，涵盖全球文学与非虚构作品。Standard Ebooks 推出无障碍电子版，帮助更广泛读者接触经典。该名单也引发对何为‘世纪之作’的讨论和当代相关性的话题。

items.title_en: Using calculus to do number theory
items.title_zh: 用微积分解决数论问题
items.summary_en: Explores using calculus-inspired methods, particularly Hensel's Lemma and p-adic analysis, to tackle number-theory questions.
items.summary_zh: 探索用微积分相关方法来解决数论问题，特别是使用汉塞尔引理等工具以及 p 进分析，展示了将连续数学思想应用到离散结构的跨界思路。

items.title_en: From Oscilloscope to Wireshark: A UDP Story (2022)
items.title_zh: 从示波器到 Wireshark：UDP 的故事（2022）
items.summary_en: A retrospective tracing UDP's evolution from simple, raw datagrams to modern packet analysis with tools like Wireshark. It highlights the trade-offs between speed and reliability and the ongoing innovations in debugging network traffic.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 UDP 如何从简单的数据报发展到如今由 Wireshark 等工具支撑的网络包分析。强调在速度与可靠性之间的权衡，以及网络调试方法的持续创新。

items.title_en: HopTab – Open source macOS app switcher and tiler that replaces Cmd+Tab
items.title_zh: HopTab：替代 Cmd+Tab 的开源 macOS 应用切换与平铺工具
items.summary_en: HopTab is an open-source macOS app switcher and tiler that replaces Cmd+Tab with a more powerful switcher and window tiling. It showcases community-driven enhancements to macOS UX and could improve multitasking for power users. The project reflects growing appetite for user-level productivity tools in the ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: HopTab 是一个开源的 macOS 应用切换与平铺工具，替代 Cmd+Tab 提供更强大的切换与窗口平铺能力。该项目体现了社区对提升 macOS 用户体验的持续推动，并可能提升高强度用户的多任务效率。

items.title_en: A pig's brain has been frozen with its cellular activity locked in place
items.title_zh: 一头猪的大脑被冷冻，细胞活性被“锁定”
items.summary_en: Scientists have cryopreserved a pig brain with cellular activity preserved, marking a step toward future revival research and raising ethics questions.
items.summary_zh: 科学家将猪脑冷冻并保持细胞活性，标志着未来再活化研究的一步，同时引发伦理讨论。

items.title_en: Celebrating Tony Hoare's mark on computer science
items.title_zh: 致敬 Tony Hoare 对计算机科学的影响
items.summary_en: Reflects on Tony Hoare's lasting impact on computer science, from foundational algorithms to formal methods and software engineering practices. The piece ties his innovations to modern programming languages and verification techniques that engineers still rely on.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 Tony Hoare 对计算机科学的深远影响——从基础算法到形式化方法与软件工程实践。其创新在现代编程语言与验证技术中仍然具有重要作用。

items.title_en: Eniac, the First General-Purpose Digital Computer, Turns 80
items.title_zh: ENIAC：首台通用数字计算机迎来 80 岁
items.summary_en: ENIAC's 80th anniversary piece recounts the invention, vacuum-tube architecture, and foundational role in modern computing, highlighting both breakthroughs and limitations.
items.summary_zh: 纪念 ENIAC 面向通用数字计算机的 80 周年，回顾其发明、真空管架构及对现代计算的奠基性作用，同时指出其局限性与影响。

items.title_en: Trevor Milton is raising funds for a new jet he claims will transform flying
items.title_zh: Trevor Milton 正为新型喷气机融资，声称将改变飞行
items.summary_en: Trevor Milton is raising funds for a new jet project, promising transformative aviation technology. Investors should scrutinize claims and governance given Milton's controversial track record.
items.summary_zh: 特雷弗·米尔顿正为一款新型喷气机项目寻求资金，声称将革新航空业。考虑到他与 Nikola 的法律纠纷与信誉问题，投资者应保持审慎并关注治理与披露。

items.title_en: 2025 Turing award given for quantum information science
items.title_zh: 2025 年图灵奖授予量子信息科学
items.summary_en: ACM's 2025 Turing Award honors transformative work in quantum information science, marking a rare bridge between physics and computer science. The recognition signals growing research momentum and potential real-world impact from quantum technologies. For engineers, it's a milestone that could accelerate investment, talent, and innovation in quantum computing.
items.summary_zh: 2025 年图灵奖表彰在量子信息科学领域的突破性工作，体现物理学与计算机科学的跨学科融合日益成熟。此荣誉反映量子技术正获得更大的研究投入和现实潜力，将影响未来的计算基础设施。对技术领域从业者而言，这是推动量子计算相关投资、人才与创新节奏的信号。

items.title_en: Show HN: Signet – Autonomous wildfire tracking from satellite and weather data
items.title_zh: Show HN：Signet——基于卫星与天气数据的自治野火跟踪
items.summary_en: Signet fuses satellite imagery with weather data to autonomously track wildfire risk and spread, delivering real-time monitoring and alerts. The project showcases how accessible data and lightweight analytics can augment firefighting decision-making.
items.summary_zh: Signet 将卫星影像与气象数据融合，实现对野火的自主监测和风险评估，提供实时跟踪与预警。该方案展示了可用数据和简化分析在提升消防决策中的作用。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pgit – A Git-like CLI backed by PostgreSQL
items.title_zh: Show HN: Pgit — 一个以 PostgreSQL 为后端的类 Git 的命令行工具
items.summary_en: Pgit offers a Git-like CLI backed by PostgreSQL, enabling versioned file storage with SQL-level querying and multi-tenant capabilities. It trades off conventional Git performance for strong data integrity and database-backed collaboration workflows.
items.summary_zh: Pgit 提供一个以 PostgreSQL 为后端的类 Git 的命令行界面，允许用 SQL 查询对版本化数据进行管理，并支持多租户协作。它在数据完整性和团队协作方面具有潜在优势，但可能在性能与生态兼容性上带来取舍。

items.title_en: The IBM scientist who rewrote the rules of information just won a Turing Award
items.title_zh: 改写信息规则的 IBM 科学家荣获图灵奖
items.summary_en: Celebrates Charles Bennett, an IBM scientist whose work on the physics of information earned him a Turing Award, underscoring foundational contributions to information theory.
items.summary_zh: 庆祝 IBM 科学家 Charles Bennett 因信息物理的贡献荣获图灵奖，强调他在信息理论方面的奠基性贡献。

items.title_en: Prompt Injecting Contributing.md
items.title_zh: Prompt 注入贡献指南
items.summary_en: Prompt Injecting Contributing.md discusses prompt injection as a governance risk in open source and provides guidelines for contributors to mitigate risks and improve project safety.
items.summary_zh: Prompt 注入问题成为开源项目的治理挑战，文中提出 contributor 指南等应对策略，帮助社区降低被利用的风险并提升安全性。

items.title_en: Schizophrenia study finds new biomarker, drug candidate in mice
items.title_zh: 精神分裂症研究在小鼠中发现新的生物标志物与药物候选
items.summary_en: A study identifies a novel biomarker and a potential drug candidate for cognitive symptoms in schizophrenia, marking a potential therapeutic direction.
items.summary_zh: 研究在精神分裂症的小鼠模型中发现新的生物标志物与潜在药物候选，指向认知症状治疗的新方向。

items.title_en: Even faster asin() was staring right at me
items.title_zh: 甚至更快的 asin() 就在人眼前
items.summary_en: A technical note on optimizing the arcsin function for speed, likely through algorithmic tweaks or vectorization, with benchmarking results.
items.summary_zh: 一篇关于提升 asin() 计算速度的技术笔记，可能通过算法改进或向量化实现，并给出基准测试结果。

items.title_en: The Shape of Inequalities
items.title_zh: 不平等的形状
items.summary_en: This piece explores how inequality manifests as structural patterns rather than one-off metrics, using data visualization and analysis to reveal underlying shapes that inform policy and design.
items.summary_zh: 本文从数据角度探讨不平等的形状，强调不仅仅是数字指标，更有结构性和系统性的差异。通过可视化与分析，讨论如何在政策与设计层面回应这些结构性不平等。

items.title_en: Leviathan (1651)
items.summary_en: Leviathan (1651) offers a framework for centralized authority and social contract thinking that resonates with modern platform governance and AI policy debates. The text provides a philosophical lens on authority, trust, and collective security in technology ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 《利维坦》提供的集中权力框架为当代平台治理和 AI 政策辩论提供哲学参照，探讨权威、信任与共同安全的问题。此书对设计去中心化系统与治理结构仍具启发性。

items.title_en: Comparing Python Type Checkers: Typing Spec Conformance
items.title_zh: 比较 Python 类型检查器在遵循类型规范方面的对比
items.summary_en: Comparative analysis of Python type checkers focusing on conformance to typing specs, evaluating how faithfully tools enforce type rules across projects. It helps choose tooling for type safety.
items.summary_zh: 比较 Python 类型检查器在遵循类型规范方面的对比，评估工具在项目中对类型规则的执行一致性。为选择类型安全工具提供参考。

items.title_en: The Ugliest Airplane: An Appreciation
items.title_zh: 最丑飞机：一段鉴赏
items.summary_en: The piece spotlights an aircraft commonly deemed aesthetically unappealing yet notable for its engineering or historical significance, illustrating how design quirks can reflect different priorities.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章聚焦于一架广为被认为外观丑陋的飞机，强调其在工程或历史上的独特价值，并展示设计风格与功能取向之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Show HN: Thermal Receipt Printers – Markdown and Web UI
items.title_zh: Show HN：热敏收据打印机—Markdown 与网页界面
items.summary_en: Show HN: Thermal Receipt Printers – Markdown and Web UI presents a project that controls thermal printers via a Markdown-driven config and a browser-based UI. It lowers the barrier to template design and integration for makers, cafes, or small shops.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：热敏收据打印机项目提供一个基于 Markdown 的配置与网页界面控制方式，降低了模板设计和集成的门槛。非常适合发烧友、咖啡店和小型商户的快速搭建。

items.title_en: Common Lisp Development Tooling
items.title_zh: Common Lisp 开发工具链
items.summary_en: An overview of Common Lisp development tooling, including modern REPL workflows, editors, and package management systems, showing Lisp can stay productive with contemporary tooling.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Common Lisp 的开发工具生态，涵盖现代 REPL 工作流、编辑器和包管理系统，显示 Lisp 在现代化工具下仍具生产力。

items.title_en: Cert Authorities Check for DNSSEC from Today
items.title_zh: 自今日起证书颁发机构将对 DNSSEC 的部署进行核验
items.summary_en: Starting today, certificate authorities will verify DNSSEC deployment and correctness, tightening security around DNS resolution. The move should improve trust in domain integrity and encourage operators to enable DNSSEC.
items.summary_zh: 自今日起，证书颁发机构将对 DNSSEC 的部署与正确性进行核验，加强域名解析的安全性。此举有望提升域名完整性的信任度，并促使运营方启用 DNSSEC。

items.title_en: How many branches can your CPU predict?
items.title_zh: 你的 CPU 能预测多少分支？
items.summary_en: Explores how many branches modern CPUs can predict effectively and what that means for microarchitectural design and software performance. The piece explains tradeoffs and diminishing returns as branch complexity grows.
items.summary_zh: 探讨现代 CPU 能够有效预测的分支数量，以及这对微架构设计和软件性能的影响。文章分析了在分支复杂度增加时的权衡与收益递减。

items.title_en: Reviewing Large Changes with Jujutsu
items.title_zh: 用 Jujutsu 审查大规模变更
items.summary_en: The post discusses how to review large code changes efficiently, with tooling and workflow practices that break diffs into digestible chunks, maintain context, and support structured reviews to keep momentum on big feature branches.
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨如何用专门工具和工作流高效审查大规模代码变更，强调把大改动拆解成易于理解的片段、保持上下文以及结构化评审压力以保持开发节奏。

items.title_en: Brute-forcing my algorithmic ignorance
items.title_zh: 用 LLM 在 7 天内暴力弥补我的算法无知
items.summary_en: Chronicles a personal experiment using a large language model to fill gaps in algorithm knowledge over a week, with insights on effective prompting and learning strategies. Highlights both potential and limits of AI-assisted self-education.
items.summary_zh: 记录在七天内利用大语言模型弥补算法盲点的个人实验，分享有效提示与学习策略。揭示 AI 辅助自学的潜力与局限。

items.title_en: JavaScript Is Enough
items.title_zh: JavaScript 就够用
items.summary_en: JavaScript Is Enough argues that JS remains a remarkably capable platform for most web tasks and beyond, thanks to its ecosystem, tooling, and ubiquity. The piece challenges language-purity anxieties and invites readers to lean into pragmatic, monolingual development.
items.summary_zh: 主张 JavaScript 已足以应对大多数 Web 任务，得益于丰富的生态、工具链与广泛应用范围。文章挑战对语言纯粹性的执着，提倡以务实为先的开发思路。

items.title_en: A case against currying
items.title_zh: 对柯里化的反对意见
items.summary_en: Argues that currying can harm readability and debugging in real-world code, especially as function chains grow. The piece advocates pragmatic function design and cautions against overusing point-free styles.
items.summary_zh: 指出在实际代码中，柯里化可能降低可读性和调试性，尤其当函数链日益复杂时。提倡更务实的函数设计，警惕过度使用点-free 风格。

items.title_en: I turned Markdown into a protocol for generative UI
items.title_zh: 我把 Markdown 转成生成式 UI 的协议
items.summary_en: This piece describes turning Markdown into a protocol for generative UI, enabling machine-readable UI descriptions that can drive automated UI generation.
items.summary_zh: 将 Markdown 转化为生成式 UI 的协议，意在用可机器解析的描述来驱动界面生成，推动更具声明性和可组合性的 UI 开发。

items.title_en: EU Inc.: A new harmonised corporate legal regime
items.title_zh: EU Inc.：统一的公司法制度
items.summary_en: EU is pursuing a harmonised corporate legal regime to streamline cross-border business, with implications for governance, reporting, and competition.
items.summary_zh: 欧盟推动统一的公司法制度，以简化跨境经营，影响公司治理、资本市场与竞争政策。

items.title_en: Language model teams as distributed systems
items.title_zh: 把语言模型团队视作分布式系统
items.summary_en: Argues that language model teams behave like distributed systems, requiring clear interfaces, governance, data pipelines, and observability. Presents patterns for scaling AI-enabled products across multiple teams.
items.summary_zh: 认为语言模型团队如同分布式系统运作，需要清晰的接口、治理、数据管线与可观测性，并给出在多团队环境中扩展 AI 驱动产品的模式。

items.title_en: 'Miracle': Europe reconnects with lost spacecraft
items.title_zh: 奇迹：欧洲重新与失落的航天器建立联系
items.summary_en: Reports Europe reconnecting with a previously lost spacecraft, highlighting resilience in space missions and implications for future deep-space communications.
items.summary_zh: 报道欧洲重新与一度失联的航天器取得联系，凸显太空任务的韧性及对未来深空通信的影响。

items.title_en: Federal Right to Privacy Act – Draft legislation
items.title_zh: 联邦隐私权法案 - 草案立法
items.summary_en: Draft federal privacy legislation outlines individual data rights, consent mechanisms, and obligations for data controllers, aiming to set a unified national standard. The proposal could shape compliance, enforcement, and tech company practices.
items.summary_zh: 草案性联邦隐私法规定了个人数据权利、同意机制及数据控制方义务，试图建立统一的国家标准，可能影响合规要求、执法和科技公司实践。

items.title_en: On The Need For Understanding
items.title_zh: 对理解的需要
items.summary_en: A reflection arguing for deeper understanding, likely in technology and AI, stressing the importance of explainability and human-centric reasoning in complex systems.
items.summary_zh: 反思强调在科技与人工智能领域需要更深的理解，凸显可解释性、思维模型与人类推理在复杂系统中的重要性。

items.title_en: Electron microscopy shows ‘mouse bite’ defects in semiconductors
items.title_zh: 电子显微镜显示半导体的‘鼠咬痕’缺陷
items.summary_en: Electron microscopy reveals 'mouse bite' defects in semiconductors, a morphology that lowers yield and reliability. Understanding these defects helps guide fabrication process improvements and materials research for more resilient devices.
items.summary_zh: 电子显微镜揭示半导体制造中的‘mouse bite’缺陷，这类形貌会降低产率与可靠性。相关发现将推动工艺改进与材料研究，以提升器件稳定性。

items.title_en: FSFE supporters affected: Payment provider Nexi cancelled us
items.title_zh: 受影响的 FSFE 支持者：支付提供商 Nexi 取消了我们的服务
items.summary_en: A payment provider terminated service for the Free Software Foundation Europe, disrupting donations and membership payments and prompting concern about dependency on centralized payment processors. The incident underscores risks to civil society groups when financial rails can be cut off without transparent recourse.
items.summary_zh: 一家支付服务商终止了对自由软件基金会欧洲分支的服务，导致捐款和会费支付中断，并引发对依赖集中支付通道的担忧。该事件凸显了当金融通道被切断而缺乏透明救济时，对民间组织的潜在风险。

items.title_en: How many branches can your CPU predict?
items.title_zh: 你的 CPU 能预测多少个分支？
items.summary_en: Explores the capacity of modern branch predictors, illustrating how many distinct branches a predictor can track and how history length and aliasing affect accuracy. The takeaway is that software and compiler teams should understand predictor limits when optimizing performance-sensitive code.
items.summary_zh: 探讨现代分支预测器的容量，展示预测器能追踪的不同分支数量，以及历史长度与别名效应如何影响准确性。结论是，优化性能敏感代码时需理解预测器的极限。

items.title_en: A ngrok-style secure tunnel server written in Rust and Open Source
items.title_zh: Rust 实现的 ngrok 风格安全隧道服务器，开源
items.summary_en: An open-source project builds a secure tunnel server in Rust, offering an ngrok-like capability to expose local services behind NAT or firewalls. It emphasizes safety-conscious design and Rust’s suitability for network utilities, with potential use cases in development and testing environments.
items.summary_zh: 一个开源项目用 Rust 构建了一个 ngrok 风格的安全隧道服务器，便于将本地服务暴露在公网上。强调安全设计，并展示 Rust 在网络工具中的应用潜力，适合开发与测试场景。

items.title_en: MM120, a pharmaceutical form of LSD, shown to reduce anxiety symptoms (2025)
items.title_zh: MM120，一种 LSD 药物形态，显示能缓解焦虑症状（2025）
items.summary_en: A 2025 study on MM-120, a psychedelic LSD formulation, showing potential anxiety relief, with discussion of clinical results and safety considerations.
items.summary_zh: 2025 年研究显示 MM-120——一种 LSD 药物形态，在缓解焦虑症状方面具有潜在作用，同时讨论了临床结果与安全性。

items.title_en: LLMs predict my coffee
items.title_zh: 大型语言模型预测我的咖啡
items.summary_en: A playful experiment where an LLM tries to predict your coffee order from context, highlighting both AI's approachable utility and its limits in day-to-day decisions. The exercise illustrates how language models can augment personal assistant tasks, but privacy and accuracy concerns remain.
items.summary_zh: 一个有趣的实验：大型语言模型试图根据上下文预测你的咖啡订单，展示了 AI 在日常助理任务中的潜力与局限。该练习突显了语言模型在生活场景中的应用价值，同时也引发关于隐私和准确性的讨论。

items.title_en: Xiaomi launches next-gen SU7 with 902 km range and Lidar, still undercuts Tesla
items.title_zh: 小米推出下一代 SU7：902 公里续航与激光雷达，售价仍低于特斯拉
items.summary_en: Xiaomi reveals its next-gen SU7 EV with an official 902 km range and lidar, while pricing remains aggressively under Tesla's. The move highlights intensifying price-performance competition in EVs and pressure on incumbents to justify premium features.
items.summary_zh: 小米公布下一代 SU7 电动车，官方续航 902 公里并配备激光雷达，同时售价仍然低于特斯拉。此举凸显电动汽车在性价比方面的竞争加剧，以及对传统厂商在高端功能定价上的压力。

items.title_en: IBM, sonic delay lines, and the history of the 80×24 display (2019)
items.title_zh: IBM、声波延迟线与80×24显示屏的历史
items.summary_en: Explores IBM's sonic delay lines and the development of the iconic 80×24 character displays, illustrating how hardware constraints shaped early computing interfaces. The piece connects historical tech choices to modern UI and display design.
items.summary_zh: 介绍IBM的声波延迟线及80×24字符显示屏的历史演变，说明早期硬件约束如何塑造用户界面。文章把历史技术选择与现代显示设计联系起来。

items.title_en: Building a Reader for the Smallest Hard Drive
items.title_zh: 为最小硬盘打造读盘器
items.summary_en: An engineer documents reverse‑engineering and building a custom reader for an extremely small and obscure hard drive, covering mechanical adaptation, signal capture, and decoding challenges. The write‑up shows the practical hacks needed to recover data from tiny, legacy storage devices when standard tools won't work.
items.summary_zh: 作者记录了为一款极小且罕见的硬盘逆向并自制读盘器的全过程，涉及机械改装、信号捕获与解码等难题。文章展示了在标准工具无法使用时，从旧式小型存储设备中恢复数据所需的实用技巧。

items.title_en: North Korean's 100k fake IT workers net $500M a year for Kim
items.title_zh: 朝鲜 10 万名假 IT 工作者年赚 5 亿美金
items.summary_en: Researchers reveal North Korea-run network employing ~100k fake IT workers to generate roughly $500M annually for the regime. The piece underscores how digital labor ghost workers are used for sanctions-busting finance and cyber operations.
items.summary_zh: 研究揭示朝鲜运营的庞大虚假 IT 劳工网络，约 10 万名假雇员每年为政权带来约 5 亿美元收入。报道揭示此类数字劳工如何被用于对外筹资和网络行动等。

items.title_en: Show HN: Crust – A CLI framework for TypeScript and Bun
items.title_zh: Show HN：Crust 是一个面向 TypeScript 与 Bun 的 CLI 框架
items.summary_en: Show HN: Crust is a CLI framework for TypeScript and Bun, aiming to simplify building robust CLIs with TypeScript. It offers tooling for command parsing, scaffolding, and modular plugins, enabling fast CLI development.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Crust 是一个面向 TypeScript 与 Bun 的 CLI 框架，旨在简化高质量命令行工具的开发。提供命令解析、脚手架与插件化等功能，帮助快速构建 CLI。

items.title_en: EsoLang-Bench: Evaluating Genuine Reasoning in LLMs via Esoteric Languages
items.title_zh: EsoLang-Bench：用晦涩语言评估 LLM 的推理能力
items.summary_en: EsoLang-Bench tests genuine reasoning in large language models by presenting esoteric programming languages that challenge familiar patterns. The benchmark probes how models handle unfamiliar syntax and logical constraints beyond standard tests.
items.summary_zh: EsoLang-Bench 通过晦涩的编程语言挑战大模型的推理能力，检验模型在面对陌生语法和逻辑约束时的表现。该基准用于揭示超出常规测试的推理和泛化能力。

items.title_en: Ramtrack.eu – RAM Price Intelligence
items.title_zh: Ramtrack.eu — RAM 价格情报
items.summary_en: Ramtrack.eu aggregates RAM pricing to offer price intelligence, helping buyers foresee trends and optimize memory procurement.
items.summary_zh: Ramtrack.eu 提供 RAM 价格情报，聚合不同市场的内存价格，帮助买家把握行情与采购策略。

items.title_en: Show HN: Antfly: Distributed, Multimodal Search and Memory and Graphs in Go
items.title_zh: Show HN：Antfly——用 Go 实现的分布式跨模态搜索、记忆与图谱
items.summary_en: Antfly presents a Go-based distributed system for cross-modal search with memory graphs. It showcases techniques for indexing multimodal data, distributed query processing, and graph-backed memory to support persistent, context-rich searches.
items.summary_zh: Antfly 提供一个用 Go 编写的分布式跨模态搜索系统，结合记忆图实现持久化上下文。展示了对多模态数据建立索引、分布式查询处理以及基于图的记忆的实现思路。

items.title_en: Show HN: What if your synthesizer was powered by APL (or a dumb K clone)?
items.title_zh: Show HN：如果你的合成器由 APL（或一个简化的 K 克隆）驱动？
items.summary_en: K-Synth explores powering a synthesizer with APL (or a K-like language), turning language-oriented DSP into a compact, expressive tool. It highlights language-based approaches to music synthesis and the limits of self-contained interpreters.
items.summary_zh: K-Synth 探索用 APL（或类似 K 的语言）驱动合成器，将以语言为中心的数字信号处理变成简洁而富表达力的工具，展示了语言驱动的音频合成思路及自包含解释器的边界。

items.title_en: Toward automated verification of unreviewed AI-generated code
items.title_zh: 走向对未经人工审阅的 AI 生成代码的自动化验证
items.summary_en: It surveys approaches like static analysis, formal methods, and test generation to detect bugs, unsafe patterns, or licensing issues, aiming to make AI-assisted coding safer.
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨在人工审阅前对 AI 生成代码进行自动化验证的技术与挑战，概述静态分析、形式化方法和测试生成等手段，用以发现漏洞、潜在风险及许可风险，提升 AI 辅助编码的安全性。

items.title_en: ZJIT removes redundant object loads and stores
items.title_zh: ZJIT 移除冗余对象加载与存储
items.summary_en: ZJIT eliminates redundant object loads and stores to reduce memory traffic and GC pressure in Ruby, shaving latency for Rails apps under load.
items.summary_zh: ZJIT 通过消除冗余的对象加载与存储，降低内存带宽消耗和垃圾回收压力，提升 Rails 应用在高并发场景下的性能。

items.title_en: Ask HN: How do you deal with people who trust LLMs?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：你怎么对待相信大型语言模型的人？
items.summary_en: A discussion on strategies to communicate limitations of LLMs to users who overtrust them, including transparency, source verification, and guardrails. Practical tips help avoid overreliance and misrepresentation.
items.summary_zh: 讨论如何与过度信赖大型语言模型的用户沟通，提供透明度、来源核验与安全边界等应对策略。

items.title_en: Google Engineers Launch "Sashiko" for Agentic AI Code Review of the Linux Kernel
items.title_zh: 谷歌工程师推出 Sashiko：用于 Linux 内核的代理式 AI 代码审查
items.summary_en: Sashiko is a Google-developed tool enabling agent-assisted AI code review for the Linux kernel. It demonstrates attempts to apply agentic AI to critical, low-level codebases, raising questions about reliability, safety, and governance in kernel development.
items.summary_zh: Sashiko 是谷歌开发的工具，支持在 Linux 内核中进行代理驱动的 AI 代码审查。它展示了将代理式 AI 应用于关键、底层代码库的尝试，同时引发关于可靠性、安全性和治理的讨论。

items.title_en: Why I may ‘hire’ AI instead of a graduate student
items.title_zh: 为什么我可能会雇用 AI 而不是研究生
items.summary_en: An argument that AI assistants can substitute for some tasks traditionally done by graduate students, discussing trade-offs in cost, speed, and quality.
items.summary_zh: 讨论在某些任务上雇佣 AI 助手替代研究生的可行性，分析成本、效率与质量之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Generating All 32-Bit Primes (Part I)
items.title_zh: 生成所有32位素数（第一部分）
items.summary_en: Describes an approach to enumerating all primes within the 32-bit range, balancing memory limits with sieve-like techniques and primality testing. The write-up touches on practical implications for testing cryptographic libraries and hardware, and invites optimization discussion.
items.summary_zh: 讲述在32位范围内枚举所有质数的做法，兼顾内存约束和筛法等技术，以及素性测试的要点。文中指出这一工作对测试加密库和硬件的实用意义，并邀请读者就优化展开讨论。

items.title_en: Trivy ecosystem supply chain briefly compromised
items.title_zh: Trivy 生态系统供应链短暂受损
items.summary_en: A security advisory reports a brief compromise in the Trivy ecosystem, prompting updates and coordinated responses for users to mitigate supply-chain risk. The incident underscores the fragility of open-source tooling and the need for rapid patching.
items.summary_zh: Trivy 生态系统短暂受损的安全公告促使用户更新并采取应对措施，以降低供应链风险。事件凸显开源工具的脆弱性及快速修补的重要性。

items.title_en: Bandit: A 32bit baremetal computer that runs Color Forth [video]
items.title_zh: Bandit：一台32位裸机计算机运行 Color Forth（视频）
items.summary_en: Bandit showcases a minimal 32-bit bare-metal computer that runs Color Forth, a compact and unique language, in a video demonstration. The project highlights how language design and hardware constraints intersect in retro-computing experiments.
items.summary_zh: Bandit 展示了一台运行 Color Forth 的32位裸机计算机，视频演示凸显在复古计算实验中语言设计与硬件约束的交汇。

items.title_en: Senior European journalist suspended over AI-generated quotes
items.title_zh: 资深欧洲记者因 AI 生成的引语被停职
items.summary_en: A senior journalist was suspended after publishing quotes generated by AI, prompting questions about attribution and verification in journalism. The incident underscores growing ethical and verification challenges as AI becomes a tool in reporting.
items.summary_zh: 一位资深欧洲记者因刊发由 AI 生成的引语而被停职，事件引发关于报道署名与证据核实的伦理讨论。此事凸显了 AI 作为新闻工具带来的新挑战：如何确保来源可核查与真实。

items.title_en: Atuin v18.13 – better search, a PTY proxy, and AI for your shell
items.title_zh: Atuin v18.13：改进搜索、PTY 代理，并为你的 shell 增添 AI 能力
items.summary_en: Atuin v18.13 improves search, adds a PTY proxy, and introduces AI features for shell workflows, enhancing productivity and interoperability with terminal tools.
items.summary_zh: Atuin 最新版本 v18.13 增强了全局搜索、引入了一个 PTY 代理，并在 shell 工作流中加入 AI 功能，提升生产力与工具互操作性。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Voltair (YC W26) – Drone and charging network for power utilities
items.title_zh: Launch HN: Voltair（YC W26）—— 面向电力公用事业的无人机与充电网络
items.summary_en: Voltair, a YC W26-backed startup, builds a drone and charging network for power utilities to improve inspection, maintenance, and grid reliability through automation and on-site charging.
items.summary_zh: Voltair 是 YC W26 支持的初创团队，打造面向电力公用事业的无人机与充电网络平台，用以提升巡检、维护和网络可靠性。通过自动化数据采集与就地充电，aim to降低运维成本与风险。

items.title_en: Discontinuation and reinitiation of dual-labeled GLP-1 receptor agonists
items.title_zh: 双标 GLP-1 受体激动剂的停用与重新启动
items.summary_en: Discontinuation and reinitiation of dual-labeled GLP-1 receptor agonists may raise cardiovascular risks, underscoring the importance of adherence in therapy.
items.summary_zh: 停用并重新开始双标 GLP-1 受体激动剂可能增加心血管风险，强调坚持用药的重要性及潜在临床影响。

items.title_en: Teaching Claude to QA a mobile app
items.title_zh: 教 Claude 对移动应用进行 QA
items.summary_en: Teaching Claude to QA a mobile app demonstrates how chat-based models can contribute to test planning, scenario generation, and bug triage. It shows practical approaches to injecting AI into QA workflows without sacrificing rigor.
items.summary_zh: 让 Claude 执行移动应用 QA 的尝试，展示了对话模型在测试计划、场景生成和缺陷分拣等环节的潜在作用。演示了将 AI 融入 QA 流程时可用的具体方法，同时强调需保持严格的质控。

items.title_en: The bespoke software revolution? I'm not buying it
items.title_zh: 定制软件革命？我不买账
items.summary_en: He argues that broad claims of a bespoke software revolution are overblown, noting barriers like cost, complexity, and vendor lock-in. The piece challenges the hype around tailor-made software replacing off-the-shelf solutions and advocates practical, incremental customization.
items.summary_zh: 作者质疑所谓的定制化软件革命，指出成本、复杂性与供应商锁定等壁垒。文中质疑量身定制的软件能否取代现成方案，并提倡务实的渐进式定制。

items.title_en: Lent and Lisp
items.title_zh: 斋期与 Lisp
items.summary_en: A reflective pairing of Lent with Lisp, examining how constraints and discipline shape programming taste and a language's expressiveness.
items.summary_zh: 从约束与专注的角度，探讨斋期与 Lisp 的关系，以及它们如何塑造编程审美与语言表达力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Tmux-IDE, OSS agent-first terminal IDE
items.title_zh: Show HN：Tmux-IDE，开源的以代理为先的终端集成开发环境
items.summary_en: Tmux-IDE is an open-source terminal IDE that prioritizes agent-driven workflows inside a tmux session. It blends a lightweight terminal workspace with an IDE-like experience for developers who live in the terminal. A glimpse into how agents can orchestrate coding tasks in a minimal, reproducible setup.
items.summary_zh: Tmux-IDE 是一个以代理驱动工作流为核心的开源终端集成开发环境，运行在 tmux 会话中。它为习惯在终端工作的开发者提供接近 IDE 的体验。展示了通过代理在一个简洁、可复现的环境中编排编码任务的思路。

items.title_en: Ask HN: AI productivity gains – do you fire devs or build better products?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：AI 生产力提升——裁员还是做出更好产品？
items.summary_en: A discussion about how AI-driven productivity affects staffing decisions; many users advocate investing in better tooling and upskilling rather than mass layoffs; outcomes emphasize product impact and higher leverage.
items.summary_zh: 关于 AI 提升生产力对人员配置的影响展开讨论，普遍观点倾向于通过更好的工具和技能提升来提升产出，而非大规模裁员；重点在于将 AI 效益转化为产品和业务的杠杆。

items.title_en: Cryptography in Home Entertainment (2004)
items.title_zh: 家庭娱乐中的密码学（2004）
items.summary_en: A historical look at cryptography in consumer entertainment devices around 2004, examining DRM, copy protection, and the evolving tension between security and usability.
items.summary_zh: 回顾2004年左右家庭娱乐设备中的密码学应用，聚焦数字版权管理、拷贝保护及安全性与易用性之间的博弈。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Voygr (YC W26) – A better maps API for agents and AI apps
items.title_zh: Voygr（YC W26）——为代理和 AI 应用提供更好的地图 API
items.summary_en: Voygr offers a maps API designed for agents and AI apps, aiming to streamline location reasoning, routing, and geocoding for autonomous assistants. The product emphasizes speed and structured data to support decision-making.
items.summary_zh: Voygr 提供专为代理与 AI 应用设计的地图 API，简化位置推理、路由与地理编码，支持自主助手的决策过程。强调高效与结构化数据，便于集成。

items.title_en: A new Bigfoot documentary helps explain our conspiracy-minded era
items.title_zh: 新纪录片揭示我们这个阴谋论盛行时代
items.summary_en: A new Bigfoot documentary is used as a lens to examine how misinformation and conspiratorial thinking shape contemporary culture and media consumption. It offers perspectives on skepticism, evidence, and storytelling.
items.summary_zh: 新纪录片以大脚怪为线索，审视当下社会中的错误信息与阴谋论思维如何塑造文化与媒体消费，探讨怀疑、证据与叙事的关系。

items.title_en: Apple announces new Mac sales record following MacBook Neo launch
items.title_zh: 苹果在 MacBook Neo 发布后宣布新的 Mac 销售纪录
items.summary_en: Apple posts a new Mac sales record after launching the MacBook Neo, signaling healthy demand for refreshed hardware and premium laptops.
items.summary_zh: 苹果在推出 MacBook Neo 之后公布新的 Mac 销售纪录，显示高端笔记本的强劲需求。

items.title_en: Pandas Exercises for Data Analysis (Interactive)
items.title_zh: 用于数据分析的 Pandas 互动练习
items.summary_en: A curated set of interactive Pandas exercises for data analysis in Python. It guides you through common tasks like loading, cleaning, transforming, and grouping data, with hands-on coding challenges you can run in-browser.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个交互式的 Pandas 练习集合，帮助你在浏览器中练习数据分析的核心技能。内容涵盖数据加载、清洗、变换以及分组聚合等常见任务，适合巩固实际工作中的数据工作流。

items.title_en: In space, no one can hear you kernel panic (2020)
