items.title_zh: 在太空中，没人能听见内核崩溃（2020）
items.summary_en: Space-grade software faces extreme reliability demands; kernel panics can be mission-critical in orbit. The piece surveys how engineers stress-test kernels, simulate faults, and design robust recovery when ground-based debugging is limited by latency and isolation.
items.summary_zh: 太空中的软件需要极高的可靠性，轨道上的内核崩溃可能影响任务。文章回顾工程师如何在有限的调试机会、长延迟和环境隔离的情况下，通过压力测试、仿真和鲁棒设计来应对崩溃。

items.title_en: Ask HN: What breaks first when your team grows from 10 to 50 people?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：当团队从10人扩张到50人，你先坏掉的是什么？
items.summary_en: An Ask HN thread collecting anecdotes on scaling organizations from 10 to 50 people, highlighting breakdowns in communication, culture, onboarding, and architecture.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个 Ask HN 讨论串，汇集了在团队从10人扩张到50人时最先出的问题，涉及沟通、文化、招聘与代码架构等方面的挑战。

items.title_en: The paddle wheel aircraft carriers of Lake Michigan
items.title_zh: 密歇根湖上的桨轮航空母舰
items.summary_en: Historical exploration of paddle-wheel aircraft carriers on Lake Michigan, illustrating a creative adaptation of existing ships to support early aviation experiments. It sheds light on the ingenuity and limits of mid-20th-century naval logistics.
items.summary_zh: 这篇历史文章讲述密歇根湖上的桨轮航空母舰，展示在现有船只上进行航空支援的创造性尝试，以及当时海军后勤的局限。

items.title_en: Where does engineering go? Retreat findings and insights [pdf]
items.title_zh: 工程的去向：Retreat 的发现与洞察（PDF）
items.summary_en: ThoughtWorks' retreat produced findings on the future of software engineering, including organizational design, collaboration models, and distributed work patterns. The PDF distills practical takeaways for teams building next-gen software.
items.summary_zh: ThoughtWorks 的 retreat 总结了软件工程的未来走向，包括组织设计、协作模式与分布式工作方式。PDF 提炼出面向构建下一代软件的实际建议。

items.title_en: The Impact of AI on Game Dev Jobs. Open to Work Crisis
items.title_zh: AI 对游戏开发岗位的影响：开启找工作危机
items.summary_en: Analyzes how AI tools are reshaping game development jobs—from asset generation to code writing—and discusses the Open to Work crisis for developers. The piece argues for upskilling and new workflows to harness AI without eroding opportunity.
items.summary_zh: 分析AI工具如何改变游戏开发岗位，从素材生成到代码编写，并探讨开发者的就业危机。文章主张通过技能升级和新工作流程，在不压缩机会的前提下有效利用AI。

items.title_en: Stdwin: Standard window interface by Guido Van Rossum [pdf]
items.title_zh: Stdwin：Guido Van Rossum 的标准窗口界面 [PDF]
items.summary_en: A historical proposal for a standard GUI windowing interface, outlining widget model and event handling; relevant to GUI toolkit design and Python's UI history.
items.summary_zh: 这份指南性文档由 Guido van Rossum 提出，描述了一个标准化的窗口界面设计思路，包括控件模型和事件处理，对于 GUI 工具包的设计和 Python 生态有历史意义。

items.title_en: Spotify playing ads for paid subscribers
items.title_zh: Spotify 在付费订阅用户中投放广告
items.summary_en: Reports that Spotify is running ads for paying subscribers, hinting at experimentation with ad-supported features within Premium tiers or transitional pricing. The change could affect subscriber experience and monetization strategy.
items.summary_zh: 有报道称 Spotify 在付费订阅用户群体中投放广告，暗示可能在 Premium 版本中引入广告支持的实验或定价策略调整，影响用户体验与变现路径。

items.title_en: A data center opened next door. Then came the high-pitched whine
items.title_zh: 隔壁新开数据中心，随后传来刺耳嗡鸣
items.summary_en: An exposé about a new data center next door bringing noise and electricity demand to local residents. It discusses tradeoffs between regional economic growth from data infrastructure and community quality of life, including noise and energy use.
items.summary_zh: 报道聚焦新近落成的数据中心邻近社区带来的噪音和能源消耗等影响，探讨数据基础设施带来的地区经济机会与对居民生活质量之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Consensus Board Game
items.title_zh: 共识棋盘游戏
items.summary_en: A Consensus Board Game simulates distributed agreement, helping players grasp how consensus protocols reach agreement despite failures and adversarial conditions. It yields intuition for leader election, quorums, and fault tolerance in distributed systems.
items.summary_zh: 这款共识棋盘游戏通过桌面对局模拟分布式达成一致的过程，帮助玩家理解在容错和故障环境下如何达成共识。它能直观呈现领导者选举、法定人数与容错等概念。

items.title_en: Show HN: Playing LongTurn FreeCiv with Friends
items.title_zh: Show HN：我用 LongTurn 与朋友一起玩 FreeCiv
items.summary_en: Demonstrates playing FreeCiv with friends using LongTurn, enabling asynchronous multiplayer and easy cross-device play. It showcases how lightweight, web-friendly tooling can revive a classic strategy game.
items.summary_zh: 展示了通过 LongTurn 与朋友异步联机玩 FreeCiv，跨时区也能进行多人对局，体现开源工具在经典策略游戏中的应用。

items.title_en: Excel incorrectly assumes that the year 1900 is a leap year
items.title_zh: Excel 错把1900年当作闰年
items.summary_en: Excel's historical date logic treats 1900 as a leap year for compatibility, causing subtle date calculation errors in spreadsheets. The quirk underlines the importance of understanding software-era assumptions when processing dates.
items.summary_zh: Excel 为了向后兼容把1900年误认成闰年，导致日期计算出现微妙错误。这一怪癖强调在处理日期时要理解软件时代的假设。

items.title_en: Hawaii's worst flooding in 20 years threatens dam, prompts evacuations
items.title_zh: 夏威夷二十年来最严重的洪水威胁大坝并引发撤离
items.summary_en: Hawaii faces its worst flooding in two decades, threatening dams and prompting evacuations as authorities mobilize emergency responses and infrastructure assessments.
items.summary_zh: 夏威夷二十年来最严重的洪水，威胁大坝并引发撤离，相关部门展开应急响应与基础设施评估。

items.title_en: Show HN: GDSL – 800 line kernel: Lisp subset in 500, C subset in 1300
items.title_zh: Show HN：GDSL——800 行内核：500 行 Lisp 子集，1300 行 C 子集
items.summary_en: GDSL demonstrates a tiny kernel: about 800 lines of C-like kernel code plus a Lisp subset (500 lines) and a C subset (1300 lines), highlighting the possibility of minimal OS design and its educational value. A proof-of-concept for compact systems programming.
items.summary_zh: GDSL 展示了一个 800 行内核的极简实现，辅以 500 行 Lisp 子集和 1300 行 C 子集，强调最小化系统的可能性与教育价值。这个概念证明了紧凑型系统编程的可行性。

items.title_en: How we give every user SQL access to a shared ClickHouse cluster
items.title_zh: 我们如何让每个用户都能访问共享的 ClickHouse 集群的 SQL
items.summary_en: A blog details a scalable approach to give each user SQL access to a shared ClickHouse cluster, balancing isolation and efficiency with a lightweight access layer. The technique simplifies multi-tenant analytics while raising considerations for security and resource governance.
items.summary_zh: 一篇博文介绍通过轻量化接入层，让每个用户都能在共享的 ClickHouse 集群上执行 SQL，兼顾数据隔离与性能。该方法有助于降低运维成本与实现集中化分析，但也提出安全与资源治理方面的挑战。

items.title_en: Czech Man's Stone in Barn's Foundations Is Rare Bronze Age Spearhead Mold
items.title_zh: 捷克男子谷仓地基中的石头竟是罕见青铜时代矛头模具
items.summary_en: A farmer's barn stone turned out to be a mold used to cast Bronze Age spearheads, revealing a clever, practical artifact-sourcing during the era. The find sheds light on Bronze Age metalworking and local exchange networks.
items.summary_zh: 一块出现在捷克男子谷仓地基中的石头，被认定是铸造青铜时代矛头的模具，揭示了当时的实用工具与冶铸工艺。该发现为了解青铜时代的冶金作业和地方交流网络提供线索。

items.title_en: How the Eon Team Produced a Virtual Embodied Fly
items.title_zh: Eon 团队如何打造一个具身化的虚拟蝇
items.summary_en: Describes how the Eon team built a virtual embodied fly, combining AI, robotics, and brain-inspired control to simulate perception and behavior. The work sheds light on embodied AI research and the challenges of aligning digital creatures with real-world dynamics.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Eon 团队如何打造一个具身化的虚拟蝇，融合人工智能、机器人学与类脑控制，模拟感知与行为。该工作揭示了具身化人工智能研究的前沿挑战与现实世界动力学的对齐难题。

items.title_en: iBook Clamshell
items.title_zh: iBook Clamshell（复刻版）
items.summary_en: Introducing iBook Clamshell project, likely a restoration or replica of the iconic iBook clamshell, with focus on hardware design and community tinkering. It captures the enduring appeal of vintage Apple aesthetics and the DIY hardware culture.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 iBook Clamshell 项目，可能是对标志性 iBook 翼形设计的复刻或修复，聚焦硬件设计与社区改造。体现了复古苹果风格的持续吸引力以及开源硬件文化。

items.title_en: Padel Chess – tactical simulator for padel
items.title_zh: 帕德尔棋：帕德尔球战术模拟器
items.summary_en: Padel Chess offers a tactical simulator for padel players, helping analyze positions and practice strategy beyond traditional drills. It combines board-game-like reasoning with real-time sport movement insights.
items.summary_zh: Padel Chess 为帕德尔球爱好者提供战术模拟器，帮助分析局势、练习策略，超越简单的训练。它将棋盘式推演与实际运动要点结合，提升比赛准备。

items.title_en: Node.js worker threads are problematic, but they work great for us
items.title_zh: Node.js 的工作线程有问题，但对我们很有效
items.summary_en: Examines trade-offs of Node.js worker_threads, acknowledging potential complexities and pitfalls, yet showing they deliver needed parallelism for the authors' use cases. Includes pragmatic patterns that keep them reliable in production.
items.summary_zh: 分析 Node.js worker_threads 的利弊，承认潜在的复杂性与风险，但在特定用例中确实带来所需的并行性，分享让其在生产中稳定运行的实用模式。

items.title_en: Gummy Geometry
items.title_zh: 果冻几何
items.summary_en: Gummy Geometry presents a browser-based soft-body geometry demo, merging jelly-like deformations with 3D rendering. It’s a playful showcase of WebGL/JavaScript physics that doubles as a learning resource for soft-material simulations.
items.summary_zh: Gummy Geometry 提供了一个基于浏览器的软体几何演示，将果冻状的形变与三维渲染相结合。它既是 WebGL/JavaScript 物理的直观展示，也是学习软物质仿真的一个很好的入门例子。

items.title_en: Why Are Viral Capsids Icosahedral?
items.title_zh: 病毒衣壳为何呈二十面体对称？
items.summary_en: Viral capsids commonly adopt icosahedral symmetry to maximize enclosed volume with minimal genetic information. The geometry contributes to robust assembly and stability, informing nanotech designs that mimic viral architecture.
items.summary_zh: 病毒衣壳为何呈现二十面体对称？这种几何结构能在最少的遗传信息下最大化所容纳体积并增强稳定性。此类对称性对自组装研究和纳米技术设计具有启发意义。

items.title_en: Autoresearch Hub
items.title_zh: AutoResearch Hub（自动研究中心）
items.summary_en: Autoresearch Hub is a platform designed to centralize and automate research workflows, helping users gather, organize, and synthesize sources. It emphasizes AI-assisted literature reviews, citation management, and team collaboration. Takeaway: a dedicated research hub can boost productivity for engineers and academics.
items.summary_zh: Autoresearch Hub 提供一个集中化的研究工作流平台，帮助用户收集、整理并综合来源。强调 AI 辅助的文献综述、引用管理与团队协作功能。要点：专业的研究中心有助于提升工程师与学术工作的产出效率。

items.title_en: Show HN: Revise – An AI Editor for Documents
items.title_zh: Revise：文档的 AI 编辑器
items.summary_en: Introduces Revise, an AI-powered editor for documents focused on streamlining drafting, consistency, and practical writing aid rather than flashy AI theatrics.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Revise，一款面向文档的 AI 编辑器，聚焦提升起草效率与一致性，强调务实的写作辅助。

items.title_en: Show HN: Horizon – GPU-accelerated infinite-canvas terminal in Rust
items.title_zh: Show HN：Horizon — 用 Rust 实现的 GPU 加速无穷画布终端
items.summary_en: Horizon is a GPU-accelerated infinite-canvas terminal written in Rust, enabling expansive, fast, and expressive terminal workflows. It demonstrates how hardware acceleration can unlock novel interfaces for shell users.
items.summary_zh: Horizon 是用 Rust 编写、GPU 加速的无限画布终端，支持大幅扩展、快速渲染的命令行工作流。该项目展示了硬件加速如何为终端用户带来新型交互界面。

items.title_en: Show HN: Fatal Core Dump – A debugging murder mystery played with GDB
items.title_zh: Show HN: 致命核心转储——用 GDB 上演的调试悬疑
items.summary_en: A Show HN project turning debugging into a murder-mystery game, using core dumps and GDB to guide players through a puzzle. It demonstrates how interactive debugging concepts can be gamified for learning and entertainment.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 项目把调试变成一场以核心转储和 GDB 为线索的推理游戏，玩家在线索中解谜。展示了将交互式调试知识以游戏化方式呈现的可行性。

items.title_en: Gitana 18: the new flying Ultim trimaran
items.title_zh: Gitana 18：新型飞行式 Ultim 三体帆船的极端技术选择
items.summary_en: Gitana 18 unveils the latest flying Ultim trimaran, built around radical technical choices to push speed and handling in ocean racing.
items.summary_zh: Gitana 18 是最新的飞行式 Ultim 三体帆船，采用一系列极端技术选项以提升高速性能。文中聚焦包括导翼、船体结构、材料与配重等设计决策，展示海上竞速装备的前沿水平。

items.title_en: Turns out your coffee addiction may be doing your brain a favor
items.title_zh: Turns out your coffee addiction may be doing your brain a favor
items.summary_en: Notes research indicating caffeine consumption can confer cognitive benefits like improved attention, while also acknowledging potential downsides and the need for moderation.
items.summary_zh: 指出研究表明咖啡因摄入可能带来认知益处，如提升注意力，同时也要注意副作用并保持适度。

items.title_en: Efficient sparse computations using linear algebra aware compilers (2025)
items.title_zh: 使用线性代数感知编译器实现高效稀疏计算
items.summary_en: A study shows how linear algebra aware compilers can emit highly optimized code for sparse matrices, delivering meaningful speedups in ML and scientific computing. It demonstrates that exposing algebraic structure to compilers can unlock performance without changing algorithms.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示，若编译器能理解稀疏矩阵的结构，便能产出更高效的向量化代码，从而显著提升机器学习与科学计算的性能。核心在于让编译器暴露代数结构，而无需改动算法。

items.title_en: Torturing Rustc by Emulating HKTs
items.title_zh: 通过模拟 HKTs 来折磨 Rustc
items.summary_en: A deep dive into emulating higher-kinded types (HKTs) in Rust, exploring compiler behavior, trait tricks, and the limits of type-level engineering. The write-up showcases how researchers stress test rustc and what that implies for Rust's type system.
items.summary_zh: 深入探讨在 Rust 中模拟高阶类型（HKTs），揭示编译器行为、trait 技巧及类型系统的边界。文章展示了研究者如何对 rustc 进行压力测试，以及这对 Rust 类型系统的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Why craft-lovers are losing their craft
items.title_zh: 为什么热爱手工的人正在失去手艺
items.summary_en: Argues that AI and LLMs are accelerating the erosion of traditional craft, as automation commodifies processes and dilutes artisanal skills; the piece calls for preserving craft through intent and community.
items.summary_zh: 指出AI与大型语言模型正在加速手工艺的流失，因为自动化将工艺流程商品化、削弱工匠技艺；文章呼吁通过坚持创作意图和社区来保护手艺。

items.title_en: Oil nears $110 a barrel after gas field strike
items.title_zh: 气田罢工后油价逼近每桶110美元
items.summary_en: Oil trading near $110 a barrel after a gas field strike raises supply concerns. The disruption underlines how geopolitical and energy supply shocks influence commodity markets and can ripple into inflation and tech costs. Investors watch for impact on inflation and capex.
items.summary_zh: 由于气田罢工引发供应担忧，油价接近每桶 110 美元。此类供应冲击凸显地缘政治与能源市场波动对大宗商品的影响，可能冲击通胀、运输成本与科技行业的成本结构。

items.title_en: Why Lab Coats Turned White
items.title_zh: 为什么实验室外套变白了
items.summary_en: Explores the history and practical reasons behind white lab coats, including cleanliness, visibility of stains, and safety norms that shaped lab attire.
items.summary_zh: 解读实验室外套为何普遍为白色，涉及清洁、污渍可见性与安全规范等原因。

items.title_en: The day I discovered type design
items.title_zh: 我第一次发现字体设计的日子
items.summary_en: A personal reflection on discovering typography and its craft, revealing how letterforms, spacing, and visual rhythm shape interfaces. It offers practical takeaways for designers and developers about the power of typography in UX.
items.summary_zh: 回顾自己首次接触字体设计的经历，揭示字形、字距与视觉节奏如何塑造界面。为设计师与开发者提供关于排版在用户体验中的作用的实用启示。

items.title_en: Turing Award Honors Bennett and Brassard for Quantum Information Science
items.title_zh: 图灵奖表彰 Bennett 与 Brassard 在量子信息科学领域的贡献
items.summary_en: The ACM Turing Award honors Bennett and Brassard for foundational work in quantum information science, notably quantum cryptography and communication protocols like BB84. The recognition underscores how theoretical breakthroughs translate into practical cybersecurity and computing technology.
items.summary_zh: 这项由 ACM 授予的图灵奖表彰 Bennett 和 Brassard 在量子信息科学领域的奠基性工作，尤其是量子密码学与 BB84 等通信协议。此荣誉凸显理论突破向实际网络安全与计算技术的转化。

items.title_en: The next fight over the use of facial recognition could be in the supermarkets
items.title_zh: 人脸识别的下一场斗争可能在超市发生
items.summary_en: The next frontier of facial recognition policy battles could be in supermarkets, where stores weigh safety, regulatory compliance, and consumer privacy in real-world shopping.
items.summary_zh: 人脸识别的下一轮监管之争可能在超市等零售场景展开，商店需要在安全、法规合规与消费者隐私之间权衡。

items.title_en: Show HN: March Madness Bracket Challenge for AI Agents Only
items.title_zh: Show HN：仅限 AI 代理参加的三月疯狂对阵挑战
items.summary_en: Show HN: March Madness Bracket Challenge for AI Agents Only. An automated, AI-driven tournament where agents compete to predict the NCAA bracket, illustrating planning, evaluation, and agent collaboration techniques.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：仅限 AI 代理参加的三月疯狂对阵挑战，展示代理在编排计划、评估与协作中的能力。该项目以自动化的方式对抗 NCAA 锦标赛分布。

items.title_en: Show HN: I made an email app inspired by Arc browser
items.title_zh: Show HN：我做了一个受 Arc 浏览器启发的电子邮件应用
items.summary_en: An email client inspired by Arc browser's design philosophy, emphasizing speed, clean UI, and a keyboard-first workflow. It demonstrates how design influence from browser-focused startups can transfer to mainstream email experiences.
items.summary_zh: 这款电子邮件应用受到 Arc 浏览器的设计语言启发，强调快速、简洁的界面和键盘优先的工作流。它展示了浏览器风格的 UX 模式如何迁移到电子邮件应用中。

items.title_en: It's Their Mona Lisa
items.title_zh: 那是他们的蒙娜丽莎
items.summary_en: Examines how a work can be treated as a Mona Lisa for others, highlighting how icon status reshapes interpretation and value.
items.summary_zh: 探讨某件作品如何被视作他人的蒙娜丽莎，揭示偶像地位如何改变解读和价值评估。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Canary (YC W26) – AI QA that understands your code
items.title_zh: Launch HN：Canary（YC W26）—— 能理解你代码的 AI QA
items.summary_en: Canary is a YC W26 AI QA product that claims to understand your code, enabling AI-assisted Q&A and code review workflows. The launch signals growing demand for AI-augmented software engineering tools.
items.summary_zh: Canary 是 YC W26 的 AI QA 产品，声称能理解你的代码并辅助问答与审查。该产品代表 AI 在代码层面的实际应用趋势，以及对开发流程的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Hyper-optimized reverse geocoding API
items.title_zh: 超高效的反向地理编码 API
items.summary_en: Describes a hyper-optimized reverse geocoding API focusing on speed, accuracy, and scalability for location-based services.
items.summary_zh: 描述一个超高效的反向地理编码 API，聚焦速度、准确性与可扩展性，展示在大规模地理服务中的应用价值。

items.title_en: Show HN: Hackerbrief – Top posts on Hacker News summarized daily
items.title_zh: Show HN: Hackerbrief——每日摘要 Hacker News 顶帖
items.summary_en: Show HN presenting Hackerbrief, a daily digest that summarizes top Hacker News posts for quick reading. Helps busy readers stay current without scrolling.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示 Hackerbrief，每日摘要 Hacker News 的热门帖子，方便高效获取要点。

items.title_en: The seven hour explosion nobody could explain
items.title_zh: 无人能解释的七小时爆炸
items.summary_en: Researchers describe a seven-hour explosion that remains unexplained, with investigators analyzing instrument data and witness accounts to reconstruct what happened. The mystery underscores the difficulties of incident reconstruction and the limits of early data.
items.summary_zh: 七小时爆炸事件仍难以解释，调查人员正在分析仪器数据与目击证词以重建发生过程。此事凸显事件重建的挑战以及对早期数据的局限性。

items.title_en: Human Organ Atlas
items.title_zh: 人体器官图谱
items.summary_en: Human Organ Atlas provides atlas-like data on human organs, enabling researchers to study anatomy, imaging, and organ-specific biology at scale.
items.summary_zh: Human Organ Atlas 提供关于人体器官的解剖与成像数据集，便于研究者在大规模上开展解剖学、影像学和器官生物学研究。

items.title_en: They're Vibe-Coding Spam Now
items.title_zh: 垃圾邮件如今采用情绪编码
items.summary_en: The piece discusses a trend where spam messages use vibe-coding to align with cultural trends, using memes, emojis, and tone to bypass filters and entice engagement; includes examples of how marketers exploit vibe signals in emails.
items.summary_zh: 讨论垃圾邮件如何利用情绪编码来贴近潮流、使用表情符号和口吻来诱导点击，甚至规避简单的过滤。给出具体实例并分析对邮箱安全和品牌信任的影响。

items.title_en: Democratic Backsliding Reaches Western Democracies, U.S. Decline "Unprecedented"
items.title_zh: 民主倒退蔓延至西方民主国家，美国处境前所未有下降
items.summary_en: A briefing notes that democratic backsliding has spread to Western democracies, with the U.S. experiencing an unprecedented decline according to the report. It discusses indicators, causes like polarization, and potential tech-policy implications for platforms hosting public discourse.
items.summary_zh: 简报指出民主倒退已扩散至西方民主国家，美国的处境据称达到前所未有的下降。讨论了相关指标、成因（如政治极化）以及对承载公共讨论的平台在技术政策方面的潜在影响。

items.title_en: I Reverse-Engineered the TiinyAI Pocket Lab from Marketing Photos
items.title_zh: 我从营销照片逆向分析了 TiinyAI Pocket Lab
items.summary_en: The author reverse-engineers TiinyAI Pocket Lab by analyzing marketing photos, revealing internal components and performance limits; demonstrates how product marketing can hint at specs and prompts discussion about transparency in consumer hardware.
items.summary_zh: 作者据市场宣传照对 TiinyAI Pocket Lab 进行反向工程，揭示内部构造、关键部件及性能约束。文章还讨论如何通过宣传图推断产品规格，以及这类做法对消费者透明度的影响。

items.title_en: Jepsen: MariaDB Galera Cluster 12.1.2
items.title_zh: Jepsen：MariaDB Galera 集群 12.1.2
items.summary_en: Jepsen tests MariaDB Galera Cluster 12.1.2 for consistency and fault tolerance under failure scenarios, revealing where edge cases bite. The analysis offers pragmatic reliability guidance for operators relying on Galera in production.
items.summary_zh: Jepsen 对 MariaDB Galera 集群 12.1.2 进行一致性与鲁棒性分析，评估在分区与故障情况下的表现。报告指出了若干边缘情况，并给出生产环境的可靠性改进建议，帮助运维把控风险。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Kita (YC W26) – Automate credit review in emerging markets
items.title_zh: Kita（YC W26）——在新兴市场自动化信用评估
items.summary_en: Kita, a YC W26 startup, automates credit review in emerging markets using data-driven risk models and streamlined workflows. The platform aims to unlock lending to underserved populations by reducing manual review time and increasing consistency.
items.summary_zh: Kita 是 YC 第26届冬季班的初创公司，专注于在新兴市场自动化信用评估，利用数据驱动的风控模型和简化的工作流。该平台旨在通过降低人工审核时间、提升评估一致性，从而帮助未被充分服务的借款人获得信贷。

items.title_en: Love of corporate bullshit is correlated with bad judgment
items.title_zh: 对企业官腔的迷恋与判断力差相关
items.summary_en: Argues that affinity for corporate jargon correlates with poor judgment, critiquing rhetoric-heavy communication and advocating for clarity in decision-making.
items.summary_zh: 指出对企业官腔的偏好与糊涂判断之间的相关性，批评过度口号化的沟通方式对决策造成负面影响。

items.title_en: What’s on HTTP?
items.title_zh: HTTP 上有哪些内容？
items.summary_en: A concise look at the current state and ideas around HTTP, covering protocol evolutions, security, and tooling for developers. It provides practical context for building web services in 2024 and beyond.
items.summary_zh: 该站点对 HTTP 的现状与发展进行了简要梳理，涵盖协议演进、安全与工具等方面，为开发者在当前及未来构建 Web 服务提供实用背景。

items.title_en: DoorDash Tasks
items.title_zh: DoorDash 推出任务功能
items.summary_en: DoorDash launches a new 'Tasks' platform to orchestrate and track work across operations. The feature aims to streamline workflows, improve reliability, and enable teams to automate routine tasks. It hints at a broader move toward programmable operations inside consumer platforms.
items.summary_zh: DoorDash 推出名为 Tasks 的任务平台，用于编排和跟踪运营工作，提升流程自动化和可靠性。此举暗示平台运营将向可编程化和自动化方向发展，供团队使用的 API/界面将增多。

items.title_en: Android developer verification: Balancing openness and choice with safety
items.title_zh: Android 开发者验证：在开放性与安全性之间寻求平衡
items.summary_en: Describes updates to Android's developer verification to preserve openness while enforcing safety controls. Emphasizes stronger checks and risk-based gating to reduce abuse without stifling legitimate developers.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Android 开发者验证流程的更新，旨在在保持开放生态的同时加强安全控制。强调通过更严格的检查和风险分级入口来减少滥用，同时不压制合规开发者。

items.title_en: Launch an autonomous AI agent with sandboxed execution in 2 lines of code
items.title_zh: 用两行代码启动具沙盒执行的自治 AI 代理
items.summary_en: Two lines of code launch an autonomous AI agent that runs in a sandbox, enabling safe experimentation and rapid prototyping. The approach underscores how sandboxing enables modular, testable AI workflows with minimal setup.
items.summary_zh: 两行代码即可启动具沙盒执行的自治 AI 代理，极大降低试验门槛。沙盒化让 AI 工作流更安全、可测试、易于集成。

items.title_en: How Ford burned $12B in Brazil (2021)
items.title_zh: 福特在巴西亏损120亿美元（2021）
items.summary_en: Recounts Ford's $12B write-off in Brazil in 2021, tracing missteps, market conditions, and strategic drift that left the automaker restructuring its South American operations. It underscores the volatility of emerging markets for global automakers.
items.summary_zh: 回顾福特在2021年巴西的120亿美元亏损，梳理决策失误、市场环境与战略偏离，引发其在南美的重组举措，凸显新兴市场对全球汽车厂商的波动性。

items.title_en: Cross-Model Void Convergence: GPT-5.2 and Claude Opus 4.6 Deterministic Silence
items.title_zh: Cross-Model Void Convergence: GPT-5.2 与 Claude Opus 4.6 Deterministic Silence
items.summary_en: Notes a phenomenon where different models converge to deterministic ‘silence’ on certain prompts, exploring cross-model boundaries and implications for evaluation and reliability.
items.summary_zh: 记录在特定提示下，不同模型之间出现确定性“沉默”的现象，探讨跨模型的边界及对评估与可靠性的影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Red Grid Link – peer-to-peer team tracking over Bluetooth, no servers
items.title_zh: Show HN：Red Grid Link——基于蓝牙的点对点团队跟踪，无需服务器
items.summary_en: Red Grid Link offers peer-to-peer team tracking over Bluetooth with no servers, enabling offline collaboration and privacy-preserving coordination among teammates.
items.summary_zh: Red Grid Link 提供基于蓝牙的点对点团队跟踪，无需服务器，支持离线协作与隐私友好的团队协调。

items.title_en: How far can you go with IX Route Servers only?
items.title_zh: 仅靠 IX 路由服务器能走多远？
items.summary_en: An experimental look at peering using only Internet Exchange route servers, highlighting what you can achieve without running your own BGP speakers. It discusses coverage, performance, and policy constraints, illustrating the trade-offs between control and simplicity.
items.summary_zh: 对仅依赖 IX 路由服务器进行对等互连的可行性进行了实证评估。覆盖面广但受限于对等策略、性能波动与安全性等因素，需权衡自建路由器的控制力与依赖路由服务器的简化。

items.title_en: The Story of Marina Abramovic and Ulay (2020)
items.title_zh: 玛丽娜·阿布拉莫维奇与乌莱的故事（2020）
items.summary_en: A 2020 retrospective on the iconic performance art duo Marina Abramović and Ulay, tracing their collaborative experiments, breakups, and lasting impact on performance art.
items.summary_zh: 2020年对标志性行为艺术二人组玛丽娜·阿布拉莫维奇与乌莱的回顾，梳理他们共同实验、分道扬镳，以及对后世行为艺术的深远影响。

items.title_en: UK's Ofcom has today fined 4chan £450k for not having age checks in place
items.title_zh: 英国 Ofcom 因未设年龄验证被罚 45 万英镑
items.summary_en: Ofcom fines 4chan £450k for lacking age verification, highlighting regulatory expectations around protecting minors online and platform accountability.
items.summary_zh: Ofcom 因未设年龄验证对 4chan 处以罚款，文章讨论在线安全监管与平台合规的现实挑战。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built an interactive 3D three-body problem simulator in the browser
items.title_zh: Show HN: 我在浏览器里构建了一个交互式三体问题模拟器
items.summary_en: An in-browser 3D three-body problem simulator provides interactive visualization of chaotic gravitational dynamics, leveraging WebGL or canvas to render trajectories and explore stability regions.
items.summary_zh: 在浏览器中实现的交互式三体问题模拟器，提供对混沌天体动力学的可视化与交互探索，渲染轨迹并展示稳定区域。

items.title_en: Connecticut and the 1 Kilometer Effect
items.title_zh: 康涅狄格与 1 公里效应
items.summary_en: Explores how small geographic shifts, like a one-kilometer difference, can ripple through housing, commuting, and economic outcomes, illustrating geography’s role in policy and opportunity.
items.summary_zh: 介绍康涅狄格州的“1 公里效应”等地理经济现象，说明微小距离改变如何放大到居住、出行与经济结果等方面。

items.title_en: Chrome extension adjusts video speed based on how fast the speaker is talking
items.title_zh: Chrome 扩展：根据说话速度自动调节视频播放速度
items.summary_en: A Chrome extension that auto-adjusts video playback speed to match the speaker's pace, enhancing comprehension for dense talks and lectures. It can help viewers keep up with fast speakers without manual tweaks.
items.summary_zh: 一个 Chrome 扩展，自动根据演讲速度调整视频播放速度，提升对密集讲座与演讲的理解力。帮助观众在遇到讲得很快时无需手动调速就能跟上节奏。

items.title_en: How the Iran war threatens global food supply
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争如何威胁全球粮食供应
items.summary_en: Analyses explain how conflict involving Iran could disrupt grain trade, shipping routes, and energy markets, amplifying price volatility and food insecurity worldwide.
items.summary_zh: 分析指出，涉及伊朗的冲突可能扰乱粮食贸易、航运路线与能源市场，进而放大全球粮食价格波动与粮食安全风险。

items.title_en: Show HN: Baltic shadow fleet tracker – live AIS, cable proximity alerts
items.title_zh: Show HN：波罗的海影子舰队追踪器——实时 AIS、电缆近距警报
items.summary_en: An open-source Baltic shadow fleet tracker streams live AIS data and adds cable proximity alerts, offering a lightweight tool for monitoring subsea infrastructure and vessel movements.
items.summary_zh: 一个开源的波罗的海影子舰队追踪器，实时 AIS 数据并附带电缆近距警报，为监控海上基础设施与船舶动态提供轻量级工具。

items.title_en: SpiceCrypt: A Python library for decrypting LTspice encrypted model files
items.title_zh: SpiceCrypt：用于解密 LTspice 加密模型文件的 Python 库
items.summary_en: Introduces SpiceCrypt, a Python tool that decrypts LTspice-encrypted model files, enabling users to inspect and reuse proprietary models. The project lowers barriers for hardware researchers while raising questions about licensing and ethics.
items.summary_zh: SpiceCrypt 是一个 Python 库，可解密 LTspice 的加密模型文件，使用户能够查看或再利用专有模型。该工具降低了处理传统 SPICE 数据的门槛，同时也引发许可与伦理方面的讨论。

items.title_en: Show HN: Joonote – A note-taking app on your lock screen and notification panel
items.title_zh: Show HN: Joonote——一款在锁屏和通知面板上的记笔记应用
items.summary_en: Joonote is a minimalist note-taking app that lives on your lock screen and notification panel, enabling fast capture without unlocking your device. It emphasizes low-friction note-taking and privacy, with syncing across devices.
items.summary_zh: Joonote 是一款放在锁屏和通知区的极简记笔记应用，便于在不解锁设备时快速记录想法。它强调低阻力的捕捉体验，并提供跨设备的同步与隐私保护。

items.title_en: Kagi is contemplating the removal of the assistant from its professional tier
items.title_zh: Kagi 可能从专业版中移除助手功能
items.summary_en: Kagi is weighing removing the assistant feature from its professional tier, citing cost and product direction. The move could affect users who depend on AI-assisted workflows.
items.summary_zh: Kagi 正在考虑从专业版移除助手功能，作为成本与产品策略的一部分；此举可能影响依赖 AI 助手的用户。

items.title_en: Monuses and Heaps
items.title_zh: Monuses 与堆的探讨
items.summary_en: Monuses and Heaps explores algebraic structures and data-structure interactions, offering insights into algorithm design and invariants. The post translates theoretical ideas into practical takeaways for engineers building efficient tools. It’s a read for those curious about the underpinnings of language and memory management.
items.summary_zh: 探讨代数结构与数据结构之间的关系，揭示算法设计中的不变量与实现要点。文中将理论思路转化为工程实践的可用要点，适合对语言与内存管理底层感兴趣的读者。

items.title_en: NumKong: 2'000 Mixed Precision Kernels for All
items.title_zh: NumKong：2000 个混合精度内核，覆盖所有场景
items.summary_en: NumKong provides 2,000 mixed-precision kernels spanning matrix ops, activations, and utilities to speed up AI workloads on diverse hardware. The project highlights ongoing efforts to bridge high performance and accessibility in ML deployment.
items.summary_zh: NumKong 提供 2,000 个混合精度内核，覆盖矩阵运算、激活函数等，旨在提升多种硬件上的 AI 工作负载性能。该项目体现了通过定制化内核在高性能与易用性之间的权衡与努力。

items.title_en: Linux Page Faults, MMAP, and userfaultfd for faster VM boots
items.title_zh: Linux 页面错误、MMAP 与 userfaultfd 提速虚拟机启动
items.summary_en: Techniques using Linux page faults, memory mapping, and the userfaultfd mechanism to accelerate virtual machine boots are explored. The approach reduces boot time by handling faults lazily and prefetching critical pages, addressing virtualization latency in cloud workloads. This matters for operators seeking faster scale-up and more responsive VMs.
items.summary_zh: 探讨使用 Linux 页面错误、MMAP 和 userfaultfd 等机制加速虚拟机启动的方法。通过惰性处理页错误和对关键页的预取，降低启动延迟，降低云环境的虚拟化开销。对于需要快速弹性扩容和更高响应性的云工作负载尤为相关。

items.title_en: Bringing Semiconductors to Kazakhstan
items.title_zh: 在哈萨克斯坦推进半导体制造
items.summary_en: An article about semiconductor investment and manufacturing initiatives in Kazakhstan, signaling diversification of supply chains away from traditional hubs.
items.summary_zh: 关于在哈萨克斯坦推进半导体制造与投资的报道，显示半导体供给链多元化的趋势。

items.title_en: The Accidental Room (2018)
items.title_zh: 意外之室（2018）
items.summary_en: An episode explores how accidental architectural features can become usable rooms, revealing how unintended spaces shape behavior and acoustics. It delves into the social and design quirks that turn chance into functional space.
items.summary_zh: 节目讲述意外的房间如何成为可用空间的故事，揭示偶然设计、空间误入与声学体验对人们行为的影响。通过设计中的偶然性，讨论空间如何变成功能性的房间。

items.title_en: A Plain Anabaptist Story: The Hutterites
items.title_zh: 一则关于阿拿巴派信徒霍特里特人的平实故事
items.summary_en: The piece offers a plain-spoken look at Hutterites, an Anabaptist community known for communal living and crafts, contrasting their practices with mainstream tech culture. It highlights resilience and cultural distinctiveness.
items.summary_zh: 本文以朴素的笔触介绍阿拿巴派群体霍特里特人，他们以共同体生活和手工艺著称，与主流科技文化形成对照，展现他们的坚韧与独特性。

items.title_en: Type systems are leaky abstractions: the case of Map.take!/2
items.title_zh: 类型系统是漏出的抽象：Map.take!/2 的案例
items.summary_en: The post argues that type systems cannot capture all invariants, using Elixir's Map.take!/2 as a case study to illustrate how practical coding can violate types and require runtime checks. It discusses design implications for language builders and developers.
items.summary_zh: 该文认为类型系统无法覆盖所有不变性，以 Elixir 的 Map.take!/2 为案例，说明实际编码可能突破类型并需要运行时检查。讨论了对语言设计者与开发者的启示。

items.title_en: No Semicolons Needed
items.title_zh: 不需要分号
items.summary_en: An exploration of languages and styles that do not require semicolons, and what that design choice means for readability, tooling, and consistency. The takeaway is that syntax simplicity can trade off with discipline in code organization.
items.summary_zh: 评述不需要分号的语言与写法，以及该设计选择对可读性、工具链与代码一致性的影响。结论是语法简化有利于易读性，但也需要良好的代码组织约束。

items.title_en: Show HN: Browser grand strategy game for hundreds of players on huge maps
items.title_zh: Show HN：浏览器端的大型策略游戏
items.summary_en: A browser-based grand strategy game supports hundreds of players on a massive map, showcasing scalable multiplayer design in the browser. It demonstrates that large-scale, real-time strategy experiences can run without native apps using modern web tech.
items.summary_zh: 这款浏览器端大型策略游戏支持数百名玩家在超大地图上对战，展示了浏览器内实现大规模多人游戏的可行性。利用现代网页技术即可在无需原生应用的情况下提供大型实时体验。

items.title_en: Remove your ring camera with a claw hammer
items.title_zh: 用扳锤拆除你的 Ring 摄像头
items.summary_en: A provocative piece arguing for privacy by removing surveillance devices, discusses practical and legal considerations.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张通过移除 Ring 摄像头提升隐私，讨论相关的安全、法律与合规考量，以及实现途径的激进性。

items.title_en: Wander – A tiny, decentralised tool (just 2 files) to explore the small web
items.title_zh: Wander：一个仅两份文件即可使用的去中心化小型网络探索工具
items.summary_en: Wander is a tiny, decentralized tool to explore the 'small web' with just two files. It emphasizes lightweight, privacy-friendly exploration without relying on central servers. The project offers a minimal, reproducible approach to discovering indie sites and feeds.
items.summary_zh: Wander 是一个仅用两份文件即可使用的去中心化小型网络探索工具。它强调轻量与隐私友好地探索小型网络，不依赖中心服务器。该项目提供了发现独立站点和订阅源的极简、可复现方式。

items.title_en: Review: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
items.title_zh: 三星 Galaxy S26 Ultra 评测
items.summary_en: The review highlights flagship performance, camera quality, and display excellence, with software polish and battery life as key pros and cons.
items.summary_zh: 该机搭载旗舰级硬件，相机系统和显示效果出色，软件体验也较为成熟。但评测也指出价格高企与续航可能不及竞争对手的情况。

items.title_en: KiCad 10.0.0 Release
items.title_zh: KiCad 10.0.0 发布
items.summary_en: KiCad 10.0.0 release brings a major update with UI refresh, improved 3D rendering, and workflow enhancements for schematic capture and PCB layout. This advances open-source PCB design for hobbyists and professionals.
items.summary_zh: KiCad 10.0.0 发布带来重大更新：界面重绘、3D 渲染改进以及原理图/ PCB 布局工作流的提升，推动开源 PCB 设计在爱好者与专业人士中的应用。

items.title_en: Americans Recognize AI as a Wealth Inequality Machine, Polls Find
items.title_zh: 民众认定 AI 是财富分配不平等的放大器，民调有此发现
items.summary_en: Polls show Americans view AI as exacerbating wealth inequality, with concerns that automation and AI-enabled productivity will disproportionately benefit high-skilled workers and capital owners. The piece outlines public sentiment and potential policy implications for education, labor, and taxes.
items.summary_zh: 民调显示美国人普遍认为 AI 会加剧财富不平等，担心自动化和 AI 生产力提升将主要惠及高技能工人和资本所有者。文章探讨了这一公众观点及对教育、劳动力市场与税制的潜在政策含义。

items.title_en: Sashiko: An agentic Linux kernel code review system
items.title_zh: Sashiko：一个具代理能力的 Linux 内核代码审查系统
items.summary_en: Presents Sashiko, a Linux kernel code review system that incorporates agent-like automation to assist reviewers, reflecting AI-assisted workflows in kernel development.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Sashiko，这是一个具代理能力的 Linux 内核代码审查系统，融入自动化代理来辅助审查，体现内核开发中的 AI 助力。

items.title_en: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
items.title_zh: Show HN：家用血液透析的开源安全网
items.summary_en: Show HN: Open-source safety net for home hemodialysis provides patients tools to monitor safety, alarms, and supply management. It demonstrates how DIY medical tooling can empower patients while raising regulatory and safety considerations.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：SafeHemo 提供了一个用于居家透析的开源安全网，为患者提供监测安全、警报和耗材管理的工具，展示了 DIY 医疗工具如何增强患者自助能力，同时也带来监管和安全方面的挑战。

items.title_en: "Collaboration" Is Bullshit
items.title_zh: 合作就是废话
items.summary_en: The author argues that collaboration is often overhyped and inefficient; suggests alternatives: focusing on clear ownership, autonomous teams, and better decision protocols.
items.summary_zh: 作者批评过度强调协作，认为实际工作中协作常常拖慢进度，提出以独立承担、明确的所有权和高效的协调机制来替代无休止的协作。

items.title_en: Show HN: Codala, a social network built on scanning barcodes
items.title_zh: Show HN：Codala，一个通过扫描条码构建的社交网络
items.summary_en: Show HN: Codala is a social network built around barcode scanning, a playful concept that links people through codes and tags. It sparks curiosity about novel connection methods while raising questions about scalability, privacy, and usability.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Codala 是一个围绕条码扫描构建的社交网络，概念新颖而有趣。它既能激发好奇心，也引发关于隐私、扩展性与可用性的质疑。

items.title_en: The Plumbing of Everyday Magic
items.title_zh: 日常魔法的管道工程
items.summary_en: This piece argues that everyday technological magic relies on unseen infrastructures—the 'plumbing' of systems, networks, and data flows. It invites readers to appreciate the engineering that makes smooth, magical experiences possible.
items.summary_zh: 本文揭示日常科技体验背后的隐形基础设施——系统、网络与数据流的管道工程。作者提醒读者欣赏那些让日常“魔力”看似无缝运作的工程。

items.title_en: Revert "userdb: add birthDate field to JSON user records
items.title_zh: 回滚：JSON 用户记录中添加 birthDate 字段的改动
items.summary_en: A GitHub PR to revert adding a birthDate field to JSON user records highlights privacy concerns around storing birth data and reinforces the importance of minimal data collection.
items.summary_zh: 对 JSON 用户记录添加 birthDate 字段的改动被回滚，反映对个人出生信息隐私和最小化数据收集的关注。

items.title_en: I haven't used a mouse for 14 years
items.title_zh: 14年来我没有用鼠标
items.summary_en: The author has not used a mouse for 14 years, relying on keyboard-centric workflows and trackpad gestures; the piece also explains how to enable three-finger drag on macOS.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享14年来不用鼠标，改用触控板和快捷手势进行高效工作，并介绍在 macOS 上开启三指拖拽等操作的做法和心得。

items.title_en: Lf-lean: The frontier of verified software engineering
items.title_zh: LF-lean：可验证软件工程的前沿
items.summary_en: LF-lean explores leveraging formal methods, type systems, and machine-checked proofs to advance software engineering into a realm where correctness guarantees are embedded by design. It discusses frameworks, tooling, and research directions shaping verifiable software.
items.summary_zh: LF-lean 探讨将形式化方法、类型系统和机器可校验证明嵌入软件开发，以实现可验证性设计的正确性保证。讨论相关框架、工具和未来研究方向。

items.title_en: Work_mem: It's a Trap
items.title_zh: Work_mem：这是个陷阱
items.summary_en: The post warns that increasing work_mem in PostgreSQL can backfire by consuming too much RAM during parallel queries, leading to swaps or OOM. The piece advocates careful benchmarking, realistic workloads, and avoiding blanket defaults.
items.summary_zh: 文章警告 PostgreSQL 的 work_mem 设置过高可能在并发查询中吞掉大量内存，导致换出或内存不足。建议进行小规模基准测试、使用实际工作负载，并避免一刀切的默认值。

items.title_en: Show HN: Free OpenAI API Access with ChatGPT Account
items.title_zh: Show HN：使用 ChatGPT 账户免费获取 OpenAI API 访问
items.summary_en: An approach to obtain OpenAI API access for free by leveraging ChatGPT account credentials, lowering the barrier to experimentation. It raises questions about policy compliance and long-term viability.
items.summary_zh: 通过利用 ChatGPT 账户凭据获取 OpenAI API 访问的一种方法，降低了试验门槛。但这也引发关于合规与长期可行性的问题。

items.title_en: The hottest new phone is Tin Can, a 'landline' for kids
items.title_zh: Tin Can：为孩子设计的座机
items.summary_en: The hottest new phone is Tin Can, a 'landline' for kids.
items.summary_zh: Tin Can 作为面向儿童的简化通讯设备，提供不依赖互联网的座机功能，帮助孩子保持沟通同时降低屏幕时间和风险，附带家长监管选项。

items.title_en: What if Python was natively distributable?
items.title_zh: 如果 Python 能原生分发？
items.summary_en: Proposes a vision for Python with native distribution capabilities, discussing implications for packaging, portability, and the broader Python ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 提出在 Python 生态中实现原生分发的设想，讨论对打包、移植性和开发者体验的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Thoughts on OpenAI acquiring Astral and uv/ruff/ty
items.title_zh: 关于OpenAI收购Astral及uv/ruff/ty的看法
items.summary_en: Simon Willison weighs in on OpenAI's acquisition of Astral and related tooling (uv, Ruff, Ty). The discussion centers on how such consolidations reshape AI tooling, governance, and open-source ecosystems, potentially accelerating or constraining innovation. The takeaway for engineers is to watch how tooling strategy affects interoperability, licensing, and community contributions.
items.summary_zh: Willison 讨论 OpenAI 收购 Astral 及相关工具链（uv/ruff/ty）的潜在影响。核心议题在于此类整合如何改变 AI 工具生态、治理与开源协作，可能加速或限制创新。对于开发者来说，关注工具链的互操作性、许可与社区贡献的变化。

items.title_en: 385TB video game archive saved by fans; torrents being generated
items.title_zh: 爱好者拯救了385TB的视频游戏档案，正在生成种子
items.summary_en: Fans have backed up a 385 TB archive of games, with torrents being seeded to ensure redundancy and verifiability. The effort highlights community-driven digital preservation and the practical challenges of long-term archival at scale.
items.summary_zh: 爱好者完成了一个385TB的视频游戏档案的备份工作，正在生成种子以实现冗余和验证。此举凸显社区驱动的数字保存挑战与解决思路。

items.title_en: Robotocore · a Digital Twin of AWS
items.title_zh: Robotocore：AWS 的数字孪生
items.summary_en: Robotocore provides a digital twin of AWS, enabling offline testing and simulation of cloud workloads. By modeling cloud infrastructure as code, it helps operators prototype changes with reduced risk and cost.
items.summary_zh: Robotocore 提供了 AWS 的数字孪生，便于在本地离线仿真云工作负载、测试基础设施变更，降低成本与风险。该开源项目推动云原生环境的本地化开发与试验。

items.title_en: An FAQ on Reinforcement Learning Environments
items.title_zh: 关于强化学习环境的常见问题解答
items.summary_en: A practical FAQ clarifies reinforcement learning environments, covering standard interfaces, benchmarks, and evaluation practices to help newcomers pick suitable environments and avoid common pitfalls.
items.summary_zh: 这份强化学习环境常见问题解答梳理了标准接口、基准与评估实践，帮助新手选用合适环境并规避常见坑。

items.title_en: Meme Buildings
items.title_zh: 梗图建筑
items.summary_en: An exploration of meme-culture-inspired architecture, examining how online memes influence design rhetoric, aesthetics, and urban spaces.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨梗图文化如何影响建筑设计的语言、美学与城市空间的表达，展示 meme 如何转化为设计灵感。

items.title_en: Heisuke Hironaka Has Died
items.title_zh: 著名数学家弘中英機去世
items.summary_en: Heisuke Hironaka, renowned for work on resolution of singularities and a Fields Medalist, has died, marking a significant loss in algebraic geometry. His contributions shaped modern theory and computational methods.
items.summary_zh: 著名数学家弘中英機因在代数几何中的奇点消解理论作出奠基性贡献而知名，曾获菲尔兹奖。其工作深刻影响了现代代数几何及相关计算方法。

items.title_en: Delphi 13.1 Released, with ARM64 support
items.title_zh: Delphi 13.1 发布，新增 ARM64 支持
items.summary_en: The new Delphi 13.1 release adds ARM64 support, enabling native compilation for modern ARM platforms and expanding Delphi's cross‑platform reach. This update is aimed at developers targeting performance‑sensitive or mobile/embedded ARM targets while keeping the existing RAD tooling.
items.summary_zh: Delphi 13.1 新版加入了 ARM64 支持，允许为现代 ARM 平台生成原生可执行文件，扩展了 Delphi 的跨平台能力。该更新面向需要高性能或面向移动/嵌入式 ARM 目标的开发者，同时保留现有的快速应用开发工具链。

items.title_en: ASCII and Unicode quotation marks (2007)
items.title_zh: ASCII 与 Unicode 引号（2007）
items.summary_en: Examines the historic tension between ASCII quotes and typographic Unicode quotes, focusing on encoding, rendering, and cross-system compatibility. It offers practical guidance for choosing safe quotes in code, data interchange, and publishing.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 ASCII 引号与 Unicode 引号的历史性问题，讨论在文本编码、渲染和跨系统互操作时的兼容性陷阱。给出在代码、数据交换与发布中选用引号的实用建议。

items.title_en: Marc Andreessen is a philosophical zombie
items.title_zh: 马克·安德森是哲学僵尸
items.summary_en: The piece contends that Marc Andreessen embodies a philosophical persona detached from actionable results, critiquing the tech industry’s focus on grand ideas over execution. It invites reflection on how such figures shape policy and investment culture.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为马克·安德森展现出一种与实际行动脱节的哲学化形象，批评科技行业过于追逐宏大理念而缺乏执行力。提醒读者思考此类人物如何影响政策与投资文化。

items.title_en: Restoring the first recording of computer music (2018)
items.title_zh: 恢复第一段计算机音乐的录音（2018）
items.summary_en: A project by the British Library to restore the earliest known computer-generated music recording, preserving a historic intersection of computer science and music. The restoration sheds light on early digital audio synthesis and the challenges of preserving old media.
items.summary_zh: 英国图书馆的一个项目修复了已知最早的计算机音乐录音，展示计算机科学与音乐交叉的历史。修复工作揭示了早期数字音频合成的历史细节与保存老旧媒介的挑战。

items.title_en: Migrating the American Express Payment Network, Twice
items.title_zh: 两次迁移美国运通支付网络
items.summary_en: The post chronicles American Express's payment network migration, detailing the challenges of moving high-availability financial rails and lessons for fintech teams migrating mission-critical services. It underscores careful API design, data migration, and risk management when changing payment networks.
items.summary_zh: 文中回顾美国运通支付网络的两次迁移，分析在迁移高可用金融系统时的挑战、架构取舍与对开发者和商家的影响。强调在支付网络迁移中需关注 API 设计、数据迁移和风控等关键要点。

items.title_en: Backblaze Pricing and Product Updates
items.title_zh: Backblaze 定价及产品更新
items.summary_en: Backblaze announces pricing changes and product updates, including new storage options and feature enhancements aimed at simplifying backups and improving performance.
items.summary_zh: Backblaze 公布了定价调整和产品更新，包括新的存储计划、功能改进以及性能优化。

items.title_en: Show HN: GitClassic.com, a fast, lightweight GitHub thin client (pages <14KB)
items.title_zh: Show HN：GitClassic.com，一个快速且轻量的 GitHub 轻客户端（页面 <14KB）
items.summary_en: Show HN: GitClassic.com is a fast, lightweight GitHub thin client with pages under 14KB. It focuses on essential GitHub interactions in a tiny footprint, useful for performance-sensitive environments or privacy-conscious users seeking a minimal interface.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：GitClassic.com 是一个快速、轻量的 GitHub 轻客户端，页面体积不到 14KB。它聚焦核心功能，适用于对性能或隐私敏感的场景，提供极简的操作体验。

items.title_en: Kagi: Small Web Just Got Bigger
items.title_zh: Kagi：小型网络现在更强大
items.summary_en: Kagi extends its 'small web' philosophy by broadening search capabilities and features, offering a privacy-respecting alternative with deeper results and better support for niche corners of the web.
items.summary_zh: Kagi 通过扩展索引与功能，进一步强化“微型网络”理念，提供更隐私友好的搜索体验，并在边缘场景得到更深度的结果。

items.title_en: Just make it hard to fail
items.title_zh: 就让它真的难以失败
items.summary_en: A piece arguing for designing systems so failure is extremely hard to accomplish, emphasizing robust architecture, redundancy, and clear failure modes.
items.summary_zh: 文章倡导用稳健的架构、冗余和清晰的故障处理来让系统尽量不出错，挑战过于冒险的“快速迭代”思维。

items.title_en: Pretraining Language Models via Neural Cellular Automata
items.title_zh: 通过神经细胞自动机对语言模型进行预训练
items.summary_en: Proposes pretraining LMs via Neural Cellular Automata, using local interaction rules to guide learning; aims to improve data efficiency and emergent capabilities, presenting a novel research direction.
items.summary_zh: 提出用神经元胞自动机来对语言模型进行预训练，利用局部交互规则来引导学习，旨在提升数据利用效率和产生新兴能力，开辟新的研究方向。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Sitefire (YC W26) – Automating actions to improve AI visibility
items.title_zh: Sitefire：自动化以提升 AI 可见性
items.summary_en: Launch HN: YC W26’s Sitefire builds automation to streamline actions around AI deployments, improving visibility and governance. By triggering signals and surfacing events across workflows, it reduces manual toil for teams monitoring AI systems.
items.summary_zh: Sitefire 由 YC W26 支持，提供自动化工具来处理 AI 部署中的日常操作，以改善可观测性与治理。通过在工作流中触发信号、将事件显现，帮助团队在减少人工工作量的同时更好地监控 AI 系统。

items.title_en: A Tiny Camera Revealed a Hidden Passage in the Great Pyramid
items.title_zh: 微型摄像头揭开大金字塔内的隐藏通道
items.summary_en: A tiny camera probe uncovered a previously hidden passage in the Great Pyramid, illustrating how modern imaging can reveal archaeological structures. The finding showcases the value of compact sensing and careful data interpretation in historical sites.
items.summary_zh: 一枚微型摄像头探针发现了大金字塔内部的隐藏通道，展示了现代成像技术在考古领域的潜力。此发现凸显了紧凑传感与数据解读在历史遗址研究中的应用价值。

items.title_en: First and Lego Education Partnership Update
items.title_zh: FIRST 与乐高教育合作伙伴关系更新
items.summary_en: The update outlines ongoing collaboration between FIRST Robotics and LEGO Education, highlighting new curricula, kits, and opportunities for students; shows how the partnership scales hands-on STEM learning.
items.summary_zh: 更新概述 FIRST Robotics 与 LEGO Education 的合作进展，介绍新课程、教育套件，以及为学生提供的动手STEM学习机会，显示合作对普及青少年教育的影响。

items.title_en: National Academies of Sciences says no to demands it remove climate info
items.title_zh: 美国科学院拒绝删除气候信息的要求
items.summary_en: The National Academies push back against political pressure to scrub climate information, defending scientific integrity and public transparency. The episode highlights the ongoing tension between science, policy, and media narratives.
items.summary_zh: 美国科学院拒绝在气候信息方面的政治压力，强调科学完整性与公开沟通的重要性。此事件凸显了科学、政策与媒体叙事之间的持续拉锯。

items.title_en: Google Search is now using AI to replace headlines
items.title_zh: 谷歌搜索正在用 AI 替换新闻标题
items.summary_en: Google Search experiments with AI-generated headlines to summarize and surface content more efficiently. The test prompts questions about trust, editorial control, and the future of search quality.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌在搜索结果中试验由 AI 生成的标题，以更高效地概括并呈现内容。测试引发关于信任、编辑控制和搜索质量未来的讨论。

items.title_en: Exploring 8 Shaft Weaving
items.title_zh: 8轴织造探索
items.summary_en: An exploration of 8-shaft weaving reveals pattern possibilities and loom mechanics, offering insights for textile designers and hobbyists into more complex weave structures.
items.summary_zh: 对 8 根经轴织造的深入探索，揭示了更复杂花样的织造原理与织机机制，为纺织设计师和爱好者提供实用洞见。

items.title_en: Essex police pause facial recognition camera use after study finds racial bias
items.title_zh: 埃塞克斯警方在研究发现种族偏差后暂停面部识别摄像头使用
items.summary_en: Police halted live facial recognition camera deployments after a study found racial bias and high error rates, reflecting growing scrutiny of biometric surveillance. The pause follows concerns that such systems misidentify minorities and lack sufficient governance to prevent harms in policing contexts.
items.summary_zh: 在一项研究发现面部识别存在种族偏差和较高错误率后，警方暂停了实时面部识别摄像头的使用，显示对生物识别监控的审查日益加强。暂停措施源于该类系统易误识少数群体且治理不足，可能在执法场景中造成伤害。

items.title_en: We Have Learned Nothing
items.title_zh: We Have Learned Nothing
items.summary_en: Startup pundits keep regurgitating the same conventional wisdom even as markets and startups fail to match the old playbooks. It suggests founders should ignore hype, focus on unit economics, product-market fit, and real-world experimentation. The article urges a more disciplined, evidence-based approach to building ventures.
items.summary_zh: 文章批评创业圈评论家仍复刻旧有教条，市场环境已变化却缺乏新见解。创始人应忽略噱头，专注单位经济、产品与市场匹配，以及现实世界的验证。呼吁以更有纪律、基于证据的方式来打造企业。

items.title_en: A comprehensive database of categories and their properties
items.title_zh: 类别及其属性的综合数据库
items.summary_en: Catdat provides a structured catalog of categories and their properties, enabling precise tagging, search, and metadata modeling. It can serve as a data foundation for knowledge graphs and complex taxonomies.
items.summary_zh: Catdat 提供一个结构化的类别及其属性数据库，支持精准标签、检索与元数据建模。可作为知识图谱与复杂分类体系的数据基础。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pano, a bookmarking tool built around shareable shelves
items.title_zh: Show HN：Pano，一款围绕可分享书架的书签工具
items.summary_en: Pano is a bookmarking tool built around shareable shelves, enabling collaborative curation and easy sharing of bookmarks.
items.summary_zh: Pano 是一个以可分享书架为核心的书签工具，支持协作式书签管理与便捷分享。

items.title_en: Theodosian Land Walls of Constantinople (2025)
items.title_zh: 君士坦丁堡忒奥多西城墙（2025 更新）
items.summary_en: Theodosian Land Walls of Constantinople (2025).
items.summary_zh: 最新考古与研究对君士坦丁堡忒奥多西城墙的范围、工程构造有新的认识，揭示防务史与城市考古的新证据。

items.title_en: A Fuzzer for the Toy Optimizer
items.title_zh: Toy Optimizer 的模糊测试工具
items.summary_en: A fuzzing approach targets a tiny optimizer to surface edge cases and stability issues, illustrating how automated input generation can improve even small-scale optimization code. The results highlight the value of fuzz testing in uncovering bugs and performance pitfalls early. It’s a quick, practical lesson in reliability engineering.
items.summary_zh: 为一个小型优化器设计了模糊测试工具，用以暴露边界情况与稳定性问题，展示自动化输入生成在小型优化代码中的效用。该方法有助于及早发现缺陷与性能瓶颈，是可靠性工程的实用案例。

items.title_en: Fatal Core Dump Game
items.title_zh: 致命核心转储游戏
items.summary_en: Fatal Core Dump Game is a puzzle/tech-themed game that riffs on debugging and OS crashes, inviting players to reason about crash dumps and system state. It demonstrates how technical concepts can be woven into engaging gameplay.
items.summary_zh: 致命核心转储游戏是一款以调试与系统崩溃为灵感的解谜/游戏，邀请玩家分析崩溃转储与系统状态。游戏设计展示了如何将技术概念巧妙融入可玩性。

items.title_en: Agent Skills – Open Security Database
items.title_zh: Agent Skills —— 开放安全数据库
items.summary_en: Agent Skills is an Open Security Database—a resource of capabilities for AI agents to handle security tasks. It offers modular skills to compose secure automation workflows.
items.summary_zh: Agent Skills 是一个开放的安全数据库，汇集 AI 代理可执行的安全相关技能。提供模块化能力以组合成安全的自动化工作流。

items.title_en: $ teebot.dev – from terminal to tee in 6 seconds
items.title_zh: $ teebot.dev – 从终端到 tee 在 6 秒内完成
items.summary_en: Describes a workflow or tool that takes terminal output and quickly pipes it to a tee-like stream, improving quick file writes and log handling in development.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一个工作流工具，使终端输出在 6 秒内就能进入 tee 风格的流式写入，提升开发中的日志处理与文件写入效率。

items.title_en: Zero ZGC4: A Better Graphing Calculator for School and Beyond
items.title_zh: Zero ZGC4：面向校园及未来的更好图形计算器
items.summary_en: Zero ZGC4 brings a modern graphing calculator with improved math, performance, and usability for students and beyond. It showcases how educational tools continue to evolve with better interfaces and features. The takeaway is accessible, capable calculation tools that go beyond basic graphing.
items.summary_zh: Zero ZGC4 提供了更现代的图形计算器，提升了数学运算、性能与易用性，惠及学生及更广用户。教育工具正在通过更好的界面和功能演进，提升学习体验。

items.title_en: Event Publisher enables event integration between Keycloak and OpenFGA
items.title_zh: Event Publisher 让 Keycloak 与 OpenFGA 之间实现事件驱动的集成
items.summary_en: Event Publisher enables event-driven integration between Keycloak and OpenFGA, syncing identity and authorization decisions in real time. This helps enforce policy-driven access across apps.
items.summary_zh: Event Publisher 让 Keycloak 与 OpenFGA 之间实现事件驱动的集成，实时同步身份与授权决策，帮助跨应用执行策略驱动的访问控制。

items.title_en: Ant Mill
items.title_zh: 蚁轮现象
items.summary_en: Explains the ant mill phenomenon, where ants circle in on themselves, and connects it to broader lessons about self-reinforcing patterns in distributed systems and algorithms.
items.summary_zh: 解读蚁轮现象：蚂蚁在无出口的圈中自我循环的行为，并联系到分布式系统与算法中的自我强化模式。

items.title_en: Intuitions for Tranformer Circuits
items.title_zh: Transformer 电路的直觉
items.summary_en: Offers intuitive takes on how transformer circuits operate in AI interpretability, focusing on recurring circuit motifs across layers and how attention, residuals, and MLPs combine to form representations. It highlights practical insights for diagnosing failures and building more robust transformers.
items.summary_zh: 本文给出对 Transformer 电路的直觉性解读，聚焦跨层的可重复电路模组以及注意力、残差和 MLP 如何共同构成表征。提供诊断故障与提升模型鲁棒性的实用洞见，帮助读者在设计和分析 Transformer 时更有把握。

items.title_en: Alpha Micro AM-1000E and AM-1200
items.title_zh: Alpha Micro AM-1000E 与 AM-1200
items.summary_en: A look at Alpha Micro AM-1000E and AM-1200, likely a vintage hardware feature, restoration notes, and historical context for early microcomputers.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦 Alpha Micro AM-1000E 与 AM-1200 等复古硬件，包含翻新笔记与对早期微机设计的历史背景。

items.title_en: Vectorization of Verilog Designs and its Effects on Verification and Synthesis
items.title_zh: Verilog 设计向量化及其对验证和综合的影响
items.summary_en: ArXiv paper explores how vectorizing Verilog designs affects verification and synthesis, showing how bit-vector representations can impact equivalence checking and hardware synthesis results. The findings matter for hardware designers seeking better verification performance and predictable synthesis outcomes.
items.summary_zh: 论文探讨 Verilog 设计向量化对验证和综合的影响，提示位向量表示可能改变等价性检查与硬件综合结果。对硬件设计者而言，这些发现有助于提升验证性能和预测综合行为。

items.title_en: Canopy Height Maps v2
items.title_zh: Canopy Height Maps v2
items.summary_en: Canopy Height Maps v2 upgrades canopy height data with improved algorithms and higher-resolution imagery, enabling better forest biomass estimation and carbon accounting. The update benefits climate science, forestry analytics, and conservation planning.
items.summary_zh: Canopy Height Maps v2 使用改进的算法和更高分辨率的数据，提升树冠高度信息的准确性，便于森林生物量估算和碳核算。对林业、气候与保护分析具有实际应用价值。

items.title_en: How HN: Ironkernel – Python expressions, Rust parallel
items.title_zh: Ironkernel：Python 表达式、Rust 并行
items.summary_en: Ironkernel is a project combining Python-style expressions with Rust-backed parallel execution to speed up evaluation tasks. It explores language design and performance trade-offs between dynamic expression evaluation and compiled performance.
items.summary_zh: Ironkernel 项目将 Python 风格的表达式与 Rust 的并行执行结合，提升表达式计算的性能。它讨论了动态表达式语言与编译型性能之间的权衡以及实现细节。

items.title_en: Operation Epic Fury Explained: Riches and Domination Drive This War
items.title_zh: Operation Epic Fury 解释：财富与统治驱动这场战争
items.summary_en: Explains how wealth concentration and dominance shape the war landscape, linking financial incentives to strategic decisions and tech-enabled power. The piece connects economic drivers to policy, supply chains, and information warfare in conflict zones. It offers a critical lens for readers considering the tech industry's geopolitical role.
items.summary_zh: 解释财富集中与支配如何塑造战争格局，将经济激励与战略决策以及技术驱动的力量联系起来。文章将经济驱动因素与政策、供应链及冲突地区的信息战联系起来，提供了对科技行业地缘政治角色的批判性视角。

items.title_en: Learnings from training a font recognition model from scratch
items.title_zh: 从零开始训练字体识别模型的经验教训
items.summary_en: From scratch, the team trained a font recognition model and documented the process: data collection, labeling, preprocessing, architecture choices, and evaluation. The piece surfaces practical lessons and pitfalls for building robust OCR-like systems with limited datasets. It helps readers plan end-to-end experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 分享从零开始训练字体识别模型的经验与教训，包括数据收集、标注、预处理、模型选择与评估。揭示在数据有限情境下构建鲁棒 OCR 类系统的实用要点与风险点，帮助读者进行端到端的实验规划。

items.title_en: What I Learned When I Started a Design Studio (2011)
items.title_zh: 我在 2011 年创办设计工作室时学到的东西
items.summary_en: A reflective piece recounting early lessons about building a design studio: balancing creative ambitions with client needs, pricing, process, and business development. It offers enduring advice for independent studios.
items.summary_zh: 回顾在2011年创办设计工作室的初始教训，作者分享如何在创意与商业之间取得平衡、设定定价与流程，以及寻求成长的经验。为独立工作室提供可操作的建议。

items.title_en: C Bit-Field Pitfalls
items.title_zh: C 语言位域陷阱
items.summary_en: C bit-field pitfalls fall into place: bit-field behavior is implementation-defined in C, leading to portability and correctness traps. The piece offers practical guidance to avoid subtle bugs in low-level code.
items.summary_zh: C 语言位域的陷阱：位域行为在实现中定义，可能导致可移植性和正确性的问题；提供实际规避建议。

items.title_en: Linux 7.1 to Retire UDP-Lite – Allows for Better Performance with Cleansed Code
items.title_zh: Linux 7.1 将停止支持 UDP-Lite，以简化代码和提升性能
items.summary_en: The kernel maintainers plan to remove UDP-Lite in favor of simpler, faster UDP implementations, reducing edge-case handling and complexity. This move improves performance and security surface, but may affect users relying on UDP-Lite features.
items.summary_zh: Linux 7.1 将弃用 UDP-Lite，提升代码简化、性能与安全性。此举虽提升核心网络实现的效率，但可能影响依赖 UDP-Lite 的使用场景。

items.title_en: Reboot: Rebuild civilization by reinventing lost technologies
items.title_zh: 重启：通过重新发明失传技术来重建文明
items.summary_en: An essay on rebooting civilization by reinventing lost technologies, outlining approaches to recover critical capabilities and the societal shifts needed to sustain progress.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨通过重现失传技术来重建文明的可能路径，提出如何恢复关键能力、以及实现可持续进步所需的社会变革。

items.title_en: Turkish Coffee? Since the 16th Century, It's in the Water
items.title_zh: 土耳其咖啡？自 16 世纪起，它已经在水里
items.summary_en: An exploration of Turkish coffee culture and its historical entanglement with water, tracing how centuries-old preparation rituals persist in modern life. The piece blends food history with cultural analysis to show how a simple beverage mirrors broader traditions.
items.summary_zh: 土耳其咖啡的历史与文化深深嵌入日常饮水的叙事，追溯至 16 世纪的传统。文章把咖啡制备的习俗视作文化与历史的折射，展示了饮品如何映照更广泛的社会传统。

items.title_en: Liberated Systemd
items.title_zh: Liberated Systemd
items.summary_en: A project aiming to liberate systemd by loosening its control or creating alternatives; discusses the motivations, potential benefits, and trade-offs of decoupling init systems.
items.summary_zh: 一个旨在解放或替代 Systemd 的项目，讨论去中心化、降低对单一初始化系统的依赖的动机、潜在收益及权衡。

items.title_en: Show HN: Time Keep – Location timezones, timers, alarms, countdowns in one place
items.title_zh: Show HN: Time Keep – 将地点时区、定时器、闹钟、倒计时整合在一个地方
items.summary_en: Show HN presenting Time Keep, a unified tool for time zones, timers, alarms, and countdowns, aimed at simplifying time-oriented productivity workflows.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示 Time Keep，一站式工具整合时区、定时器、闹钟和倒计时，简化时间管理与生产力工作流。

items.title_en: Training Center for Maneuvering on Manned Model Ships
items.title_zh: 用于操纵载人模型舰艇的训练中心
items.summary_en: Describes a training center for maneuvering manned model ships, outlining curriculum, simulators, and safety practices for hands-on engineering education.
items.summary_zh: 介绍用于操纵载人模型舰艇的训练中心，涵盖课程、仿真设备与安全规范，强调动手教育的价值。

items.title_en: Cuba's national electric grid collapses, leaving millions without power
items.title_zh: 古巴国家电网崩溃，数百万人断电
items.summary_en: A Cuba-wide power grid collapse left millions without power, highlighting aging infrastructure and resilience challenges in a crucial sector. The incident disrupts daily life, businesses, and healthcare services, and may prompt attention to grid reliability and investment in energy infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 古巴国家电网崩溃导致数百万人断电，暴露出基础设施老化与系统韧性不足的问题。供电中断影响日常生活、企业运营和医疗等关键服务，或将推动对电网可靠性与能源基础设施投资的关注。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Chamber (YC W26) – An AI Teammate for GPU Infrastructure
items.title_zh: Chamber（YC W26）——用于 GPU 基础设施的 AI 助手
items.summary_en: Chamber positions itself as an AI teammate for GPU infrastructure, helping operators automate tasks, monitor hardware, and optimize resource usage. The idea is to reduce toil with natural-language commands and AI-assisted workflows.
items.summary_zh: Chamber 将自己定位为 GPU 基础设施的 AI 助手，帮助运维自动化任务、监控硬件并优化资源使用。通过自然语言指令与 AI 辅助工作流来降低运维负担。

items.title_en: How We Synchronized Editing for Rec Room's Multiplayer Scripting System
items.title_zh: Rec Room 的多人编辑系统如何实现同步
items.summary_en: Discusses how editing is synchronized in Rec Room’s multiplayer scripting environment, covering conflict resolution, latency handling, and real-time collaboration patterns.
items.summary_zh: 讲述 Rec Room 多人脚本编辑系统的同步实现，涉及冲突处理、延迟补偿与实时协作模式。

items.title_en: Quillx is an open standard for disclosing AI involvement in software projects
items.title_zh: Quillx 开放标准：披露软件项目中的 AI 参与
items.summary_en: Presents Quillx, an open standard for disclosing AI involvement in software projects, enabling transparency about machine-generated contributions and AI-assisted components. The aim is to foster trust, accountability, and clearer licensing in human-AI workflows.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Quillx，一项用于披露软件项目中 AI 参与的开放标准，旨在提升对机器生成贡献和 AI 辅助组件的透明度。助力建立信任、问责以及更清晰的混合人机工作流程的许可边界。

items.title_en: Claude Code and the Great Productivity Panic of 2026
items.title_zh: Claude Code 与2026年生产力恐慌
items.summary_en: AI coding assistants promise big productivity gains but also create a 'productivity panic' as teams chase automation without clear ROI.
items.summary_zh: AI 编码助手承诺带来生产力提升，但随着团队追逐自动化而缺乏明确回报，出现所謂的生产力恐慌。文章讨论了采用 AI 助手的节奏、度量不当的风险，以及治理和渐进式落地的重要性。

items.title_en: Sandboxing: Foolproof Boundaries vs. Unbounded Foolishness (2025)
items.title_zh: 沙箱化：牢靠边界与无尽愚蠢之辩（2025）
items.summary_en: Examines sandboxing trade-offs in 2025, arguing that 'foolproof' boundaries can hinder usability, while unbounded approaches invite risk. It highlights security-prioritized designs vs pragmatic flexibility.
items.summary_zh: 探讨2025年的沙箱技术取舍，认为‘万无一失’的边界可能损害可用性，而无边界的方法又带来风险，强调安全与灵活性的权衡。

items.title_en: Seam carving with forward energy
items.title_zh: 用前向能量实现的 seam carving（内容感知缩放）
items.summary_en: Details how seam carving with forward energy improves content-aware image resizing by reducing artifacts and preserving important regions during scaling.
items.summary_zh: 介绍用前向能量实现的 seam carving 如何在缩放图片时减少伪影、更好地保护重要区域，从而提升内容感知缩放的效果。

items.title_en: Canada moves towards homegrown rocket launches
items.title_zh: 加拿大向本土火箭发射迈进
items.summary_en: Canada is moving toward developing homegrown rocket launch capability, signaling investment in national space infrastructure. The move could diversify the space sector, attract startups, and reduce reliance on foreign launch providers, with implications for national security and sovereignty. Policy and funding details will shape timeline.
items.summary_zh: 加拿大正在推动本土火箭发射能力的发展，显示出对国家空间基础设施投资的决心。此举可能促进本地太空产业多元化、吸引初创公司并降低对外部发射服务的依赖，同时对国家安全与主权有一定影响。具体的政策与资金安排将决定时间表。

items.title_en: Show HN: Hecate – Call an AI from Signal
items.title_zh: Show HN：Hecate — 通过 Signal 调用 AI
items.summary_en: Hecate lets users call an AI from within Signal, opening new pathways for private AI interactions within messaging apps. The project demonstrates how AI backends can be accessed from end-to-end encrypted chats, raising questions about privacy, latency, and bot capabilities.
items.summary_zh: Hecate 允许在 Signal 中直接调用 AI，开启在端对端加密的聊天环境中对 AI 的新访问路径。该项目展示了将 AI 后端接入即时通讯应用的可行性，同时也引发关于隐私、时延和机器人能力的讨论。

items.title_en: A digital resource for studying the graffiti of Herculaneum and Pompeii
items.title_zh: 用于研究庞贝与赫库兰涅姆涂鸦的数字资源
items.summary_en: Showcases a digital resource that documents graffiti from Pompeii and Herculaneum, enabling scholars and enthusiasts to explore inscriptions, provenance, and stylistic details with searchable data and imagery.
items.summary_zh: 展示一个数字资源，汇集庞贝和赫库兰涅姆涂鸦的资料，方便学者与爱好者通过可检索的数据与图像，研究铭文、出处与风格等细节。

items.title_en: Gangs of Karachi
items.title_zh: 卡拉奇帮派
items.summary_en: Harper's piece on the gangs in Karachi, exploring their rise, networks, and impact on urban life and security.
items.summary_zh: Harper's 杂志文章深入探讨卡拉奇的帮派及其网络结构、发展及对城市安全和日常生活的影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: I fixed FFmpeg's subtitle conversion (the bug from 2014)
items.title_zh: Show HN：我修复了 FFmpeg 的字幕转换问题（2014年的漏洞）
items.summary_en: A developer claims to have fixed a long-standing FFmpeg subtitle conversion bug dating back to 2014, improving reliability and accuracy of subtitle handling. The post outlines the root cause, the patch, and how it affects current workflows.
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者宣布修复了 FFmpeg 长达十年的字幕转换 bug（源自2014年），提升字幕处理的稳定性与准确性。帖子解释了问题根源、补丁细节以及对现有工作流的影响。

items.title_en: Ordered Dithering with Arbitrary or Irregular Colour Palettes (2023)
items.title_zh: 使用任意或不规则调色板的有序抖动（2023）
items.summary_en: Technical: discusses ordered dithering algorithms for arbitrary color palettes, perhaps improvements on Floyd-Sloyd illusions; 2-3 sentences about method and practical uses in image processing or art software, color quantization.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在任意或不规则调色板上实现有序抖动的技术方法，涵盖颜色映射和误差扩散的要点，以及在图像处理与数字艺术中的实际应用。

items.title_en: Show HN: Oku – One tab to filter out noise from feeds and content sources
items.title_zh: Show HN: Oku – 一标签筛除信息源噪音
items.summary_en: Show HN introducing Oku, a tool that filters noise from feeds and content sources with a single tab, simplifying content curation.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍 Oku，通过一个标签即可从信息源中过滤噪音，简化内容筛选与发现。

items.title_en: FIRST Robotics founder Dean Kamen resigns because of Epstein files
items.title_zh: FIRST Robotics 创始人 Dean Kamen 因 Epstein 文件辞职
items.summary_en: FIRST Robotics founder Dean Kamen resigns because of Epstein files.
items.summary_zh: Dean Kamen 因涉及 Epstein 档案而从 FIRST Robotics 相关职位辞职，引发关于科技机构治理与道德的讨论。

items.title_en: Personal Computing (2022)
items.title_zh: 个人计算（2022）
items.summary_en: Personal Computing (2022) reflects on the era's hardware trends, software ergonomics, and the balance between power users and mainstream consumers. The post offers historical context for today’s devices and how personal computing shaped software ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 这篇回顾性文章回顾 2022 年的个人计算领域：硬件趋势、软件体验与普通用户的使用平衡。为理解今天设备的生态与设计选择提供历史背景。

items.title_en: Nevada utility to Lake Tahoe: Find electricity elsewhere
items.title_zh: 内华达公用事业对太浩湖地区：另寻电力来源
items.summary_en: Nevada's utility tells Lake Tahoe customers to seek electricity elsewhere, signaling resource diversification and regional grid politics. The move illustrates how utility planning and reliability concerns drive shifts in where power is sourced.
items.summary_zh: 内华达州公用事业建议太浩湖地区居民另寻电力来源，折射出区域电力供应多元化与电网治理的考量。此举凸显在偏远区域维持可靠供电所面临的挑战。

items.title_en: Addfox: A new open-source browser extension framework
items.title_zh: Addfox：一个新的开源浏览器扩展框架
items.summary_en: Addfox introduces an open-source framework for building browser extensions, aiming to streamline development, distribution, and interoperability. The project potentially lowers the barrier to crafting cross-browser extensions and sharing them across ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Addfox 推出一个新的开源浏览器扩展框架，目标是简化扩展开发、分发与跨浏览器互操作性。此举可能降低开发门槛，推动生态繁荣。

items.title_en: Solod: Go can be a better C
items.title_zh: Solod：Go 可以成为更好的 C
items.summary_en: Solod argues that Go can function as a safer, more modern alternative to C in certain domains, thanks to memory safety and simpler semantics. The project emphasizes safety versus performance trade-offs in systems programming.
items.summary_zh: Solod 认为 Go 在某些场景下可以替代 C，凭借更高的内存安全性和简洁语义。该观点强调在系统编程中权衡安全与性能的取舍。

items.title_en: Terence Tao – Kepler, Newton, and the true nature of mathematical discovery
items.title_zh: 陶哲轩谈论开普勒、牛顿与数学发现的真正本质
items.summary_en: Terence Tao discusses how great mathematical ideas emerge, touching on inspiration, timing, and the role of computation in discovery. The conversation offers a rare glimpse into the human aspect of mathematical breakthroughs.
items.summary_zh: 陶哲轩谈论数学发现的本质，涉及灵感、时机与计算在发现过程中的角色。对数学突破的人性化解读，提供对研究过程的独到洞见。

items.title_en: Show HN: Crack – Turn your MacBook into a squeaky door
items.title_zh: Show HN: Crack – 让你的 MacBook 变成吱呀声的门
items.summary_en: Show HN submission for Crack, a macOS app that uses sound or UI tricks to make a MacBook emulate a squeaky door, illustrating playful hardware-software experiments.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示 Crack，这是一个让 MacBook 发出吱呀声的应用，展示软硬件结合的趣味实验。

items.title_en: Can Programming Be Liberated from the von Neumann Style? (1977) [pdf]
items.title_zh: Can Programming Be Liberated from the von Neumann Style? (1977) [pdf]
items.summary_en: Discusses the Backus 1977 paper that argued for programming paradigms beyond the von Neumann model, laying groundwork for dataflow and alternative computation styles.
items.summary_zh: 讨论 Backus 1977 年的论文，主张超越冯·诺依曼模型的编程范式，为数据流与替代计算风格奠定基础。

items.title_en: Vertical Farms Tried to Compete with Open Field Farming. It Isn't Going Well
items.title_zh: 垂直农场试图与传统露天农场竞争，但形势并不乐观
items.summary_en: Vertical farms' bid to compete with traditional farming hits headwinds like cost, energy use, and scale, casting doubt on the near-term viability of large-scale indoor agriculture.
items.summary_zh: 垂直农场试图与传统露天农场竞争，但面临成本、能源和规模等难题，短期内难以实现可持续商业化。文章强调现阶段的运营经济学更有利于露天耕作。

items.title_en: Nintendo's not-AI, not-a-game toy
items.title_zh: 任天堂的‘会说话花’：不是 AI 也不是游戏的玩具
items.summary_en: Examines a Nintendo talking flower toy that relies on simple interactivity rather than advanced AI, using it to critique AI hype in consumer toys. The piece reflects on what “intelligence” means in everyday devices and how users perceive interactive tech.
items.summary_zh: 分析任天堂的一款会说话的花玩具，强调简单交互而非高级 AI，借此评析消费类玩具中的 AI 含义。讨论日常设备所带来的“智能”感知与互动技术的真实边界。

items.title_en: Convincing Is Not Persuading
items.title_zh: 说服力并非劝说力
items.summary_en: Distinguishes convincing from persuading, exploring cognitive biases and how rhetoric can shape beliefs without changing underlying values. Applies to AI, UX, and product strategy.
items.summary_zh: 区分让人信服与劝说，分析认知偏误以及修辞如何在不改变根本价值观的前提下影响信念，与 AI、用户体验及产品策略相关。

items.title_en: Storing Solar Energy as Ice for Air Conditioning
items.title_zh: 用冰存储太阳能以供空调使用
items.summary_en: Storing Solar Energy as Ice for Air Conditioning.
items.summary_zh: 展示一种将太阳能以制冰方式存储以驱动空调的做法，利用低谷时段制冰实现冷却需求，具有成本效益和降低峰值电力需求的潜力。

items.title_en: Battle of U.S. rail barons: Merger is setting the industry on a collision course
items.title_zh: 美铁路巨头之战：合并让行业走向对峙
items.summary_en: The merger narrative among U.S. rail barons points to a collision course for the industry as consolidation reshapes pricing, capacity, and investment. Regulators and competitors watch closely as rail infrastructure and logistics trends tilt toward fewer, bigger players.
items.summary_zh: 美铁路巨头合并潮让行业走向更高强度的竞争与重组，价格、运力和投资走向的变化备受关注。监管机构与竞争对手将密切关注这一整合带来的市场格局。

items.title_en: Answer Engine Optimization
items.title_zh: 答案引擎优化
items.summary_en: The piece introduces concept of Answer Engine Optimization focusing on structuring content for direct answers in search and AI chat, using schema, concise formatting, FAQs; advice for creators to tailor content to become authoritative answer sources.
items.summary_zh: 提出答案引擎优化的概念，强调为搜索和对话式 AI 提供直接答案的内容结构化、FAQ 与模式化回答的优化策略，帮助创作者成为权威答案源。
